title: Full Stack Developer - React Native/Supabase - IMMEDIATE START
description:
Hi there! We're building an AI-powered networking and matchmaking platform for communities. Think LinkedIn, rebuilt for real connections. As our second full stack developer, you'll work directly alongside our Lead Developer to ship features from architecture to deployment with full ownership.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Architect & Build: Design features end-to-end using React Native + Expo for mobile and Node.js + Supabase for backend

- AI-First Development: Use Claude, Cursor, and AI tools as your primary engine — plan in markdown, generate with AI, review and refine. This is how we work, not optional

- Collaborate: Work daily with our lead developer to divide and deliver features, participate in code reviews and architecture discussions

- Ship: Handle TestFlight builds (iOS) and internal testing for Android

- Grow: Start as a contributor, rise to an equal development partner — we want someone who can challenge ideas, not just follow orders



We are building carefully, not recklessly. Quality and long-term thinking matter here.



WHO YOU ARE:

- Experienced: 3+ years full stack development with React Native or React (production apps or projects you can show)

- AI-Native: You already use AI coding tools (Claude, Cursor, Copilot) daily. If you're hearing about these for the first time, this isn't the right fit

- Technical: Strong fundamentals in mobile architecture, backend design, and software engineering principles

- Mindset: Coachable, adaptable, self-directed. You take a feature brief and figure out how to deliver it

- Reliable: You show up when you say you will and communicate proactively

- Must own a Mac and iPhone (required for iOS development and TestFlight)

- Familiarity with Supabase, Railway, Expo is a plus

- Must have a stable internet connection



WHY THIS ROLE IS EXCITING:

- Full ownership of features from architecture to deployment

- Work directly with the CTO and Lead Developer — small, collaborative team

- AI-first development methodology - some training for an enthusiastic developer if required.

- Ground-floor startup with real funding & clear product vision

- Competitive salary: PHP 80,000 – 120,000/month depending on experience

- Access to premium AI tools (Claude Pro, Cursor, etc.)

- Long-term growth into a senior/co-lead role as the product scales



WORKING HOURS:

- Full-time, 40 hours/week

- Filipino daylight hours

- Immediate start



We are not hiring to fill a seat. We are building a core team.



HOW TO APPLY, SEND:

- Your resume or portfolio

- A link to any project, repo, or app you've built



If you're serious about building something new with AI — we'd love to hear from you.

title: E-Commerce Customer Service Representative
description:
Be the Reason Someone’s Day Gets Better – WFH CSR Role (PH-Based Only)



From answering questions to solving concerns, your support makes a real impact. Start a fulfilling work-from-home career where empathy and excellence go hand in hand—no commute, no traffic, just more time for what matters.

• Provide customer support via phone, chat, and

• Turn challenges into opportunities to create a great customer experience

• Stay up to date on products, resources, and team guidelines



What We Are Looking For

• 1+ year of customer service experience

• Good English communication skills; neutral or US accent preferred

• Familiarity with eCommerce platforms like Amazon or Shopify

• Experience with tools such as Zendesk, Zoho, or RingCentral is a plus

• Reliable internet and a quiet home workspace

• Backup device and power source

• Fully remote work with no commute

title: E-Commerce Customer Support Specialist
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a reliable customer-focused E-Commerce Customer Support Specialist to join our team. In this role, you will handle customer inquiries through Amazon messages and FreshDesk
s, ensuring timely and professional responses. You will help resolve issues, provide accurate information, and maintain high customer satisfaction while supporting our Amazon store operations.





Compensation & Work Arrangement

- Starting salary: $500 USD per month 

- Full-time position: 40 hours per week

- 8 hours per day, 5 days per week

- 20 days paid time off and 10 days of sick leave

- Work from home, fully remote





Candidate Profile

The ideal candidate has experience supporting Amazon customers and managing
-based inquiries using tools like FreshDesk. Clear and professional communication, strong attention to detail, and the ability to quickly understand and resolve customer issues are essential. This role requires someone who is organized, reliable, and able to handle multiple tasks while consistently delivering high-quality support.





Responsibilities

- Respond to Amazon customer messages and FreshDesk
s promptly and professionally

- Handle inquiries related to orders, shipping, returns, refunds, and product questions

- Track and manage order fulfillment and logistics using internal logistics software (training provided)

- Use Shopify to access customer order information and support order-related inquiries

- Maintain internal records, track tasks, and follow-ups using ClickUp

- Resolve customer complaints while following Amazon policies and internal guidelines

- Collaborate with internal teams for order issues, replacements, or escalations

- Stay updated on Amazon policies, seller guidelines, and product knowledge

- Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements to processes or tools

- Maintain a professional tone to support positive seller feedback and ratings





Requirements

- Experience in Amazon customer support or Seller Central operations

- Proficient in handling
 support using FreshDesk, Zendesk, or similar platforms

- Familiarity with Shopify for order review and customer support inquiries

- Excellent written communication skills with attention to detail

- Ability to handle refunds, returns, and customer complaints effectively

- Strong problem-solving and critical-thinking skills

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks efficiently

- Familiarity with Amazon policies, metrics, and best practices





Tools & Platforms

- Amazon Seller Central

- FreshDesk CRM

- Shopify

- Flowspace

- ClickUp

- Slack

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets)



To submit your application, kindly complete the form below: 


 



Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you!

title: Freelance Graphic Designer – Original Custom Product Designs & Mockups
description:
We are launching/growing an e-commerce store. We need a talented graphic designer to create completely original designs and high-quality product mockups. We have reference websites you can look at but want to make each product image my own design. Don't want to get copyrighted.



Important: All work must be 100% original. You may not copy, trace, heavily reference, or closely imitate existing designs from other websites or stores. We want fresh, unique concepts that build our own brand identity.



Key Responsibilities



- Create original graphic designs for personalized products 

- Design variations for different occasions and product types while keeping a cohesive brand style.

- Produce realistic product mockups (using tools like Photoshop smart objects, Placeit, or similar) showing how designs look on actual items (tumblers, shirts, ornaments, etc.).

- Suggest creative ideas to differentiate our products and make them more appealing.

title: Virtual Assistant for Auto Detailing Business – Full-Time, Long-Term Role
description:
We’re looking for someone with proven experience in handling inbound sales calls to join our team. If you don’t have this experience, please do not apply.



We’re looking for a reliable, proactive, self-motivated, and self-educated Virtual Assistant to join our growing mobile auto detailing business team. This is a long-term, full-time role for someone who can manage day-to-day operations, handle all client communication, and help us deliver a seamless, professional experience to every customer. You've got to learn many different services and processes day to day, and report/educate the owner.



What You'll Do:

Respond to leads and customers through calls, texts, DMs, and
s

Manage communication from
, Instagram, website, Google Ads, and phone

Use our CRM to organize and follow up with leads, schedule appointments, and track bookings

Post daily to our social media accounts (Meta Business Suite)

Send review requests and follow-ups to clients

Handle basic admin tasks and keep our daily operations running smoothly



What We’re Looking For:

Excellent spoken and written English.

Confident communicator — you’ll be speaking to clients on our behalf

Highly organized and dependable

Self-motivated and able to work independently

Comfortable managing conversations across multiple platforms



Bonus:

Experience with car detailing. Sales experience is a huge bonus



Important:

This role requires managing 20–30 calls per day, along with an even greater volume of messages. You’ll often be working in fast-paced, high-pressure situations where you’ll need to quickly prioritize calls, texts, and estimates over other tasks. Every inquiry should receive an immediate response. While handling conversations, you’ll follow a clear structure: greet the customer, introduce yourself, listen carefully to understand their needs, and then provide the most accurate estimate possible. Our approach is never about pushing the highest-priced service — it’s about identifying the customer’s problem and recommending the best solution, even if that means suggesting a more affordable option.



A salary increase will be discussed after successfully passing the trial period.





Schedule:

You’ll need to be available 8–10 hours per day between 8 AM and 8 PM EST (New York time) at least 2-3 days a week.



Tools We Use:

Meta Business Suite 
 & Instagram)

OpenPhone for Texts & calls


 for website leads

GoHighLevel CRM for managing clients



If you're detail-oriented, professional, and ready to learn new skills and to take ownership of the communication and day-to-day tasks, we’d love to hear from you!



Any applications will be rejected if you do not submit them via the form below.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Position Overview



Shaker Painting Inc. is seeking a motivated and results-driven Sales Development Representative (SDR) to support our growing sales team. The SDR plays a critical role in generating new business opportunities by identifying, contacting, and qualifying potential customers. This role is the first point of contact for prospects and is essential to building a strong sales pipeline.



Key Responsibilities

• Conduct outbound prospecting through calls,
s, and social media to generate new leads 

• Perform lead mining and build targeted prospect lists 

• Qualify inbound and outbound leads to determine fit and readiness for sales engagement 

• Schedule appointments and meetings for Account Executives or Sales Managers 

• Maintain accurate records of interactions and activities in CRM systems (GHL) 

• Follow up consistently with prospects to nurture relationships and move them through the sales funnel 

• Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to improve lead generation strategies 

• Meet or exceed daily, weekly, and monthly activity and performance targets 

• Research potential clients and identify decision-makers within target companies 

• Provide feedback to improve messaging, targeting, and sales processes 



Qualifications

• Previous experience in sales, customer service, or a related field preferred 

• Experience with: 

o GoHighLevel (GHL) 

o Lead mining and list building 

o 
 (lead generation and prospecting) 

o Clay.ai (data enrichment and automation) 

• Strong communication and interpersonal skills (written and verbal) 

• Ability to handle rejection and remain persistent and positive 

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail 

• Comfortable using CRM tools and sales engagement platforms 

• Self-motivated with a strong desire to learn and grow in sales 

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team 



Key Competencies

• Lead generation and prospecting 

• Communication and persuasion 

• Time management and organization 

• Problem-solving and adaptability 

• Goal-oriented mindset 



Performance Metrics

• Number of outbound calls/emails per day 

• Qualified leads generated 

• Meetings booked 

• Conversion rates from lead to opportunity 



Why Join Shaker Painting Inc.?

• Opportunity to grow within a fast-paced and supportive sales environment 

• Training and development to advance your sales career 

• Competitive compensation and performance incentives 

• Collaborative team culture

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.

title: Customer Success Coordinator
description:
Role Overview

The Customer Support & Operations Coordinator is responsible for supporting our customers and ensuring their orders are processed accurately and efficiently.

The role focuses primarily on customer communication, order administration, and operational reporting, ensuring smooth coordination between customers, production, and logistics.



Administrative systems such as Square, Restoke, and internal spreadsheets are used as tools to maintain accurate information and support daily operations.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Communication (Primary Focus)

• Respond to customer enquiries via
, phone, and messaging platforms.

• Provide information about products, availability, and delivery schedules.

• Assist customers with placing or updating orders.

• Resolve customer issues professionally and escalate when required.

• Maintain a high level of customer service and communication.



Order Administration

• Enter and manage customer orders in the ordering system.

• Ensure order details, delivery dates, and product quantities are accurate.

• Monitor order changes and communicate updates internally.

• Maintain accurate customer records and order history.



Production Reporting

• Prepare and issue daily production reports based on confirmed customer orders.

• Ensure production teams receive accurate information regarding order quantities.

• Update operational spreadsheets and reports.

• Assist with printing pick slips and order documentation.



System & Data Entry Support (Secondary Focus)

• Update product information in systems such as Square and Restoke when required.

• Maintain accurate data in internal spreadsheets and operational tools.

• Assist with system setups for new products or operational updates.



Marketing & Admin Support



• Assist with EDM 
 marketing) preparation and formatting.

• Update customer contact lists and mailing databases.

• Provide general administrative support to the operations team.

NOTE: This role will become a full time role after a few months

Assign tasks to workers, coordinate them, and ensure completion of work

Provide a wide variety of administrative assistance to managers, especially in the areas of managing work orders and tenant communication.

Handle miscellaneous maintenance tasks

Expected to perform other duties as assigned or as deemed necessary.





PROPERTY MAINTENANCE COORDINATOR SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS:



Stays organized in businesses with robust PM schedules and continuous work requests

Communicates clearly and often with contractors, tenants, maintenance staff, and executives

Adheres to budget requirements in making purchasing decisions

Thinks ahead about tasks that must be completed next to provide exceptional administrative support

Excellent English verbal and written communication

Strategic thinker

Writing and documentation skills

Must be able to prioritize work

Courteous, friendly, and RELIABLE

Organized and has great attention to detail and quality assurance

Ability to build trust

Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities

Phone communication skills

Other skills as required

title: Content & Operations Manager (YouTube + Travel Brand Growth)
description:
Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term Opportunity



About the Company

iTravel for Culture is a growing travel documentary brand and YouTube channel hosted by Gibbs—a business builder turned cultural storyteller.



The brand explores culture through everyday people—food, music, traditions, and communities—told with a cinematic, grounded style inspired by Anthony Bourdain.



What started as a YouTube channel is now expanding into a curated tourism company, offering real-world travel experiences based on the stories we tell.



***We are a few hundred subscribers away from monetization.

*** YouTube is our primary growth engine.

***This role will directly impact how fast we grow.



***Read This First (Important)

This is NOT a basic virtual assistant role.



If you are someone who:



Waits for instructions



Needs step-by-step guidance



Submits work with frequent errors



***This role will not work for you.



We are looking for someone who:



Thinks independently



Anticipates needs



Takes ownership of outcomes



Executes at a high level without constant supervision



The Role

You will act as a Content & Operations Manager—supporting the growth of the YouTube channel while helping build the tourism side of the business.



You will work directly with Gibbs (the host) and help manage the day-to-day execution of content and platforms.



*** You will also communicate and respond on platforms as if you are Gibbs, maintaining brand voice and tone.



Key Responsibilities

1. YouTube Management (Primary Focus)

Upload and fully optimize videos (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails)



Use tools like VidIQ to improve SEO and reach



Ensure every video is positioned for maximum CTR and watch time



Track performance and suggest improvements



Help move the channel to and beyond monetization



***You must understand YouTube strategy—not just uploading.



2. Social Media Management

Manage and post across:



Instagram






TikTok



Repurpose YouTube content for short-form platforms



Write captions and respond to comments/messages in Gibbs’ voice



Maintain consistent brand tone across all platforms



3. Thumbnail Creation & Visual Content

Design high-CTR YouTube thumbnails



Create supporting graphics for social and promotions



Maintain consistent brand look and feel



*** This role replaces a previous graphic designer—you must be capable here.



4. Website & Content Uploads

Upload videos and content to the website



Publish:



Travel guides



Experience pages



Blog/cultural content



Ensure formatting, accuracy, and quality



5. CRM & Marketing Support

Use Go High Level (GHL) for:



Lead tracking



Basic automation support



Contact organization



Support promotions and audience engagement workflows



6. Organization & Operations

Maintain clean file systems and content organization



Coordinate assets (videos, thumbnails, captions, etc.)



Ensure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes



7. Strategic Thinking

Identify what needs to be done without being told



Suggest improvements to content, systems, and growth strategy



Help connect YouTube growth to the tourism business



Required Skills

Strong written English (natural, conversational, culturally aware)



YouTube SEO + optimization knowledge



Social media management experience



Graphic design skills (thumbnails + branding)



Strong attention to detail (very important)



Ability to think critically and work independently



Required Tools / Applications

You must already have experience using:



Go High Level (GHL)



VidIQ



Graphic Design Software (Photoshop, Canva, or equivalent)



Key Skill Areas

Social Media Management



Website Content Management



Virtual File Organization



Branding & Visual Consistency



Promotions & Audience Engagement



Thumbnail Creation (High CTR Focus)



Work Structure

Part-time role



~16 hours per week (~64 hours per month)



Flexible schedule based on workload



Paid monthly in advance



Fully remote



***This role will grow as the company grows.



Who This Role Is For

You will do well if you:



Take initiative without being told



Catch mistakes before submitting work



Care about quality and performance



Are curious about travel, culture, and storytelling



Want to grow with a brand long-term



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

We are intentionally filtering for serious candidates.



Step 1: Written Response

Answer the following:



Why are you a strong fit for this role?



What would you do to help a YouTube channel reach monetization faster?



What makes a thumbnail high CTR? (Be specific)



Step 2: Proof of Work

Provide:



2–3 thumbnails you created



1 example of a YouTube video you optimized (if available)



Any social media accounts you have managed



Step 3: Attention Test

Include this line at the top of your application:



“I think like an owner, not an assistant.”



*** Applications without this line will not be reviewed.



Final Note

This role requires:



Ownership



Precision



Initiative



If you are the type of person who sees what needs to be done and handles it—this is a long-term opportunity.



If not, this is not the right fit.

title: Amazon Sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team!Seeking one part time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as part time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.

Low sales rank

title: Engagement Strategist (Social Media Assistant)
description:
About the Role:



We’re hiring an Engagement Strategist to act as the voice and connector for the personal brands we manage.

This role is not about posting content.

It’s about starting conversations.

You will engage on behalf of our clients inside comments, replies, and DMs to build relationships, create familiarity, and naturally guide conversations toward a next step when appropriate.



Core Responsibilities:



Social Media Engagement & Relationship Building

– Engage on other people’s content to spark natural conversations

– Respond to comments, replies, and DMs in each client’s brand voice

– Ask thoughtful follow-up questions to keep conversations moving

– Recognize when to transition a conversation toward connection or booking

– Maintain professionalism, warmth, and clarity in all written communication



Story & Light Content Support

– Assist with Instagram Stories (text, polls, replies, short clips)

– Repurpose approved content across platforms when needed



Tracking & Admin

– Track daily engagement activity (comments, DMs, conversations started)

– Monitor response quality and engagement patterns

– Assist with light content scrubbing for short video clips



Required Skills & Traits

– Excellent written English (grammar, tone, vocabulary, clarity are non-negotiable)

– Strong conversational instincts and emotional intelligence

– Familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn (comments, DMs, Stories, basic analytics)

– Ability to sound human and brand-aligned, never scripted or robotic

– Organized, self-directed, and comfortable with feedback



Working Hours:

This role has set engagement windows:

– 4:00am–7:00am PST

– 3:00pm–6:00pm PST

– Monday through Thursday minimum

Occasional brief admin tasks may occur outside these windows.



To Apply:

Step 1: Loom Video (Required)

Please record a 5–7 minute Loom answering the prompts below. We’re looking for how you think, speak, and write, not perfection.

1. Instagram Experience

How do you personally use Instagram day to day, and what features do you use most (comments, DMs, Stories, etc.)?

2. Starting Conversations

If you were networking on behalf of a client, how would you leave comments that feel natural and start real conversations?

3. Guiding Toward a Next Step

How would you naturally move a conversation from casual engagement to a potential call or appointment without sounding salesy?

4. Tone & Voice

How do you adjust your language when speaking on behalf of someone else’s brand?



Step 2: Written Questions (After Loom Review)

If your Loom is a fit, we’ll ask you to answer the questions below:

Q1: On a scale of 1–10, how confident are you using Instagram’s tools (comments, DMs, Stories, analytics)? Why?

Q2: Share an example of an online interaction that turned into a real relationship, opportunity, or next step.

Q3: How do you d
 when to keep a conversation casual versus when to guide it toward a next step?

Q4: How do you ensure your written English stays clear, professional, and aligned with someone else’s voice?

Q5: Are you open to a short paid test project (1 hour or less) to demonstrate engagement and comment strategy?



Step 3: Test Project

Selected candidates will receive a short paid engagement exercise using real examples so we can evaluate comment quality, DM tone, conversation flow, and judgment.

title: USA EST SALES BOOKING AGENT 4/6/26
description:
USD $500 starting salary per month plus commission of 1% of the the complete closing of the sale (average sale is $2000), paid on the 1st and 15th of every month(PST). We book an average of 10-20 shows per month.

If I need to close the sale completely, then you will get .5% commission for that lead. Commisions will be paid after the event takes place during that scheduled pay period.



PLEASE REVIEW MY MALE DANCE TOURING BUSINESS, 
 and if this is of interest PLEASE ANSWER MY 4 QUESTIONS below.



You MUST ANSWER the 4 questions in order to be considered.



QUESTION 1: WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?

We are looking for people that have an english speaking capability on a scale of 1-10.

YOU MUST BE BETWEEN 9-10.

AGAIN, WHAT IS YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING CAPABILITY?



QUESTION 2: DID YOU REVIEW THE WEBSITE ABOVE? You will be asked questions about our business.



Initial training/onboarding period (first 2 weeks):

To help you ease into the role and allow us to assess how we work together, we’ll start you at half the regular hours as follows:



Tuesday to Saturday: 3:00 AM – 7:00 AM PHT

Corresponding to 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM EST (Mon–Fri)

Sunday: 6:00 AM – 9:00 AM PHT

Corresponding to 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST (Sat)



After the 2-week period, assuming everything goes well, you’ll transition to the full-time schedule outlined below.



Full-time schedule (after the initial period):

Tuesday to Saturday: 11:00 PM – 7:00 AM PHT

Sunday: 3:00 AM – 9:00 AM PHT



This corresponds to the following times in US Eastern Standard Time (EST):

Monday to Friday: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST

Saturday: 3:00 PM – 9:00 PM EST



QUESTION 3: Are you good with these hours?



I am looking for a long term, full time booking agent that will book our shows at bars, nightclubs and casinos in different states. You will gather leads by google searching for bars and nightclubs



Our workflow relies heavily on Google Workspace tools:

Google Sheets is used daily as a shared tracker for gathering and managing leads (bars/nightclubs we’re researching/touring), including columns for names, addresses, contacts, notes, status, etc.

We also use Google Docs for contracts, Google Drive for organizing and searching files, and Google Calendar for scheduling.

No advanced expertise is required—just solid familiarity so you can jump in quickly and keep things organized.



QUESTION 4: Do you have solid familiarity with Google Workspace tools?



We will train you with our sales script.

Must have a laptop or desktop AND preferably an IPHONE with Icloud calendar. BUT an android will do. Also MUST have a headset WITH NOISE CANCELLATION.



GOOD LUCK!

title: Insurance Verification - Psychiatry
description:
Vijapura Psychiatry is a boutique integrative psychiatry practice based in Florida. We are looking for a detail-oriented, proactive Insurance Verification Specialist to join our remote operations team. This role is central to our revenue cycle — you will ensure every patient's benefits are accurately verified before appointments, with a focus on psychiatric and behavioral health services.



About the Role

Verify insurance eligibility and benefits for new and returning psychiatric patients prior to scheduled appointments

Check mental health/behavioral health-specific benefits: deductible, out-of-pocket, copay/coinsurance, authorization requirements, in-network vs. out-of-network status

Log verification data accurately into PracticeQ (our EMR) using standardized workflows

Contact insurance companies via payer portals and phone to obtain and confirm benefit details

Flag authorization requirements and coordinate with front desk and clinical staff as needed

Maintain organized records and communicate benefit summaries to the patient-facing team

Follow up on pending verifications and resolve discrepancies proactively

Assist with re-verification for recurring patients, plan changes, and annual deductible resets



Required Qualifications Required

Minimum 12 months of insurance verification experience specifically in a psychiatry or behavioral health setting

Demonstrated experience working with multiple commercial insurance carriers (e.g., Aetna, Cigna, UnitedHealth/Optum, Florida Blue, BCBS, Medicare Advantage)

Proficient in navigating insurance payer portals for eligibility and benefit checks (Availity, payer-specific portals)

Strong understanding of mental health benefit structures: Telehealth coverage differences

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Highly organized, self-directed, and reliable in a remote environment

Ability to work during U.S. Eastern Time Zone business hours



Preferred Qualifications Preferred

Experience using PracticeQ (EHR/practice management system) for entering and tracking verification data

Familiarity with Spruce Health or similar HIPAA-compliant messaging platforms

Prior experience with telehealth billing and virtual visit insurance requirements

Background working with Florida-based payers 

Experience in a small or boutique practice environment where you wore multiple hats



What We Offer

Stable, long-term remote position with a growing psychiatry practice

Collaborative, respectful team culture — we treat our virtual staff as true tea
mbers

Clear workflows and onboarding support

Opportunities to grow as our practice expands



How to Apply

Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include the following in your application message:



A brief overview of your insurance verification experience, specifically in behavioral health or psychiatry

The insurance carriers and payer portals you have worked with

Whether you have used PracticeQ, and if so, in what capacity

Your availability and time zone

title: Video Editor - Social Media Marketing (2 Positions Available)
description:
Video Editor - Social Media Marketing (2 Positions)-

Full-Time Virtual Positions | Philippines-Based



Position Overview -

Position Title Video Editor for Social Media Marketing

Number of Openings Two (2) positions currently open

Employment Type Full-Time, Remote (Philippines)

Reports To Social Media Manager & Owners Scott and Mallory Edgett

Work Schedule Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST

Compensation Range Competitive based on experience (discuss with hiring manager)

Primary Tools CapCut, Opus Clip, DaVinci Resolve, Descript, HeyGen, Synthesia, Veo3

3 Firms Assigned Editors 1&2: The Edgett Law Firm (Texas Criminal & Juvenile) + Edgett Hawk Injury Law (Texas Personal Injury) + Florida CAIL (Florida Personal Injury)



ROLE SUMMARY-

We are hiring two video editors to support a high-volume short-form and long-form content operation across three separate law firms all owned by the same Attorney, Scott Edgett. The raw material for this role is daily video footage recorded by our Owners Scott & Mallory Edgett and Attorneys Michael Hawk and Amanda White. Your job is to transform that footage into polished, platform-ready content that is consistently branded, emotionally compelling, and built to perform across
, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok.



This is a production-focused role with daily output expectations. You are expected to work efficiently, communicate proactively, and take creative initiative within the brand guidelines provided. The Social Media Manager will assign work, and the quality bar is set high from day one.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES-

Video Production and Editing:

• Edit raw attorney video footage into short-form clips (30 to 90 seconds) optimized for Reels, Shorts, and TikTok.

• Use Opus Clip or manual clipping techniques to identify the strongest segments of raw footage.

• Apply auto-captions via CapCut and manually verify accuracy before delivery.

• Add firm-specific branded intros, outros, lower-thirds, and overlays to every video.

• Select and apply appropriate royalty-free background music or sound effects where appropriate.

• Apply color correction and basic audio cleanup to ensure all content looks and sounds professional.

• Create thumbnails, text overlays, carousel graphics, quote cards, brand consistency across all three law firms. 

• Assist Social Media Marketing Manager with writing captions, hooks, video titles, hashtag packages, video descriptions. 

• Assist if needed with uploading into social media scheduler.



Platform Formatting and Delivery:

• Export videos in platform-specific formats: 9:16 vertical for Reels, Shorts, and TikTok; 16:9 or 1:1 for
 where applicable.

• Maintain maximum file quality while keeping file sizes compatible with direct upload requirements.

• Deliver completed edits through the shared content tracker with proper file naming conventions.

• After 90 days, produce a minimum of 8 to 12 completed, approved short-form videos per day per editor, in final form ready to be published by other member of social media marketing team.



Collaboration and Communication:

• Review the content brief and topic notes provided by the Social Media Manager before beginning any edit.

• Submit completed edits for review by the designated deadline in the daily workflow.

• Respond to revision notes promptly and with a professional, solutions-oriented attitude.

• Flag any footage quality issues (poor lighting, audio problems) to the Social Media Manager immediately.

• Contribute to template development and creative improvements on a monthly basis.



AI Tool Utilization:

• Use Opus Clip to automate initial clip selection and score segments for engagement potential.

• Leverage HeyGen, Veo 3, Synthesia, etc. for AI avatar or voiceover applications where approved by management.

• Apply CapCut auto-caption tools and review for 100?curacy before final delivery.

• Stay current with AI editing tool updates and report useful new features to the Social Media Manager.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS-

• Minimum 2 years of professional video editing experience, ideally for social media or digital marketing for US based business or law firm. 

• Proficiency in CapCut is required; experience with DaVinci Resolve and Descript is strongly preferred.

• Experience with Opus Clip or similar AI clipping tools.

• Strong understanding of short-form video best practices, hooks, pacing, and caption styling.

• Fluency in written English sufficient to verify caption accuracy and read content briefs.

• Ability to maintain consistent output volume without sacrificing quality.

• Self-motivated with strong attention to detail and a high standard for finished work.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS-

• Experience editing legal, medical, or professional services content for a U.S. audience.

• Familiarity with YouTube long-form production and chapter structuring.

• Experience editing podcast video content.

• Portfolio demonstrating any law firm, B2C professional services, or personal injury or criminal defense content.



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIS)-

KPI Metric: 

Month 1 Target 

Month 3 Target 

Measurement



KPI Metric:         Completed videos submitted per day (per editor)

Month 1 Target 4 to 6 videos

Month 3 Target 8 to 12 videos

Measurement        Content Daily Tracker



First-pass approval rate (no revisions needed) 

Month 1  75% 

Month 3  90% 

Revision log in tracker



Revision turnaround time

Month 1   Within 2 hours of notes 

Month 3   Within 1 hour of notes 

Notion task timestamps



Caption accuracy rate 

Month 1     98%+ 

Month 3     99%+ 

Manager quality review



Branding error rate (wrong firm assets) 

Zero tolerance 

Manager quality review



File delivery on time (by 2:30 PM CST) 

Month 1     95% of days 

Month 3     98% of days 

Tracker submission timestamps



-------------------------  



HOW TO APPLY: 

Please
 your updated resume, cover letter with salary requirements, and 5 examples of your social media video editing work completed within the last year. Please
 all to 
 



Thank you for applying and we look forward to working with you and your colleagues on our law firm social media marketing team! 



Scott E. Edgett

title: 3D House Modeler — SketchUp
description:
ORO Design is a US-based landscape design studio producing high-end 3D renderings, 2D site plans, and video walkthroughs for outdoor living contractors nationwide. We operate on a membership model, deliver 40+ projects per month, and we are growing the team behind that output.

We are hiring a 3D House Modeler to build accurate SketchUp models of existing homes and site conditions using approved 2D base plans and client site photos. Your work feeds directly into our 3D production pipeline — the 3D Designers pick up where you leave off and begin landscape and hardscape design immediately.

This is a full-time remote position. You will work within a structured daily workflow, report to our Design Director, and deliver clean, organized SketchUp files that are immediately usable by the production team.

This role also has room to grow. The House Modeler works closely with our 3D production team and has direct exposure to how professional landscape rendering is done at a high level. For someone serious about their craft, this is a starting point, not a stopping point.

What You Will Do

— Build accurate SketchUp house shell models from 2D base plans and site photos

— Model existing site conditions including fencing, site boundary, and driveway

— Apply existing house textures using SketchUp's built-in material library

— Include existing utilities and exterior fixtures visible in site photos

— Deliver clean, organized SketchUp files with proper tag/layer structure

— Complete a QA checklist before every delivery

— Deliver standard models within 1 business day; complex models within 2

What We Require

— Hands-on SketchUp experience modeling residential or architectural structures

— Ability to read a 2D floor plan and translate it accurately into 3D geometry

— Ability to interpret site photos for roof pitch, story height, and architectural features

— Comfortable working in feet and inches

— Strong file organization — clean grouping, tag/layer structure, no loose geometry

— Clear written English communication

— Landscape or outdoor living design experience is a strong plus

What We Offer

— $
/month — consistent, full-time contractor work

— Stable, high-volume pipeline — 40+ projects per month and growing

— Direct exposure to a professional 3D rendering production environment

— A culture that values growth — we want people building toward something, not just filling a seat

How to Apply

 your resume and 2–3 SketchUp work samples (screenshots or exported images, PDF or image format) to 
 with the subject line: House Modeler Application — [Your Name]. Candidates who do not include SketchUp samples will not be considered. Qualified applicants will receive a written application as the next step.

 templates, ensuring mobile responsiveness, image rendering, layout accuracy, and proper link functionality

 messaging

Over time, proactively identify testing opportunities, optimization ideas, and performance hypotheses to improve lifecycle marketing results

title: Turn Telegram Contacts into $5,000/Month: DeFi Protocol Needs BD Now
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.



Preferred Backgrounds  

Candidates with prior experience in the following sectors will be given priority consideration:



Government or public administration



Law firms or legal advisory institutions



Media or strategic communications organizations



Think tanks or research institutions



Consulting or public relations firms



Non-governmental or international organizations



Compensation and Benefits  

We offer competitive compensation packages and flexible work arrangements tailored to global professionals.



Application  

For inquiries or application submission, please contact us at:





Or visit our website:

title: Travel Insurance Assistant / Specialist
description:
Travel Insurance Assistant / Specialist 



(Full-Time, Remote, EST) 



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING 



$7/Hour Starting Rate | 40 Hours | Full-Time 



Opportunity for increases based on performance 



We are ONLY reviewing applications that meet the following criteria: 



Full-time remote role focused on: 



Travel insurance coordination and related tasks — drafting travel insurance for review, calling Viking/speaking directly with guests, and maintaining HubSpot CRM and trackers. 



DO NOT APPLY if: 



-You do not have excellent english with very little accent--due to our clientele they are all seniors/retirees who have difficulty understanding. 



-You do not have hands-on experience in travel insurance. (General hospitality — bartending, waiting tables, retail — does not qualify and will be archived upon arrival.



-You submit template applications or generic resumes, especially AI. Please just send me an intro to you short and sweet than reading AI, (we can always tell!)



-You're seeking part-time, short-term, or freelance work. 



-You cannot commit to U.S. Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm EST). 



DO APPLY if: 



-You have worked in travel insurance (ocean or river) OR have strong experience managing travel insurance and bookings with exceptional attention to detail. 



-You can send a video introduction.



-You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a mission-driven, close-knit team that invests in your growth. 



-You are professional, detail-oriented, and genuinely passionate about creating excellent travel experiences. 



-You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear. 



About Us 



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises — especially Viking — and offer white-glove support for discerning clients. 



We're warm, organized, and passionate about creating unforgettable cruise experiences. Our team is small, collaborative, and committed to doing things right. 



We have documented processes (SOPs) for most tasks — you won't be guessing. You'll be trained and supported, not thrown into the deep end. 



We're looking for a talented travel insurance assistant to join us full-time. 



Who We're Looking For 



Must-Have: 



Experience as a virtual assistant 



Excellent written English with a warm, polished, professional tone 



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks remotely 



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability 



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace 



Bonus Points: 



Experience with TripMate, Allianz, or Travel Insured



Any experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising 



HubSpot CRM experience (or fast learner with CRMs) 



Familiarity with booking portals, invoices, or guest information systems 



Strong time management and comfort with documented SOPs 



Your Role 



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for: 



Drafting client
s 



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers — keeping booking statuses, contact details, and notes current 



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information, request itineraries, or resolve booking questions 



Supporting the insurance department with administrative tasks 



So expectations are clear: 



You'll work directly with our staff as internal support — not as an independent agent. 



Guest/client
s are drafts for review. 



You'll have autonomy for routine messages, with clear guidance on when to escalate (pricing, payments, sensitive situations). 



Some responses require an empathetic, reassuring tone; others follow standard templates. 



You'll be trained on our systems (HubSpot, booking trackers, Outlook) and supported by an experienced team invested in your success. 



Schedule 



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (this is evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you) 



Hours may vary based on business needs. 



Saturday coverage may be required later via rotation, but only once you are well trained. 



How to Apply 



*****Applications that don't follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We use this to assess attention to detail and genuine interest, and to weed out the ones who aren't diligent enough, as attention to detail in this role is crucial.*****



Step 1: 



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including the phrase: "Meghan's #1" 



Step 2: 



Include a short video introduction that: 



Explains your relevant experience as an insurance virtual assistant (with open access to the link to be shared)



Shares why you're passionate about travel support 



Describes what excites you about working with a team like ours 



Step 3: 



Attach your CV or resume (if using Google Drive, ensure access is granted) 





We're excited to meet someone who cares about excellent travel service and wants to make a difference. 



If that's you — smooth sailing ahead.

title: Social Media Publisher and Engagement Specialist
description:
Publisher and Engagement Specialist

*Full-Time Virtual Position | Philippines-Based



Position Overview-

Position Title Social Media Publisher & Engagement Specialist

Employment Type Full-Time, Remote (Philippines)

Reports To Social Media Manager and Law Firm Owners Scott & Mallory Edgett

Work Schedule Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST (with monitoring windows into evening)

Compensation Range Competitive based on experience (discuss with hiring manager)

Platforms Managed
, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok

Primary Tool Metricool (scheduling and analytics)

3 Firms Supported The Edgett Law Firm | Edgett Hawk Injury Law | Florida CAIL



ROLE SUMMARY-

The Publisher and Engagement Specialist is responsible for the final mile of our social media content operation. Once videos have been thought of, created, edited and approved, this person ensures they reach our audiences at the right time, with the right captions, on the right platforms. Beyond publishing, this role owns the comment section. You are the human presence behind our firm accounts, responding to questions, building community, and flagging any legal or sensitive inquiries that need to be escalated.



This role requires exceptional written English communication, sound judgment about what constitutes a legal question versus a general comment, and a commitment to protecting the professional reputation of three law firms. You will not give legal advice in any capacity. You will represent the brand warmly, professionally, and responsibly.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES-

Content Publishing:

• Schedule all approved videos and posts through Metricool according to the weekly content calendar

• Ensure correct captions, hashtags, and metadata are applied to each post at scheduling time

• Verify that each post is assigned to the correct firm account and correct platform before scheduling

• Maintain a minimum 7-day advance scheduling buffer at all times

• Upload any content directly to platforms when direct publishing through Metricool is not available for a specific format

• Monitor posts immediately after publishing to confirm successful upload and correct display on each platform



Community Engagement:

• Monitor all firm social media accounts daily during business hours for comments, DMs, and mentions

• Respond to general, non-legal comments within 4 business hours using approved response templates

• Like and acknowledge positive testimonials, shares, and supportive comments to build community

• Identify and report any spam, inappropriate content, or trolling to the Social Media Manager for action

• Maintain a warm, professional, and approachable brand tone in all public-facing responses

Escalation and Legal Sensitivity:

• Never respond to any comment or DM that contains a specific legal question, request for legal advice, or description of a pending case

• Flag all potential client inquiry messages immediately to the Director of Marketing and the appropriate attorney of record

• Maintain a daily escalation log documenting all flagged messages, the platform, and the time of escalation

• Do not engage in any discussion of case outcomes, attorney fees, or legal strategy under any circumstance

• If a comment contains threatening or harassing language directed at the firm, document and escalate immediately



Scheduling Optimization:

• Use Metricool analytics to identify the optimal posting times for each platform and adjust the calendar accordingly

• Track and report which time slots generate the highest early engagement (first 30 minutes post-publication)

• Coordinate with the Social Media Manager when content volume changes require calendar adjustments



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS-

• Minimum 1 to 2 years of experience in social media publishing, community management, or digital marketing coordination with emphasis on social media engagement to establish branding and generating current and future clients for our three law firms. 

• Excellent written English communication skills with a professional, friendly tone.

• Proficiency with Metricool or a comparable scheduling platform (Buffer, Hootsuite, Sprout Social).

• Strong attention to detail, especially regarding account assignment and caption accuracy.

• Demonstrated ability to exercise good judgment about when to respond versus when to escalate.

• Familiarity with
, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok publishing workflows.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS-

• Experience managing social accounts for a U.S.-based law firm or professional services brand.

• Understanding of the boundaries between community engagement and legal advice.

• Familiarity with comment moderation and community guidelines enforcement.

• Experience using Notion or Google Sheets for tracking and reporting.



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIS)-

KPI Metric: 

Month 1 Target 

Month 3 Target 

Measurement



KPI Metric: Posts scheduled 7 days in advance 

Month 1 Target 100% of approved content 

Month 3 Target 100% of approved content 

Measurement        Metricool queue audit (weekly)



Scheduling error rate (wrong account/platform) 

Zero tolerance 

Manager review



Comment response time (general comments)-

Month 1   Within 4 business hours 

Month 3   Within 2 business hours 

Platform timestamp logs



Escalation log completion rate- 

100% of flagged messages logged 

Daily escalation tracker



Failed post recovery time- 

Month 1  Resolved within 1 business hour 

Month 3  Resolved within 30 minutes 

I
 log



7-day buffer compliance (all firm accounts)- 

Every Friday by 3:00 PM CST

Weekly status report



Engagement response rate (general comments)- 

Month 1  90%+ responded to 

Month 3  95%+ responded to 

Monthly engagement audit



Escalation accuracy (correct vs. missed flags)-  

Zero missed legal inquiries 

Monthly manager audit

__________________________________________ 



HOW TO APPLY – 

Please
 your updated resume, cover letter with salary requirements, and 5 examples of social media accounts or specific postings you have published and/or engaged in over the last year.  Please
 directly to 



We are excited you are considering our law firm social media team!



Scott E. Edgett

title: Video Editor
description:
About Life Echo Media

Life Echo Media is a strategic video production company based in Madison, Wisconsin. We help brands tell their stories through high-impact video content, from short-form social media to polished brand films and advertising. We work with a range of clients across industries and pride ourselves on fast turnarounds, creative storytelling, and a collaborative remote team.



The Opportunity

We're growing and looking for a talented video editor based in the Philippines to join our remote production team. You'll work alongside our existing editor and collaborate directly with our Creative Director. This is a long-term freelance position with consistent weekly hours and room to grow as we scale.



What You'll Do

- Edit short-form social content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) for multiple clients

- Edit long-form brand videos, client testimonials, and video ads

- Create motion graphics, animated text, and simple animations to elevate video content

- Color correct and grade footage (Sony FX3 / A6400 footage, primarily S-Log)

- Sync and mix audio, including music selection, sound effects, and voiceover layering

- Organize and manage project files in a shared cloud workflow

- Collaborate async with the Creative Director and fellow editor, with some real-time overlap during US Central business hours

- Turn around edits quickly and respond to revision notes with a positive attitude



Requirements



- 2+ years of professional video editing experience with a strong portfolio or reel

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve

- Experience creating motion graphics (After Effects, Fusion, or similar)

- Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and social media trends

title: Ads Campaign Manager
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Join a fast-growing trade school brand that's making a real impact in the skilled trades industry!

Western Welding Academy is looking for an experienced Ads Campaign Manager to build, manage, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms. You'll work directly with our Marketing Director to drive student enrollment and brand awareness through high-performing ad campaigns. This is a full-time, long-term position for someone who can deliver real results — not just manage dashboards.



What You'll Do:

Build, Launch, manage, and optimize paid ad campaigns across Meta, Google, YouTube, TikTok, and Snapchat.

Build and test ad creatives, audiences, and funnels to drive student enrollment leads.

Monitor campaign performance daily and make data-driven adjustments to improve ROAS and cost per lead.

Manage ad budgets and provide clear, simple reporting on what's working and what's not.

Collaborate with our marketing team on campaign strategy, creative direction, and landing page optimization.

Stay current on platform updates, algorithm changes, and emerging ad strategies.



You're a Perfect Fit If You:

Have 3+ years of hands-on experience managing paid ad campaigns across Meta, Google, and at least one additional platform (YouTube, TikTok, or Snapchat).

Have a proven track record of driving leads or conversions — not just impressions and clicks.

Know how to set up tracking pixels, conversion events, and UTM parameters across platforms.

Are comfortable managing multiple campaigns simultaneously and meeting aggressive performance targets.

Can communicate results clearly in plain language — no fluff, no jargon.

Are comfortable working independently in a fully remote setup during U.S. Mountain Time business hours (7:00 AM – 5:00 PM MT).



Bonus Points If You Have:

Experience in the education, trade school, or vocational training space.

Google Analytics experience.

Experience with HubSpot or similar CRM platforms.

Video ad creation or editing skills.



Details:

Schedule: Full-time, 50 hours per week, Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Mountain Time.

Compensation: Starting at $300 USD/week, with potential to increase based on performance.

Reports to: Marketing Director



How to Apply:

Submit your resume and portfolio examples of past ad campaigns with results. You MUST also include a 2-minute video of yourself explaining why you'd be a great fit for this role, your experience with paid advertising, and the best results you've achieved for a client or employer. Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: Cruise & Guest Services Virtual Assistant / Specialist
description:
Cruise & Guest Services Virtual Assistant / Specialist 



(Full-Time, Remote, EST) 



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING 



$7/Hour Starting Rate | 40 Hours | Full-Time 



Opportunity for increases based on performance 



We are ONLY reviewing applications that meet the following criteria: 



Role Snapshot 



Full-time remote role focused on: 



Cruise booking coordination and related tasks — drafting client
s for review, calling Viking/partners (not guests), and maintaining HubSpot CRM and trackers. 



CEO and team support — administrative tasks across the booking lifecycle. 



Best fit if you're detail-driven, reliable, and want a long-term role with room to grow across departments. 



DO NOT APPLY if: 



You do not have hands-on experience in cruise guest services, itinerary management, or travel bookings. (General hospitality — bartending, waiting tables, retail — does not qualify. 



You submit template applications or generic resumes. 



You're seeking part-time, short-term, or freelance work. 



You cannot commit to U.S. Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm EST). 



DO APPLY if: 



You have worked in cruise guest services (ocean or river) OR have strong experience managing travel itineraries and bookings with exceptional attention to detail. 



You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a mission-driven, close-knit team that invests in your growth. 



You are professional, detail-oriented, and genuinely passionate about creating excellent travel experiences. 



You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear. 



About Us 



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises — especially Viking — and offer white-glove support for discerning clients. 



We're warm, organized, and passionate about creating unforgettable cruise experiences. Our team is small, collaborative, and committed to doing things right. 



We have documented processes (SOPs) for most tasks — you won't be guessing. You'll be trained and supported, not thrown into the deep end. 



We're looking for a talented Virtual Assistant to join us full-time. 



Who We're Looking For 



Must-Have: 



Experience in cruise guest services, travel bookings, or itinerary management (Executive assistant experience with complex travel coordination may also qualify) 



Excellent written English with a warm, polished, professional tone 



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks remotely 



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability 



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace 



Bonus Points: 



Experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising 



Familiarity with the MyViking Travel Advisor Portal (MVJ) 



HubSpot CRM experience (or fast learner with CRMs) 



Familiarity with booking portals, invoices, or guest information systems 



Strong time management and comfort with documented SOPs 



Your Role 



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for: 



Drafting client
s (hold reminders, confirmation, follow-ups, courtesy responses, answer inquiries) 



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers — keeping booking statuses, contact details, and notes current 



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information, request itineraries, or resolve booking questions 



Supporting the CEO and team with high-level administrative tasks 



Managing booking coordination from inquiry through post-travel follow-up 



Cross-training across departments (Flights, Finance, Gifts, Marketing) as you grow in the role 



Why this matters: Cross-training keeps your work interesting, builds a broader skill set, and opens paths to specialize or take on more responsibility over time. 



Important Workflow Clarification 



So expectations are clear: 



You'll work directly with our staff as internal support — not as an independent agent. 



Guest/client
s are drafts for review. 



You'll have autonomy for routine messages, with clear guidance on when to escalate (pricing, payments, sensitive situations). 



Some responses require an empathetic, reassuring tone; others follow standard templates. 



You'll be trained on our systems (HubSpot, booking trackers, Outlook) and supported by an experienced team invested in your success. 



Schedule 



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (this is evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you) 



Hours may vary based on business needs. 



Saturday coverage may be required later via rotation, but only once you are well trained. 



How to Apply 



Applications that don't follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We use this to assess attention to detail and genuine interest. 



Step 1: 



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including the phrase: "Smooth Sailing" 



Step 2: 



Include a short cover letter or message that: 



Explains your relevant experience in cruise guest services or travel bookings 



Shares why you're passionate about river cruising or travel support 



Describes what excites you about working with a team like ours 



Includes your answers to these writing prompts (paste them in the message): 



Prompt A: 



"In 3–5 sentences, draft a polite
 reply to a client who says they don't want to move forward with the cruise currently on hold and would like to postpone to a later date." 



Prompt B (optional but encouraged): 



"In 2–3 sentences, draft a thank-you note to a client who just returned from their cruise and sent you photos." 



(Use a warm, conversational tone — the kind you'd use with a valued client you want to keep.) 



Step 3: 



Attach your CV or resume (if using Google Drive, ensure access is granted) 





We're excited to meet someone who cares about excellent travel service and wants to make a difference. 



If that's you — smooth sailing ahead.

title: NDIS Compliance and Audit Officer- NDIS experience required.
description:
NDIS Compliance & Auditing Officer (Full-Time)



Remote | Australian NDIS Provider | 40 Hours/Week | Long-Term Role



We are an Australian BPO hiring on behalf of our client- an Australian NDIS Registered Provider (NSW-based). We are seeking a highly experienced NDIS Compliance & Auditing Officer to support their quality, risk, and compliance functions.



This is a full-time remote role (40 hours per week) working closely with the Director to ensure the organisation remains fully compliant and audit-ready at all times. This full-time (FT) role offers the flexibility of working-from-home (WFH), a market leading salary package that includes paid leave + bonuses. Experience working with a market-leading NDIS provider and a supportive BPO that prioritizes both professionall and personal development and growth. 



This is NOT an entry-level role. We will only consider candidates with proven experience working with Australian NDIS providers in compliance and audit support roles.



*****Role Overview*****

 & Compliance Registers

 and reportable i

General Administration Support

 and phone

CareKernel
