Additional Requirements (Important)

Must be willing to undergo a background check

Must be open to reference checks with previous employers



How to Apply:



Reply with the following:

1. Updated Resume

2. Rate per Month in AUD

3. Availability: When can you start?

4. Confirmation of how long is your Splose experience

title: E-Commerce Customer Representative
description:
About Us:

We are an e-commerce business, in the medical compression wear industry, more specifically in the compression sock and hosiery products. We are based in New York, and have been in business for over 20 years.  We prefer someone with 1-2 year phone and
 customer service experience in ecommerce.



Description:

As an Ecommerce Customer Care Representative, you will be answering customer calls for phone orders and resolving customer inquiries via phone and
 to ensure the best experience possible! In addition, you will also make sure that the customers are getting the best value for all our products and services.



Essential Duties and Responsibilities

• Taking Phone Orders and Inputting the Orders in Magento

• Trained and be knowledgeable of our Product Line

• Resolving Customer Inquiries via phone, chat,
.

• Handle Cancellations, Returns,

• Call Back any Missed Call from Customers

• Issue refunds according to our refund policy

• Assisting in the tracking of customer packages

• Medicare Billing and Claims



Key Skills and Qualifications:

• Ability to demonstrate positive and energetic phone skills and excellent listening skills.

• Able to handle irate and demanding customers

• Prior E-Commerce Customer Service and Sales experience is a big plus

• Experience with Magento, Gladly, SellerCloud, Freshdesk is a plus

• Experience with Medical Billing and claims is a plus

• Proficient using computer programs such as Microsoft Office.

• Comfortable with outbound calls and speaking with customers.

• Computer proficiency such as Microsoft Office, data entry, and excellent customer service skills



Full Time 

- Preferably resides in Metro Manila or Bulacan area

- Computer Not Provided

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
I am looking for a skilled short form video editor who understands viral techniques for YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok. I am looking for someone capable of creating multiple high quality videos daily for my personal brand. 

You are provided with all of the content needed to perform daily tasks.

Looking for someone to build something great with. 

I want to work with someone to incentivize for well-performing content.

title: B-Roll Researcher
description:
B-Roll Researcher (Part-Time, Remote)





We produce documentary-style YouTube videos about investment banking and finance careers. We need someone to find and log the b-roll footage that makes our videos look and feel professional.



This is a focused, task-based role. No content writing, no social media, no editing — just researching and sourcing footage.



—



What You'll Do



- Watch YouTube videos, interviews, and documentaries featuring bankers, investors, finance firms, and Wall Street

- Pull the strongest clips that match what's happening in our video scripts

- Log each clip with a timestamp, source URL, and a short note on why it fits

- Deliver a clean, organized file for our editor to work from



Here's exactly what good b-roll sourcing looks like for our channel:





Read this before applying. Your application should show you understood it.



—



What We're Looking For



- Sharp eye for what looks good on screen and what matches a script's tone

- Comfortable spending time on YouTube and finding obscure footage fast

- Organized — you deliver clean, structured logs, not messy notes

- Interest in finance, investing, or business content is a big plus

- No prior experience required, but you must show us you get it



—



Compensation & Schedule



- $5–$8/hr depending on speed and quality

- 5–15 hours per week

- Fully remote and async — work on your own schedule



—



To Apply



 
 with:



1. 2–3 sentences on why this role fits you

2. Read the b-roll guide above and name one thing from it you found useful or interesting

3. Your availability and preferred hourly rate

title: MYOB Plugin Developer
description:
Project Overview

We are seeking an experienced developer to create a custom plugin/integration that extracts donation data from MYOB (Mind Your Own Business) accounting software and automatically generates personalized annual donation receipt
s to individual donors.



Core Requirements



Data Extraction

- Connect securely to MYOB AccountRight

- Query and extract donation transaction data for a specified range of dates

- Filter transactions by account codes designated for donations/charitable contributions

- Capture essential fields: Donor name,
 address, donation amount(s), date(s), total annual amount



Data Processing

- Aggregate multiple donations from the same donor into a single annual summary

- Calculate total tax-deductible amount per donor for the financial year

- Handle data validation and error handling for incomplete records



 Generation & Distribution

- Generate professionally formatted HTML
 receipts containing:

  - Organization letterhead/logo

  - Donor name and address

  - Itemized donation list (date, amount, reference number)

  - Annual total with tax-deductible status statement

  - Organization ABN and Deductible Gift Recipient (DGR) status

  - Unique receipt number for tax purposes

- Support mail merge functionality for personalization

- Integrate
 service (Gmail)

- Include unsubscribe/opt-out compliance footer



Output & Reporting

- Generate summary report of
s sent/failed

- Export capability for audit trail and donation analysis

- Log file for troubleshooting



Technical Specifications



Platform: MYOB AccountRight

Integration Method: MYOB API (REST/OAuth) or direct database connection 

Output Format: HTML
 + PDF receipt attachment 

 Protocol: API-based
 service (Gmail)

Security: Encryption for donor data, secure API credential storage



Deliverables

1. Fully functional plugin/application with source code

2. Installation and configuration documentation

3. User manual for non-technical staff

4. 30-day post-deployment support for bug fixes

5. Training session (video call) for our team



Ideal Candidate

- Proven experience with MYOB API integrations or accounting software plugins

- Strong background in C#, .NET, or Python (common MYOB integration languages)

- Experience with secure data handling and privacy compliance (Australia Privacy Act)

- Familiarity with Australian tax receipt requirements for DGR organizations

- Portfolio of similar automation or financial data extraction projects

title: Cold Caller/Appointment Setter – $2/hr + Commission ($30 per Appt. + 10% per Sale)
description:
About Us:

Business Automation OS helps local service-based U.S. businesses build an online presence & dominate their local markets through AI automation services.



The Role:

We’re looking for motivated, commission-driven Cold Calling Appointment Setters to call from our verified business lists and book qualified appointments. Your mission: start conversations with business owners and get them scheduled for AI demo walk-throughs.



What You’ll Do:

Call business owners from our verified lists using our CRM (GoHighLevel).

Use provided scripts (OK to go off-script as needed to get in flow with prospect).

Motivate business owners to schedule an AI demo.

Log outcomes in Google sheet or CRM.



Compensation:

$2/hr base pay

$30 per booked appointment (verified show-up only)

10% per confirmed sale (up to $100 per sale)

Unlimited earning potential — no cap.



What We Provide:

Verified business lists.

CRM for Phone Calls (GoHighLevel).



What You Provide:

Your own phone or laptop/computer for calls (GHL click-to-call provided, power dialer optional).

Strong communication skills.

A self-driven, results-oriented mindset.

High attention to details



Requirements:

Full Time Role: Willing to work 8 hours per day (40 hours per week)

Timezone: Must be available to work any time during U.S. business hours Monday - Friday (approx. 8 AM EST/5 AM PST to 9 PM EST/6PM PST).

Experience: Previous outbound B2B cold calling experience is highly preferred. You must be comfortable with rejection and able to handle objections smoothly.

Perfect English: You must have a clear, neutral accent. You will be speaking with U.S. based business owners who have low tolerance for spam calls.

Tech: Your own phone or laptop (w/ high quality headset preferred), a quiet workspace, and a fast internet connection.

title: Sales and Operations Specialist (Dispatcher)
description:
[PLEASE PROVIDE A LINK TO A 30-60 SECOND VOICE MEMO VIA 
 SHOWING YOUR PERSONALITY AND DISCUSSING WHAT VALUE YOU WILL BRING TO OUR COMPANY - DO NOT READ A SCRIPT PLEASE]



Job Summary:



We are seeking a motivated and highly organized Sales and Operations Specialist to be the primary point of contact for our clients. This role is central to our operations, involving handling inbound leads, driving sales, managing customer billing and payments, scheduling logistics, and coordinating with our drivers and partners. The ideal candidate excels in communication, has a great attitude, is receptive to feedback, is sales-oriented yet customer-focused, learns quickly, and thrives in a remote, fast-paced environment, reporting directly to the company owners.



Working Hours & Expectations:



This is a full-time remote position requiring approximately 40 hours per week.

The schedule includes weekdays (aligning with Los Angeles/Pacific Time business hours) and partial Saturday (aligning with business hours).

High responsiveness during working hours is critical.

Must maintain a professional remote work environment with a reliable high-speed internet connection suitable for VoIP calls.



Compensation:



Starting pay is $6.00 USD per hour after an initial training period (approximately 2 weeks) paid at $3 per hour.



Job Responsibilities:



Manage incoming customer calls and inquiries via VoIP, providing exceptional customer service.

Effectively communicate service offerings, provide quotes, and convert leads into sales.

Nurture relationships with ongoing leads, past clients, and long-term customers.

Process customer payments accurately for dumpster rentals.

Schedule dumpster deliveries and pickups efficiently.

Coordinate closely and maintain clear communication with the company driver regarding schedules and job details.

Professionally broker leads for out-of-service-area requests to partner companies.

Prepare and send invoices to partner companies who broker orders to our service.

Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, sales, payments, and scheduling using Google Suite and other designated tools.

Collaborate effectively and professionally with owners, the driver, and partner company contacts.



Job Requirements:



Language: Exceptional (Native or C1/C2 level) verbal and written English fluency is mandatory.



Experience: 0-3 years preferred in Customer Service, Sales, Dispatch, Operations Support, or similar roles. Dispatching experience a plus.



Skills:



Strong sales and negotiation skills with a charming, customer-centric approach.

Excellent communication, interpersonal, and rapport-building skills.

Strong organizational and scheduling/coordination skills.

Proficiency in Google Suite (Gmail, Calendar, Sheets).

Experience and comfort using VoIP phone systems.

Ability to learn new processes and information quickly.



Personal Attributes:



Highly responsive and reliable.

Positive, professional attitude with minimal ego.

Collaborative team player, able to work effectively with the driver and owners.

Open and receptive to feedback.



Technical: Stable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional home office environment suitable for VoIP calls.

title: Founding Product Builder (AI + Behavioral Design)
description:
About Us



We’re building an app designed to solve a real problem:



Most women feel stuck, unclear on what they’re good at, and disconnected from what they actually enjoy.



This app helps them figure it out through action, not overthinking.



Users start with a short, psychology-driven quiz that identifies strengths, interests, and patterns. From there, AI generates personalized, real-world experiments they can try immediately to discover what actually fits them.



This is not a journaling app.

This is a clarity-through-action system.



The Role

We’re looking for a Founding Product Builder to take this from idea ? live app.

You won’t just be coding. You’ll be shaping the product, challenging assumptions, and building something people actually use.

If you need detailed instructions for everything, this is not your role.



What You’ll Build

A high-converting onboarding quiz that identifies:

Strengths

Energy drivers

Skill patterns

AI-powered recommendations that:

Turn insights into tiny, testable experiments

Adapt based on user behavior and feedback

A feedback loop that tracks:

What users try

What they enjoy

What they avoid

A simple, engaging user experience that keeps people coming back



Responsibilities

Build and launch the MVP quickly

Design and implement AI-driven personalization

Collaborate on product strategy and user experience

Continuously improve the system based on user data

Push for simplicity, speed, and real user outcomes



Requirements:

Experience building consumer-facing apps

Strong product thinking (not just technical execution)

Experience working with AI APIs (like OpenAI or similar)

Ability to work in ambiguity and move fast

Bias toward action over perfection



Nice to Have

Experience with behavioral psychology or habit-building products

Experience building early-stage or 0 ? 1 products

Opinions on why most “self-discovery” apps fail

title: Marketing + Admin Virtual Assistant
description:
Do you love creating Reels, doing research, editing content, and helping health focused, mission-driven brands grow? *Note: please read entire job description to see how to apply!!!!



I am creating a health and wellness startup launching a national program called The SOMA Method, helping people reverse chronic disease through lifestyle change.



I’m looking for a creative, reliable, and proactive Virtual Assistant to help me grow my personal brand and business through content creation, podcast editing, marketing outreach, medical research, and light admin support.



This is a part-time remote role (15–20 hours/week) starting at $4.50/hr with opportunity for a raise after a 3-month trial. If you’re passionate about health, social media, and building something meaningful from the ground up — I want to work with you.



Responsibilities:

Social Media & Content Creation



Edit Instagram Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts from podcasts, behind-the-scenes, and wellness content



Write captions and help post/schedule content across platforms



Help brainstorm content ideas and stay on top of trends



Podcast Support (In future)



Pull highlight clips from podcast episodes



Write titles and short summaries



Upload to YouTube and podcast hosting platforms



Market Research & Outreach



Research other health brands, insurance billing info,, pricing models, practices and competitor programs



Find potential leads or partners and help with outreach



Assist with building a client database and gathering testimonials



Admin & Brand Building



Organize project deadlines and content calendar



Help with light Canva design and internal documentation (SOPs, spreadsheets)



Respond to DMs or comments when needed



Assist with website and brand creation 



 Ideal Qualifications

1+ year of VA, social media, or marketing experience



Strong understanding of Instagram/TikTok/YouTube content strategy



Comfortable using Canva, CapCut, Descript, or similar tools



Speaks and writes fluent English



Proactive and self-managed – doesn’t wait for instructions to take action



Excited to work with a mission-driven entrepreneur building a health and longevity brand



Bonus if you have interest or experience in wellness, fitness, or coaching industries





To Apply:  Fill out this form 
  

**Note: generic copy-paste answers will be ignored

title: Customer Support (Written) | No Experience Needed | FUN| Dance Academy
description:
***READ FULL JOB POST BEFORE APPLYING. *** Please don't waste your time or ours. Thanks :)



Full-time, long-term opportunity.



Four days per week, or five days per week scheduling options.



Looking for:

- Outstanding English

- Empathy



Our communications with students are FRIENDLY, FUN, and PERSONAL.



ABOUT US

We are the largest salsa & bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and are growing rapidly.



The culture here is FUN, fast, and friendly. Our goal is to make every student feel welcome and completely taken care of.



Dancing changes lives - we are on a mission to deliver the best salsa/bachata educational experience on Earth.



The company is MaS Dance Academy.





ABOUT YOUR TEAM

Working with a remote team that helps with all facets of the business, you'll form a close working relationship and bond with your team mates. We even host team retreats in the Philippines!



----------------------------

SCHEDULE

All times written in PST (Los Angeles time)



TRAINING (2-4 weeks):

Sunday - Thursday 9am - 6pm (with 1 hour break)



AFTER TRAINING



Both options are full-time 40 hours per week.



OPTION 1 - FIVE DAY SCHEDULE:

Thursday - Monday 8am - 5pm (with 1 hour break)



OPTION 2 - FOUR DAY SCHEDULE:

Saturday, Tuesday, Wednesday 10am - 9pm (with 1 hour break)

Friday 12pm (noon) - 11pm (with 1 hour break)

----------------------------



YOUR ROLE

• Your primary role is written student support (text,
 etc.)

• When there are no support tasks to complete, you'll contribute in a wide variety of other ways, depending on your skills and interests. Some examples may include writing blogs, updating websites, doing research, collecting and analyzing numerical data and using it to create reports, etc.





WRITTEN VS PHONE SUPPORT

• 95% of our student support is written. However, occasionally you will need to be on the phone with a student. You must be comfortable on the phone.





TYPES OF SUPPORT YOU'LL HANDLE

• One on one texting and
ing

• Mass texting and
ing

• Occasional phone calls (rare)

• Updating database after every interaction and attempted interaction

• Daily reports

• Etc.





COMPANY CULTURE

Working in a small business like ours is very different from a large corporation. Some of the differences are:



• Personal tone: Our communications with students are FRIENDLY, FUN, and PERSONAL. It's like talking to your best friend. We use emoji's and exclamation points and are very personal. We take the opposite approach of large corporations that give robotic, frustrating, not very helpful support. You need to be intuitive and have strong emotional intelligence to feel what the students are needing when they communicate.



• More creativity: there is more freedom to adjust your responses for each scenario. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting.



• Impact: your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see



• Feedback: your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! We want everyone here thinking as if they were the business owner.





ABOUT YOU

• Perfect written English

• Available full-time

• High emotional intelligence

• Flexible

• Quick learner

• Thrives in fast-paced, quickly changing environment

• Desire to always seek better ways to do things, including finding ways to use A.I. tools

• Happy to be on the phone when needed (which is rarely)

• Tremendous attention to detail - gets things right the first time

• PRO-ACTIVE. Always looking for ways to improve.

• Meticulous, organized, methodical. Almost never misses a detail.

• Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task.

• Not afraid to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinion on the approaches that we take so that we can improve.

• Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time

• Strong communicator

• Makes decisions independently

• Quick learner

• Fast computer

• Fast, dependable Internet

• Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata or any dance!





APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:

1. A brief intro about yourself



2. Are you happy to be on the phone when needed?



3. This is a fast-paced environment with quickly changing conditions. You’ll need to be able to think quickly on your feet and track dozens of moving pieces at once with precision and accuracy. This role is NOT for people who feel overly anxious in this type of environment. Apply only if you thrive in such an environment. Based on this information, do you still feel this role is a good fit for you?



4. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application the answers to the assessment in the link above: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit) 4. Highest level of formal education



6. Any customer support experience? If yes, please describe.



7. Which of the two scheduling options do you prefer?



8. These positions are competitive, often with hundreds of applicants. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 us off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, we personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!









——————————————

title: Lead Scraper/Miner/Database Builder
description:
About the role

We are a fast-growing Australian digital marketing agency specialising in the property industry. We are building a comprehensive global database of every property advisory, buyers agent, and property investment company in the world — and we need a meticulous researcher to make it happen.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role. If you are detail-oriented, enjoy structured research work, and take pride in building clean, accurate data — this is for you.



What you will do

?

Search and scrape every buyers agent, property advisor, and property investment company globally — starting with Australia, then expanding to US, UK, Canada, NZ, and beyond



?

Collect key data for each company: business name, website,
, phone, social media profiles, location, and niche/specialisation



?

Organise all data into a clean, structured Google Sheet with consistent formatting and no duplicates



?

Use tools like Google, LinkedIn, Google Maps, industry directories, and association websites to find leads



?

Verify information is accurate and up to date before entering it



?

Report daily progress with a clear summary of records added



Who we are looking for

?

Strong experience with web research and lead scraping



?

Proficient with Google Sheets — formulas, sorting, deduplication



?

Comfortable using tools like Apollo, 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or similar (a bonus, not required)



?

High attention to detail — no sloppy data, no guessing



?

Self-motivated, reliable, and able to work independently without micromanagement



?

Good written English for communication with our team



Compensation & conditions

Pay



$400–$600/mo



Hours



40 hrs/week



Location



100% remote



Type



Long-term



How to apply

To be considered, your application must include:



1. A short paragraph on your experience



2. An example of a spreadsheet or database you have built (screenshot or link)



3. What tools you would use to find buyers agents in Australia



4. Start your message with the word "PROPERTY" so we know you read this in full

title: Crochet Artist (2+ crochet yrs exp)
description:
We are looking for a talented and experienced Crochet Designer and Pattern Writer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have the expertise to translate photos or design concepts into crochet patterns and guide others in replicating the design.



This job is a long term contract based WFH job with potential bonus for really skilled artisans.



Responsibilities

Review and interpret design photos or concepts provided.

title: Generalist Illustrator w/ Basic Animation Skills
description:
Hey there! 



I'm looking to start a small creative team to help with a range of ad-hoc projects, some for my company directly and for various media projects. 



This is a highly flexible, hourly contractor role (at least to start) where we work project-by-project based on the active projects of that 
nt and their needs. 



We will be focusing on:

• Full videos and animated content teaching companies about business automation, system integration, modern tech, and more. 

• Experimental and conceptual web animation (i.e. Lottie or RiveApp) – this would require a blend of your skillset and that of myself/my team.

• Music videos (we have a channel with 180k subscribers that I'm hoping to refocus on via the output made possible from this role). This has no relation to the more practical videos described above, but would be happening concurrently. 

• Video essays. These will likely range from practical business/automation-centric videos to more personal thoughts via different channels.



We love the blend of human and technology, and we'd love to find somebody that shares our love of experimentation and iteration with new tools and ways of working. We will definitely be utilizing tools like MidJourney and Suno in our workflow, though some frames might be 100% human and others only 30% (i.e. a focus on character consistency, pose variations, and scene clean-up within another output). Our goal is to communicate effectively, tell great stories, and capture great aesthetics throughout all these projects. 



No specific degree or experience is required for this role, all that matters is the quality of your work and cultural fit. Specifically, the hard outputs you've created (formal or informal), your natural desire to do great work and improve, and how reliable you are to work with.



Projects will be ad-hoc and hourly, but we're hoping to build up a continuously flow of work which could then lead to full-time contracting if desired. 



This role is the start of this team beyond myself. I'm specifically needing a generalist illustrator (or potentially several, depending on exact skills, strengths, and styles) that can:

(1) Help create concepts, storyboards, and simple animatics

(2) Create illustrate/paint final style frames from scratch from references, sketches, & descriptions (with clean layers that make rigging and animation easy).

(3) Rotoscope and backfill layers (via illustration and/or clone-stamping) for AI outputs, like starting frames or reference frames from MidJourney or Nano Banana. This may also require touch-ups of AI outputs, or edits to them.

(4) Can do basic rigging in After Effects (or, at least, is able and willing to learn how to do so)

(5) Can do basic animation in After Effects (similar as above – any animation experience at all is hugely beneficial but you don't need to be elite by any stretch). 



If you have any other creative or technical experience, I'd love to hear about it! That could mean: film, editing, sound design, scoring/composition, 3D, VFX, or anything else.



You and I will collaborate heavily and may also contract out others for specific needs, assuming we're unable to get a compelling output ourselves (i.e. narration or voice-acting, custom sound design, etc.). 



If you're interested in this, please share:

(1) Your portfolio

(2) Quick summary of your work history (no traditional resume or experience is needed, but feel free to share any additional details about relevant work you've done personally, for a company, or in the creative industry)

(3) What you care most about with this role, and what a win-win relationship would look like to you.

(4) Your desired hourly rate

(5) Your natural working hours and hours of overlap/availability (we are based in the US on Eastern Time)

(6) Any questions you have about the role, working relationship, work itself, or anything else.



Thanks for considering this role!

title: Social Media Growth Strategist & Content Lead
description:
**Social Media Growth Strategist (Influencer Brand | Content + UGC + Monetization | Full-Time | Remote)**



We are building a **family-based social media brand (humor + lifestyle)** with the goal of reaching **100K+ followers and generating $10K+/month** through content, brand deals, and UGC.



We are looking for someone who can **own our growth strategy**, not just manage posts.



This role is for someone who understands:

How content goes viral

How to turn trends into original content

How to grow AND monetize a creator brand



---



**Your Role**



You will act as our **Growth Strategist & Content Lead**, helping us:



* Plan what content to create every week

* Turn trends into **on-brand, humorous family content**

* Analyze what’s working and double down on it

* Guide us toward **monetization (UGC, brand deals, etc.)**



---



**Responsibilities**



**1. Content Strategy & Planning**



* Build a weekly content plan (15–30 short-form videos)

* Create **hooks, ideas, and simple scripts**

* Develop repeatable content formats for growth



**2. Trend Research**



* Find trending content daily on TikTok/IG/YouTube

* Adapt trends into **our brand voice (family + humor)**

* Bring fresh ideas every week



**3. Growth Optimization**



* Analyze performance (views, retention, shares)

* Identify what’s working and adjust strategy

* Help us consistently improve content quality and reach



**4. Filming Direction**



* Prepare a **clear shot list for our weekly content day**

* Tell us exactly what to film and how

* Make content creation simple and efficient



**5. Monetization Support**



* Help position content for **brand deals & UGC opportunities**

* Suggest content that attracts sponsorships

* Identify opportunities to start generating revenue



---



**What We’re Looking For**



* Experience growing or contributing to **social media accounts** (REQUIRED)

* Deep understanding of **short-form content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)**

* Strong instinct for **hooks, humor, and relatability**

* Ability to turn trends into **original content ideas**

* Analytical mindset (can explain WHY content performs)

* Proactive and takes ownership



---



**Important**



This is **NOT** a basic social media manager role.



We are looking for someone who:



* Thinks like a **creator and strategist**

* Can take ownership of growth

* Ideally works **full-time and is not heavily committed to multiple clients**



---



**Bonus Skills**



* Experience with influencer brands or UGC

* Basic video editing knowledge

* Experience scaling accounts to **50K–100K+ followers**



---



**Compensation**



* Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

* Performance bonuses tied to growth milestones

* Long-term opportunity as we scale



---



**How to Apply**



To be considered, please include:



1. Links to accounts you’ve helped grow (REQUIRED)

2. 3 content ideas you would create for a **family humor page**

3. A short plan for reaching **100K followers in 6 months**

4. Your expected monthly salary (PHP)

5. Your current work situation (clients/jobs)

6. Include the word **“OPERATOR”** in your application



---



We are not looking for someone to just “post content.”

We are looking for someone to help us **build a real creator business.**

title: Executive Virtual Assistant – Email & Calendar Management (Full-Time)
description:

We're a small, fast-moving team looking for a sharp, proactive Executive VA to completely own our inboxes and calendars. This is a full-time role requiring significant overlap with US Central time. You'll work inside our Microsoft 365 environment — including Outlook and our trained Microsoft Copilot agent — to keep two executives organized, responsive, and focused. If you thrive on structure, hate letting things slip, and are excited to work alongside AI tools rather than around them, this role is for you.

 management

Triage inboxes for two tea
mbers daily — categorize, organize, and prioritize incoming

Use our Copilot AI agent to generate draft responses, then review each draft for accuracy and tone before surfacing for approval

Flag high-priority
s that require personal attention, with a brief note explaining why

Build and maintain a clean folder, label, and rules structure in Outlook

Ensure no
 goes unresponded beyond 24 hours — escalate anything at risk of slipping

Calendar & scheduling

Own scheduling for two people — book, confirm, and reschedule meetings in Outlook Calendar

Proactively flag and resolve calendar conflicts before they become problems

Send timely reminders and prep notes ahead of important meetings

You're a great fit if you:

Have 2+ years supporting executives with
 and calendar management

Are comfortable working inside Microsoft 365 — Outlook, Outlook Calendar, and ideally Copilot or similar AI tools

Exercise strong judgment — you know the difference between what needs a human decision and what can be handled

Write clear, professional English and can spot when an AI-generated draft needs refinement

Are available during US Central business hours (8am–5pm CST)

Communicate proactively — you flag issues before we notice them



To apply, please include:

A summary of your
 and calendar management experience

Any AI or automation tools you've used in an admin context (Copilot, ChatGPT, Zapier, etc.)

A brief example of how you'd handle this scenario: You receive 47
s overnight. Walk us through how you'd triage them and what you'd surface first.

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

Opportunity to make a big impact — your work will directly drive revenue and brand expansion

How to Apply



 your resume and a quick 2–3 sentence introduction 



Subject Line: Affiliate Manager – [Your Name]



Include:



Links to affiliate programs or creators you’ve worked with

Any relevant platforms/tools you’ve used

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Job Type: Full-time

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
Role Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and reliable Virtual Executive Assistant to support the Managing Partner of a U.S.-based boutique law firm.



This role is focused on handling non-billable administrative tasks, enabling the Managing Partner to focus on billable client work and revenue-generating activities.



The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable working directly with a business owner in a fast-paced professional environment.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage
 inbox, including organizing, prioritizing, and drafting responses

• Calendar management, scheduling meetings, and coordinating appointments

• Document formatting, proofreading, and administrative/legal document support

• File and document organization in OneDrive and Microsoft 365’s cloud-based systems

• Assist with client intake and follow-ups

• Assist with client invoicing workflows, including preparing and sending invoice
s

• Conduct online research and summarize findings

• Book and organize travel plans

• Assist with drafting and scheduling content for LinkedIn and other social media platforms, including formatting posts, sourcing images, and maintaining a content calendar

• Track tasks, deadlines, and action items

• Provide general administrative support to streamline daily operations

• Maintain strict confidentiality of all sensitive legal, client, and business information. This role supports an active law firm and involves exposure to attorney-client privileged matters. Discretion is a non-negotiable professional requirement of this position.



Daily Tasks

• Reviewing and organizing
s and action items

• Managing calendar and scheduling meetings

• Preparing, editing, and formatting documents

• Tracking deliverables and deadlines

• Supporting client communication workflows

• Maintaining organized digital filing systems



Qualifications



Required:

• 5+ years of experience as a Virtual Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Administrative Assistant

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Excellent written and verbal English communication

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Ability to work independently and proactively

• Proficiency with Microsoft 365, including Word, Outlook, and OneDrive for document management and file organization



Preferred:

• Experience supporting a law firm or professional services business

• Familiarity with legal contract workflows and documentation

• Experience with Clio Manage for matter management, client intake, and billing workflows (strongly preferred — candidates with Clio experience will be prioritized)



Working Hours:

• Part-time: 20-30 hours per week, with expectation that hours will increase as the role expands

• Must be available and online during core U.S. Eastern Time business hours, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM ET, Monday through Friday.



Key Attributes for Success

• Highly reliable and responsive

• Proactive and able to anticipate needs

• Discreet and trustworthy with confidential information

• Process-driven and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working directly with a business owner

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Marketing Manager

*Full-Time Virtual Position | Philippines-Based



Position Overview-

Position Title: Social Media Manager

Employment: Type Full-Time, Remote (Philippines)

Reports To: Scott & Mallory Edgett (Owners) & Kelsey Hernandez (Assistant)

Work Schedule: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST (with flexibility during content push periods)

Compensation Range: Competitive based on experience (discuss with hiring manager)

Platforms Managed:
, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok

Law Firms Supported: (3 Total) The Edgett Law Firm | Edgett Hawk Injury Law | Florida CAIL



ROLE SUMMARY-

The Social Media Manager serves as the operational hub of our three-law firm digital content engine. This person is responsible for organizing, overseeing, and coordinating the daily output of video content, captions, scheduling, and performance tracking across all 4 social media channels for all 3 different law firms. This is not a passive scheduling role. We expect the Social Media Manager to take genuine ownership of our online presence and to treat each piece of content as a direct extension of our legal brands. You will work directly alongside our two video editors and publisher while reporting to our Director of Marketing and Principal Attorney. You will be the first line of quality control for everything that goes out under our firm names.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES-

Content Strategy and Oversight:

•Develop and maintain a weekly content calendar for all three law firms, differentiated by practice area and target geography. 

•Collaborate with the Owners (Scott & Mallory) to generate recent trends, hot topics, and all other scripts for each of the three law firms on an educational base, ______ base, ______ base, and ______ base. Each must have a strong hook and strong call to action at the end. 

•Collaborate with the Principal Attorneys and Owners (Scott, Mallory, Michael, and Amanda) to create raw video recordings saved and uploaded and transformed into organized, platform-ready content videos. 

•Delegate to Editors the raw video, initial written video scripts, and any other specific instructions for each social media video idea. 

•Write platform-optimized captions for
, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok that are legally appropriate, engaging, and action-oriented.

•Maintain distinct brand voices for each firm: Texas criminal and juvenile defense for The Edgett Law Firm; Texas personal injury for Edgett Hawk Injury Law, and Florida personal injury for Florida CAIL (Coastal A
 & Injury Law). 

•Research trending legal content topics, hashtags, and audio to keep content culturally relevant.



Team Coordination:

•Assign raw video footage and topic briefs to the appropriate video editor based on firm and content type.

•Conduct daily quality review of all edited videos before they are forwarded to the Publisher for scheduling.

•Provide clear, written revision notes to video editors with specific timestamps and changes required.

•Maintain a shared content tracker (Google Sheets, Notion, or other) showing the status of every piece of content in production.

•Facilitate weekly team check-in calls with the editing and publishing team.



Platform and Tools Management:

•Manage scheduling queue in Metricool across all firm accounts.

•Monitor platform algorithm changes and adjust posting strategy accordingly.

•Oversee AI tool usage by the team, including Opus Clip for short-form clipping, Veo 3, Synthesia, and/or HeyGen where applicable.

•Ensure all CapCut templates, transitions, and caption styles remain consistent with each firm's brand guidelines.



Analytics and Reporting:

•Pull weekly performance reports fro
tricool and each native platform.

•Identify top-performing content and communicate patterns to the Principal Attorney each week.

•Flag underperforming content with documented reasoning and recommended adjustments.

•Prepare a monthly analytics summary with insights on reach, engagement, follower growth, and lead-generation indicators.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS-

•Minimum 2 years of social media management experience, preferably for a professional services or legal/lawfirm branding.

•Proven track record managing multi-platform content calendars at volume.

•Fluency in written English with strong caption-writing skills and an understanding of American legal communication norms.

title: Marketing Ops Manager
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Join a fast-growing trade school brand that's making a real impact in the skilled trades industry!

Western Welding Academy is looking for a Marketing Ops Manager to build and own our marketing automation, ad tracking, and reporting infrastructure from the ground up. We're bringing this work fully in-house, and we need someone who can take the reins — not wait to be told what to do. You'll work directly with our Marketing Director to make sure every lead, every campaign, and every dollar is tracked, measured, and optimized.



What You'll Do:

Build, manage, and optimize marketing automation workflows in HubSpot 
 sequences, lead nurturing, lifecycle stage management, internal notifications).

Set up and maintain ad tracking infrastructure — pixels, conversion events, UTM parameters — across Meta, Google, YouTube, TikTok, and Snapchat.

Build and maintain marketing dashboards and reports so leadership always has a clear picture of what's working.

Own the connection between our ad platforms and CRM, ensuring leads flow cleanly from click to enrollment pipeline.

Audit and clean up existing systems, workflows, and data — we're starting fresh and need someone who can build it right.

Manage Google Analytics and ensure proper attribution across all marketing channels.

Troubleshoot tracking issues, broken workflows, and data gaps quickly and independently.



You're a Perfect Fit If You:

Have 3+ years of hands-on experience in marketing operations, marketing automation, or a similar technical marketing role.

Are highly proficient in HubSpot — workflows, lists, properties, reporting, and integrations.

Know how to set up and troubleshoot tracking pixels, conversion APIs, and UTM structures across multiple ad platforms.

Have strong experience with Google Analytics.

Can build clean, reliable reporting dashboards that non-technical people can actually understand.

Are a systems thinker who sees how all the pieces connect — ads, CRM, attribution, reporting.

Can work independently, take ownership, and solve problems without hand-holding.

Are comfortable working in a fully remote setup during U.S. Mountain Time business hours (7:00 AM – 5:00 PM MT).



Bonus Points If You Have:

Experience with 
, or other integration/automation platforms.

Familiarity with Power BI or similar data visualization tools.

Experience in the education, trade school, or vocational training space.

Basic understanding of paid advertising strategy (not just tracking — knowing what the numbers mean).



Details:

Schedule: Full-time, 50 hours per week, Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM U.S. Mountain Time.

Compensation: Starting at $300 USD/week, with potential to increase based on performance.

Reports to: Marketing Director



How to Apply:

Submit your resume and examples of marketing systems, dashboards, or automations you've built. You MUST also include a 2-minute video of yourself explaining why you'd be a great fit for this role, your experience with HubSpot and ad tracking, and a specific example of a system you built or improved. Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Credit Analyst
description:
Senior Credit Analyst 

(Policy & Submission Quality) 



In Financial Services 

Remote | Full-Time | Long-Term Role 

 

About the Role 

In Financial Services operates a highly structured, system-led mortgage business built around strong credit assessment, clean submissions, and a controlled client experience. 



We are seeking a Senior Credit Analyst to manage complex lending files and ensure policy strength and submission quality across the business. 



This role forms part of our structured Credit Team and reports directly to our Australian-based Credit Manager. 



You will operate within defined lending standards and quality controls, working closely with brokers before submission to ensure deals are structured correctly, serviced accurately, and positioned clearly for lender assessment. 



This is a senior technical role focused on credit judgment, policy interpretation, and submission integrity. 



We value depth of knowledge, strong credit judgment, and consistent execution. This role is for someone confident in handling complexity — not someone learning it for the first time. 

 

What Success Looks Like 

A complex file enters Credit — company structure, SMSF, trust, layered income, or multi-security. 



From there: 

> Structure is reviewed and refined where required 

> Servicing is calculated accurately and aligned to lender policy 

> Risks are identified early and mitigated 

> Supporting documentation is complete and clearly organised 

> Submission notes are strategic and well-positioned 

> Files are lodged cleanly with minimal lender queries 

> Assessors receive clear, structured applications 



From the broker’s perspective, the deal is strong and submission-ready. 

From the lender’s perspective, the file is clear, complete, and easy to assess. 

From the business’s perspective, submission quality reduces friction and improves turnaround times. 

 

Key Responsibilities 

1. Assess and structure complex loan files prior to submission 

2. Interpret lender policy and apply correct credit positioning 

3. Complete accurate servicing calculations across multiple lender platforms 

4. Prepare structured and strategic submission notes 

5. Conduct final quality control checks before lodgement 

6. Collaborate with brokers to strengthen deal structure 

7. Escalate high-level policy concerns to the Credit Manager where required 

8. Maintain strong knowledge of lender updates and policy changes 

9. Support the continuous improvement of credit standards and submission quality 

 

Skills & Experience 

>> 5+ years’ experience in Australian mortgage credit or loan assessment 

>> Strong experience across multiple lender servicing calculators 

>> Practical knowledge of: 

    • Company and trust structures 

    • SMSF lending 

    • Multi-security loans 

    • Complex income scenarios 

>> Deep understanding of lender policy interpretation 

>> Strong analytical and problem-solving ability 

>> High attention to detail with structured file preparation 

>> Calm and confident communicator 

 

This Role Is Not 

(X) A junior processing role 

(X) A data-entry position 

(X) A purely administrative function 

(X) This is a senior technical seat within a quality-driven Credit Team. 

 

Why Join Us 

-Long-term role within a growing Australian brokerage 

-Structured systems and clearly defined credit workflows 

-Direct reporting line to the Australian credit leadership 

-Established offshore team environment 

-Opportunity to influence credit standards and submission quality 

-Be part of a business that values precision, professionalism, and performance

title: YouTube Video Editor VA – Flexible Gig Role With Full-Time Potential
description:
We are hiring a YouTube Video Editor VA from the Philippines to work on an existing sports education channel with 43,000 subscribers.



This is a flexible gig-based role, not a fixed full-time position at the start. The workload and hours will vary depending on the content schedule and current needs of the channel. However, as the channel continues to grow, this role has strong potential to develop into a more consistent long-term position, including full-time work for the right person.

Our content is not typical sports highlights content. It focuses on statistics, mathematics, and educational analysis related to sports, so we need someone who can do more than basic editing. We are looking for an editor who can use graphic storytelling to make analytical content engaging, clear, and easy to follow.



You should be comfortable turning scripts, voiceovers, or rough ideas into videos that use visual explanations, charts, numbers, motion graphics, on-screen text, and supporting visuals to help tell the story. The ideal person understands how to keep viewers engaged even when the topic is data-heavy, knows how to edit and structure videos to maximise audience retention, and can also repurpose existing long-form videos into short-form content for YouTube Shorts and TikTok.

title: Experienced Full-time Associate Site Merchandiser for ecommerce company
description:
Our US-based ecommerce company is looking for a very experienced and excellent Associate Site Merchandiser who is hard-working, very detail-oriented, analytical, organized, with several years of experience in ecommerce. 



It is a FULL-time position (40h/week). This is NOT an entry-level role. 



The Associate Site Merchandiser is responsible for ensuring the product assortment across our brands is populated with the appropriate selling attributes; collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to define new assortment strategies, test new product categories, and report on performance. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment and contribute to the success of a high growth business.



Omni Retail Enterprises operates a lifestyle portfolio of digital storefronts and communities including home decor, apparel, collectables, fitness, and more, with millions of consumers around the globe. 



Skills & Qualifications:



• Strong English proficiency, both written and spoken. 

• 1-3 years of experience in online merchandising. 

• High attention to detail, process oriented, strong project management, analytical, problem solving and verbal/written communication skills. 



Experience in Platforms:



• Proficient in Shopify, Google Analytics, and Excel. 

• Familiar with Content Management systems.



Work Schedule:



• Full-time position (40h/week)

• US work hours (CST)



Key Responsibilities:



• Support the day-to-day management, merchandising and revenue growth of our brands with an emphasis on site productivity, sales growth and conversion. A primary focus of this role is the optimization of the online merchandising strategy to ensure that the right product is in the right place and at the right time. Work with our team in the planning of weekly and monthly product placements and product stories.



• Efficiently on-board new SKUs from our vendor partners, placing those SKUs in the proper categories, adding selling attributes, enriching meta data, and building SEO on-page copy. 



• Assist in the development and help maintain the online merchandising and related item strategies to drive sales, conversion rate and overall profitability for the site. Utilize relevant reporting and analysis to communicate online business trends and SKU level performance. Conduct and provide regular competitive analysis to identify best practices and recommend action steps.



• Effectively merchandise products within the product category structure in an effort to influence conversion rate and sales. Utilize all available data points (consumer demand, product inventory, product margin, shipping damage rates, etc.) in an effort to drive profitability for the ecommerce channel. This will include upselling, cross selling, catalog structure management, and creation of product specific landing pages.



• Partner with the team for SEO to positively affect conversion rate and sales through search results. Review customer search behavior to gain an understanding of keyword queries and manipulate the products within the search results page in a manner that drives overall profitability for the ecommerce channel.



• Coordinate with Marketing team to gain a full understanding of all content 
, social, display, search, digital integrations, etc.) potentially driving traffic back to the sites. Merchandise landing pages in a manner that supports the various marketing mediums while keeping profitability of the ecommerce channel top of mind. 



Resume



Please submit your information and resume detailing your relevant experience, skill set, and why you're the perfect fit for this position. Link to submit this information: 



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Staff Accountant
description:
We are a U.S.-based, faith-driven accounting firm serving small businesses and nonprofits. We are seeking a detail-oriented Staff Accountant to support multiple client accounts using QuickBooks Online and our workflow system, Financial Cents.



Responsibilities include categorizing transactions, performing bank and credit card reconciliations, maintaining accurate general ledgers, and assisting with month-end close. Candidates should be comfortable identifying and correcting net vs. gross transactions (e.g., fees, payroll, and deposits) and requesting supporting documentation when needed.



This role requires strong attention to detail, consistency, and the ability to follow structured processes.



Candidates must have experience with QuickBooks Online and a basic understanding of U.S. accounting principles. Strong communication skills and a commitment to accuracy are essential.



As a faith-based company, we value integrity, stewardship, and excellence in our work. We are looking for someone who approaches their responsibilities with care, ownership, and professionalism. This is a growing firm, and the role has the potential to expand into full-time (40 hours week) and future leadership opportunities for the right candidate.

s, follow up with vendors and freelancers, and serve as the executive's point of contact — keeping all parties organized and informed.

ntum — nothing stalls on your watch.

description:
Here's a job description for a Virtual Assistant specializing in marketing operations for a short-term rental business:



Job Title: Virtual Assistant, Marketing Operations (Short-Term Rental)



Location: Remote



About Us:



Canopy Collective is a growing short-term rental company in the United States dedicated to providing exceptional guest experiences across our portfolio of properties. We leverage platforms like Airbnb and VRBO to connect with travelers and are committed to optimizing our online presence and marketing efforts to drive bookings and maintain high occupancy rates. We're seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our CEO and manage key operations tasks.



Position Summary:



As a Virtual Assistant for Marketing Operations, you will play a crucial role in supporting our CEO and executing marketing strategies designed to increase visibility and bookings for our short-term rental properties. This is a dynamic role that requires a keen eye for detail, strong communication skills, and a solid understanding of how to leverage online platforms like Airbnb and VRBO for success. You will be instrumental in ensuring our listings are optimized, our marketing campaigns run smoothly, and our guest communication is efficient.



Key Responsibilities:



   Listing Management & Optimization:

       Create, update, and optimize property listings on platforms such as Airbnb, Vrbo, and others.

    Select and organize high-quality photos, and ensure all listing information is accurate and up-to-date.

       Monitor competitor listings and market trends to suggest pricing and listing improvements.

   Marketing Operations Support:

 newsletters, and other promotional channels.

 correspondence and organize digital files.

 marketing, or other digital marketing tools is a plus.

To Apply:

title: Part-Time QuickBooks Bookkeeper
description:
Part-Time Bookkeeper (8 Hours/Week)

Company: HUUB & Sunday Projects

Location: Remote (U.S.-based preferred)

Hours: Approx. 8-10 hours per week (consistent weekly schedule)

Compensation: $4.00 USD per hour



---



About HUUB



HUUB is a technology platform supporting small businesses and local governments through technical assistance, access to capital programs, and ecosystem building. We work closely with cities, economic development organizations, and entrepreneurs to streamline reporting, funding workflows, and program management.



We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, proactive Part-Time Bookkeeper to support our financial operations and administrative follow-through.



---



Position Overview



This role is ideal for someone who loves clean books, strong systems, and persistent follow-up. You will manage weekly reconciliations, accounts receivable and payable tracking, invoice management, and vendor communication. You will also assist with occasional administrative follow-ups, including contacting government agencies regarding tax filings, certifications, or licenses.



This role requires someone who is organized, comfortable on the phone, and confident in communicating with government offices and vendors.

title: ClickUp Specialist — Local Legends Marketing
description:
ClickUp Wizard & Operations Specialist — Build the Machine Behind a Fast-Growing Marketing Agency



Job Description

Are you the kind of person who gets genuinely excited about a perfectly automated workflow?

Do you dream in Kanban boards? Does a messy project management system make your eye twitch? Do you get a rush when you build an automation that saves a team 10 hours a week?

If you just said "yes" to all three — keep reading. You might be our person.

Local Legends Marketing is a growing digital marketing agency that helps local businesses dominate their markets. We build service area pages, create content, manage local SEO, and a whole lot more. Our team is talented, our clients are growing, and our operations need a ClickUp genius to bring order to the chaos.

We're not looking for someone who "knows a little ClickUp." We want someone who lives and breathes it. Someone who can walk into our workflows, immediately see what's broken or missing, and build systems that make our entire team faster, more accountable, and more visible to our clients.

This is not a "set it and forget it" role. You'll own our entire project management ecosystem. You'll be the person our team relies on to keep the engine running smoothly — and the person our clients are impressed by when they see a beautiful dashboard showing exactly where their project stands.



What You'll Actually Be Doing

Workspace Architecture — Design and build our entire ClickUp workspace from the ground up (or rebuild what we have). Spaces, Folders, Lists, Custom Fields — you'll d
 the structure that makes sense for a multi-client marketing agency with multiple service lines.

Workflow Design — We have teams that work in stages. For example, a single service area page moves through content research, content writing, image/media creation, page building, and page launch. Each step has a different person. You'll build workflows where tasks flow seamlessly from one person to the next with clear handoffs, automatic notifications, and zero confusion about "whose turn is it?"

Automations That Actually Work — Auto-assign tasks when they move to a new stage. Send reminders when deadlines are approaching. Notify the team lead when something is stuck. Flag overdue work. You'll set up automations that eliminate the manual babysitting and let our team focus on doing great work.

Time Tracking & Performance Dashboards — Set up time tracking so we can see exactly how long each tea
mber spends on each task, each client, and each type of work. Build internal dashboards that show me (the owner) who's crushing it, who might need support, and where bottlenecks are hiding.

Client-Facing Dashboards — This is a big one. Build dashboards that our clients can access (as Guests) showing real-time progress on their projects. Think: "Service Area Pages — 24 of 48 complete (50%)" with visual progress bars and status breakdowns. Our clients should be able to log in and instantly feel confident about where things stand.

Templates & Scalability — Create reusable task templates for every service we offer so spinning up a new client takes minutes, not hours. As we grow and add new services, you'll adapt the system to keep up.

Team Training & Adoption — The best system in the world is useless if nobody uses it. You'll train our team, create simple how-to guides, and be the go-to person when someone has a question about how things work in ClickUp.

Ongoing Optimization — Regularly review our workflows, identify inefficiencies, and make improvements. You'll proactively suggest better ways to do things — not wait to be asked.



Who You Are

ClickUp Expert — You have deep, hands-on experience with ClickUp. Not surface-level. You know Custom Fields, Automations, Dashboards, Time Tracking, Guest permissions, multiple views (Board, List, Gantt, Calendar), and you can set up a workspace in your sleep. ClickUp certification is a plus, but real-world results matter more.

Systems Thinker — You don't just build task lists. You think about how work actually flows through a team, where things break down, and how to design systems that prevent problems before they happen.

Agency Experience (Preferred) — You've worked with or inside a marketing agency, digital agency, or creative agency before. You understand the reality of managing multiple clients, multiple tea
mbers, and multiple deadlines all at once.

Detail-Obsessed — You catch the small things. Naming conventions, status labels, field consistency — you care about the details that make a system feel clean and professional.

Proactive Communicator — You don't wait to be told what to do. You see a problem, you flag it. You have an idea, you share it. You finish something, you let people know. You're comfortable communicating in English (written and verbal) with the team and eventually with clients.

Self-Starter — You can take a vague goal like "I want to track everyone's time and show clients their progress" and turn it into a fully functional system without needing your hand held every step of the way.



Requirements



2+ years of hands-on ClickUp experience (building workspaces, not just using them as a tea
mber)

Experience setting up automations, custom workflows, and dashboards in ClickUp

Experience with time tracking setup and reporting

Strong English communication skills (written and spoken)

Reliable internet connection and a professional remote work setup

Available to work full-time during US business hours (or significant overlap)

Bonus: ClickUp certification or verified consultant status

Bonus: Experience with marketing agencies or understanding of SEO/content/web development workflows

Bonus: Experience with other tools we may use (Google Workspace, Slack, etc.)





What We Offer



Full-time position with a growing agency that values its people

The chance to truly own and shape our operations — not just follow someone else's system

A team that actually listens when you say "there's a better way to do this"

Long-term stability — we're not looking for a quick project; we're looking for someone to grow with us

Competitive salary based on experience





How to Apply

Don't just send a generic resume. We want to see that you're the real deal. In your application, please include:



A short intro — Tell us who you are and why this role excites you (2-3 sentences is fine, no novels needed).

Your ClickUp experience — Describe a workspace you built or significantly improved. What was the situation? What did you set up? What was the result? Be specific.

A Loom video or screenshots (strongly preferred) — Walk us through a ClickUp workspace you've built. Show us your dashboards, automations, workflows. Let us see your work. This is the single best way to stand out.

Your availability and expected salary — Be upfront. No games.



Applications without #2 or #3 will be moved to the bottom of the pile. We're looking for proof, not promises.

Your Role – Execution Across CRM, Ads & Data
