title: GoHighLevel Specialist — Local Legends Marketing
description:
GoHighLevel Architect & Automation Beast — Turn Our CRM Into an AI-Powered Client Machine



Job Description

We don't just want someone who "knows GoHighLevel." We want someone who can make it do things our competitors didn't even know were possible.

Local Legends Marketing is a growing agency that helps local service businesses dominate their markets. We're talking roofers, contractors, HVAC companies, plumbers, landscapers — the businesses that keep neighborhoods running. We generate leads, build websites, run ads, manage SEO, and close deals for our clients.

But here's the thing: we're not just a marketing agency. We're building a SaaS platform on top of GoHighLevel that we sell to our clients as their own branded CRM, communication hub, and lead management system. Think of it as their entire business operating system — powered by us, branded for them.

We need someone who doesn't just set up GHL sub-accounts and call it a day. We need someone who can engineer the entire ecosystem — the workflows, the AI, the pipelines, the dashboards, the integrations, the automations — and turn our GHL instance into something that rivals platforms like Hatch, Avoca, Phonely, and SalesApe... all built inside GoHighLevel.

If that sentence just made you sit up in your chair, you're in the right place.



The Vision: What We're Building

We want our GHL platform to be the single source of truth for every client. Here's the full picture:

AI-Powered Communication (Our "Hatch Killer")

Hatch charges home service companies thousands per month for AI that answers calls, texts leads, and books appointments. We want to build the same thing — or better — inside GHL using its native AI Employee suite:



Voice AI that answers inbound calls 24/7, qualifies the lead, asks the right questions (What service do you need? What's your address? What's the urgency?), and books the appointment directly onto the calendar — no human needed.

Conversation AI across SMS, webchat,
 Messenger, and Instagram DMs that responds to leads in seconds, nurtures them with multi-touch follow-up sequences, handles objections, answers FAQs, and books appointments automatically.

Outbound AI follow-up — when a lead goes cold, the system re-engages them via text and
 campaigns without anyone on the client's team lifting a finger.

Speed to lead that's measured in seconds, not hours. The 
nt a lead comes in from Google Ads,
, a form, a phone call, Yelp, Angi — the AI is on it immediately.



We want our clients to look at Hatch, Avoca, Phonely, and SalesApe... and then realize they already have something just as powerful built into the platform we provide them.

Full Lead Attribution & Source Tracking

We need to know exactly where every lead comes from and what happens to it. This means:



UTM parameter tracking on every campaign, every ad, every landing page — stored on the contact record as first-touch and latest-touch attribution.

Custom properties/fields for tracking lead source (Google Ads,
, organic SEO, referral, Yelp, Angi, LSA, direct mail, etc.), lead type, service requested, property type, and any other qualifying data.

Integration with WhatConverts (or building equivalent tracking natively in GHL) so we can see exactly which marketing channel generated which lead, which appointment, which estimate, and which sale — down to the keyword level.

Dashboard reporting that shows our clients (and us) the full funnel: leads in ? appointments set ? estimates given ? jobs sold ? revenue generated — broken down by source.



Pipeline Management: The Full Customer Journey

This is where it gets detailed. We need pipelines that track the entire lifecycle from lead to closed deal, with specific stages for home service businesses:

Lead Pipeline:

New Lead ? Contacted ? Qualified ? Appointment Set ? 1-Leg Appointment OR 2-Leg Appointment ? Estimate/Pitch Given ? Sold ? Job Scheduled ? Job Complete ? Follow-Up/Review Request

Here's what the "1-leg" and "2-leg" distinction means in home services, and our system needs to handle both:



1-Leg Appointment = The homeowner AND the decision-maker are the same person (or both decision-makers are present). The sales rep can pitch and close on the spot. One visit, one shot.

2-Leg Appointment = Only one decision-maker is present. The sales rep gives the estimate, but the homeowner says "I need to talk to my spouse/partner." This requires a follow-up — a second "leg" — to close the deal. The system needs to automatically trigger follow-up sequences for 2-leg appointments.



Additional pipeline details we need:



"Pitched" status = an estimate was given (whether 1-leg or 2-leg)

"Sold" status = the deal closed and a contract/agreement was signed

Automatic follow-up workflows triggered by pipeline stage changes (e.g., when a deal moves to "Estimate Given — 2-Leg," kick off a nurture sequence targeting the second decision-maker)

Revenue tracking on opportunities so we can report on close rates, average ticket size, and revenue by source

Lost deal tracking with reasons (price too high, went with competitor, no response, etc.)



SaaS Mode & White-Label Setup

We're running GHL in SaaS mode (Agency Pro at $497/mo). You'll help us:



Build and maintain our white-labeled platform so clients see our branding, not GHL's

Create snapshot templates that we can deploy to new clients in minutes — pre-loaded with pipelines, workflows, automations, custom fields, forms, and dashboards specific to their industry

Set up rebilling so clients pay us for SMS,
, AI usage, and other features — turning usage into recurring revenue

Design the client onboarding experience so new clients get a fully functional system from day one

Manage snapshot versioning so we can track changes and roll back if needed



Integrations We Need



WhatConverts (or native GHL attribution) for call tracking and lead source data

Google Ads &
 Ads for conversion tracking and lead import

Google My Business for review management and messaging

Stripe for payment processing and invoicing

Zapier / Make for any custom integrations that GHL doesn't handle natively

Google Analytics / GA4 for website tracking

Potential future integrations: ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, Jobber, or other field service platforms





What You'll Actually Be Doing Day-to-Day

Week 1-4: Audit & Architecture — Rip apart what we currently have (if anything), map our workflows, and design the system architecture from scratch. Spaces, pipelines, custom fields, naming conventions, snapshot structure — the foundation.

Month 2-3: Build Phase — Construct the workflows, automations, AI agents, pipelines, dashboards, and reporting. Set up Voice AI and Conversation AI. Build the client-facing white-label experience. Create snapshot templates for our key industries.

Ongoing: Optimize, Scale, Support — Monitor AI performance, tweak workflows based on data, troubleshoot issues, onboard new clients into the platform, train our team, and continuously improve the system. You'll also stay on top of GHL's constant feature releases (they ship updates weekly) and figure out how to leverage new capabilities.



Who You Are

GHL Power User — You know GoHighLevel inside and out. Workflows, pipelines, custom fields, triggers, AI Employee (Voice AI + Conversation AI), SaaS mode, snapshots, white-labeling, rebilling, phone system setup, domain configuration — you've done it all. Not just tutorials. Real builds for real businesses.

Automation Architect — You think in "if this, then that" at a deep level. You can design multi-branch workflows with conditional logic, wait steps, goal events, and webhook triggers. You've built complex automations that span the full customer journey.

AI Builder — You've configured GHL's Voice AI and Conversation AI to actually work well — not just turned it on and hoped for the best. You understand prompt engineering, agent goals, appointment booking setup, calendar mapping, and how to train the AI to sound natural and on-brand.

Pipeline & CRM Expert — You've built sales pipelines for service businesses and understand concepts like 1-leg vs 2-leg appointments, estimate tracking, close rates, and revenue attribution. You know how to structure custom fields and opportunity properties to make reporting actually useful.

Data & Attribution Nerd — You understand UTM parameters, lead source tracking, first-touch vs. last-touch attribution, and how to build dashboards that show the full funnel from ad click to closed deal. Experience with WhatConverts is a huge plus.

Home Services Savvy — You understand (or can quickly learn) how local service businesses operate — the sales cycle, the appointment flow, the estimate process, the seasonal patterns. This isn't abstract. These are real roofers and plumbers counting on this system to grow their businesses.

Proactive Problem-Solver — You don't wait to be told GHL released a new feature. You find it, test it, and come to us with "Hey, I just set up X and it's going to save our clients 5 hours a week." That's the energy we want.



Requirements



2+ years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience (building sub-accounts, workflows, and pipelines — not just using the CRM as a contact list)

Proven experience setting up GHL SaaS mode / white-label for an agency

Experience building and configuring GHL Voice AI and/or Conversation AI agents

Experience with pipeline management and opportunity tracking in GHL

Strong understanding of lead attribution, UTM tracking, and marketing funnel reporting

Experience with workflow automations (multi-step, conditional, webhook-based)

Strong English communication skills (written and spoken)

Reliable internet and a professional remote work setup

Available full-time during US business hours (or significant overlap)



Bonus Points:



Experience with WhatConverts or similar call tracking / attribution platforms

Experience building GHL solutions for home service businesses specifically

Knowledge of platforms like Hatch, Avoca, Phonely, or SalesApe (so you understand what we're competing against)

GHL certification or active participation in GHL communities

Experience with Zapier, Make, or custom API integrations

Basic understanding of Google Ads,
 Ads, and LSA (Local Service Ads)





What We Offer



Full-time position with a fast-growing agency that's building something big

You won't just be maintaining a CRM — you'll be architecting a SaaS product that we sell to dozens (eventually hundreds) of clients

Direct access to the owner — your ideas matter and will be implemented

A team that values builders, not just button-clickers

Long-term role with growth potential as the platform scales

Competitive salary based on experience





How to Apply

Generic applications go straight to the trash. We're building something serious and we need someone who takes this seriously. Here's what we want to see:



A short intro — Who are you, and why does this role fire you up? (2-3 sentences. Save the novel.)

Your GHL portfolio — Describe 1-2 GoHighLevel builds you're most proud of. What did the client need? What did you build? What were the results? Be specific — mention workflows, pipelines, AI setup, dashboards, whatever you built.

A Loom video or screenshots (STRONGLY preferred) — Walk us through a GHL sub-account or workflow you've built. Show us the pipelines, the automations, the AI agents, the dashboards. This is the #1 way to stand out. If you can show us a SaaS mode / white-label setup, even better.

Your take on the vision — In 3-5 sentences, tell us how you'd approach building what we described above. What would you tackle first? What's the biggest challenge? What tools or features would you lean on? We want to see how you think.

Your availability and expected salary — Be upfront.



Applications without a Loom video or screenshots will be deprioritized. We need proof, not promises.



Quick Reference: The Platforms We're Competing With

So you understand the landscape, here's what our clients are currently being pitched by competitors. We want to build these capabilities INTO our GHL platform:

Hatch (
) — AI-powered voice, SMS, and
 for home service businesses. Answers calls, books appointments, follows up on leads automatically. This is our #1 target to replicate inside GHL.

Avoca AI (avoca.ai) — AI CSR (customer service rep) for home services. Answers calls, books jobs, coaches real CSRs, integrates with ServiceTitan. Known for 90?ter-hours booking rates.

Phonely AI (phonely.ai) — Voice AI for contractors. Makes outbound calls, gathers job details, schedules appointments. Natural-sounding conversations with tone detection.

SalesApe AI (salesape.ai) — AI sales agent that responds to inbound leads via
, SMS, chat, and WhatsApp. Qualifies leads, books appointments, and feeds everything into your CRM in real-time.

Your job is to study what these platforms do, then build it better — natively inside GoHighLevel — so our clients get all of this included in the platform we already provide them.



Local Legends Marketing — We help local businesses become legends. Now we need the engineer who builds the machine that makes it all run.

Let's go.

description:
We’re looking for a sharp, analytical, and forward-thinking AI Specialist who understands content, data, and digital systems—and knows how to turn insights into action. If you love working with data, writing with purpose, optimizing systems, and using AI tools to create smarter workflows… keep reading. This role is perfect for someone who blends sports analytics, risk analysis, content creation, and AI-powered automation into one powerful skill set.



About the Role

You’ll help us build and optimize AI-driven systems that support content creation, data analysis, research, and digital growth.

This is not just about using ChatGPT. We want someone who understands: Data, Logic, SEO, Automation, Risk analysis, Algorithm-driven thinking. Someone who can think critically, write clearly, and build smarter workflows using AI tools.



Key Responsibilities

• Use AI tools to generate, refine, and optimize written content (blogs, newsletters, scripts, guides).

• Analyze data and turn it into meaningful insights.

• Support SEO strategy using AI-assisted research and optimization.

• Create structured prompts and workflows for AI systems.

• Assist with algorithmic content development and structured logic writing.

• Help improve internal systems through automation and AI tools.

• Conduct research and transform findings into clear, organized outputs.

• Support social media and digital marketing efforts using AI-driven strategies.

• Monitor trends in sports, betting, analytics, and AI applications.



We sometimes ask for flexible support on related tasks, but nothing outside your skill set—and always with clear communication.



Required Tools & Skills:

• You should be comfortable using:

• ChatGPT or similar AI writing tools

• Social media platforms 
, Instagram, YouTube)



Bonus if you have:

• Experience in sports analytics or esports

• Risk analysis background

• Experience writing algorithmic or logic-based content

• Experience working remotely and independently



What We’re Looking For:

• Strong analytical thinker

• Clear and structured writer

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Comfortable working independently

• Proactive problem-solver

• Tech-savvy and curious about AI advancements

• Experience in sports, betting, financial risk, or data-driven industries is a big plus



Working Hours:

• Full-Time

• 8 AM to 5 PM CST



Non-Negotiables:

• Screenshot and productivity tracker required.

• Must work during the specified hours (8 AM to 5 PM CST).



How to Apply:

To be considered, please send the following:

1. Your updated resume

2. A short video introduction

3. Are you okay with a $5 hourly rate?

4. Please share your age

5. DISC result - Please take the DISC test at 
 and send me your profile.



Please do not apply if you do not meet the required qualifications outlined above. We are seeking candidates with the specific experience and skills to ensure the success of this role. Applications that do not meet the criteria will not be considered.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter - US Contractors (Part-time to Full-time)
description:
Salary



Base salary + $ per booked appointment + 2-4% commission per close.



Realistic earnings: $800-$2,500/month part-time, $2,500-$6,000/month full-time



We will adjust compensation based on performance to make sure you are well compensated based on results.





About Us



Heavy Duty Leads helps US contractor businesses (concrete, roofing, plumbing, HVAC, septic) get more customers through online marketing. Our clients pay $5,750-$18,750 for our services.



We need appointment setters to call US business owners and book discovery calls.





The Role



• Make 50-100 cold calls per day to US contractor business owners

• Book 10-20 qualified discovery calls per week

• Follow up with warm leads via
 and phone

• Log all activity in our CRM





Work Hours



US business hours required. You pick your schedule, but calls must happen when US business owners are available:

• 8am - 6pm Eastern Time (8pm - 6am Manila time)

• Minimum 4-hour shifts

• 20-40 hours per week





Requirements - Must Have



• Sales or cold calling experience (any industry)

• Confident speaking voice in English (the less accent the better)

• Reliable internet (25+ Mbps) and quiet space for calls

• Available during US business hours (though I don’t care what hours you work)

• Can handle rejection and keep dialing





Requirements - Nice to Have



• Experience calling US businesses

• B2B sales background

• Familiar with CRM tools





Compensation Details



Base Pay: Negotiable based on experience.



Per Appointment (shows only).



Note: We're building this system and will adjust compensation to make sure top performers are well paid. If you perform, you will earn.





How to Apply



Apply here: 



Your application must include:



1. Loom video (3-5 min, face on camera) with:

   • Introduction about yourself and your cold calling experience

   • Mock cold call to a roofing company owner named Mike



2. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link



3. Expected hourly rate



4. Reasonably availability in US Eastern Time



We review applications within 48 hours. Top candidates get a paid trial (10 recorded calls at base rate + show bonuses).





Hiring Process



1. Application (this form)

2. 15-minute interview if your Loom is solid

3. Paid trial (base + bonuses for booked calls) + paid test tasks.

4. Hire decision



No endless interviews. We move fast.



Job Type



Part-time (can become full-time for top performers)



Industry: Marketing / Lead Generation

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Next.js)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Developer to join our remote team and help design, build, launch, and maintain high-quality web applications. This is a hands-on senior role for someone who can move quickly, write clean and scalable code, and take ownership from architecture through deployment.



You should be highly experienced in modern JavaScript frameworks, cloud-based deployment workflows, and production-ready engineering practices. We are especially looking for someone with strong Next.js, Docker, and CI/CD pipeline experience, and a proven track record of shipping real applications that users actively use.



What You’ll Do

Build and maintain modern web applications using Next.js, React, and related technologies

Architect scalable frontend and backend systems

Set up, improve, and manage CI/CD pipelines

Containerize applications and services using Docker

Deploy and manage applications across staging and production environments

Collaborate with product, design, and other developers to deliver polished features

Write clean, testable, maintainable code

Review code, improve engineering standards, and help guide technical decisions

Troubleshoot production issues and optimize performance, reliability, and security

Take ownership of projects from concept to launch

Required Skills

Strong senior-level experience as a full-stack or web developer

Expert-level experience with Next.js and React

Strong knowledge of JavaScript and/or TypeScript

Experience building and launching production-ready web applications

Strong experience with CI/CD pipelines

Strong experience with Docker and containerized workflows

Experience with APIs, backend integrations, and modern web architecture

Experience with Git-based workflows and team collaboration

Good understanding of performance optimization, security, and best practices

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Strong communication skills in English

Nice to Have

Experience with Node.js backend development

Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Vercel

Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, or similar

Experience with automated testing and quality assurance workflows

Experience leading projects or mentoring other developers

Familiarity with authentication, payments, analytics, and third-party integrations

What We’re Looking For



We want someone who is not just technically strong, but also practical, reliable, and product-minded. You should be able to understand business goals, make sound technical decisions, and deliver solutions without excessive oversight.



This role is best suited for a developer who has actually built and shipped live applications, not just worked on internal codebases.



Application Requirements



To be considered, applicants must provide:



A current resume or LinkedIn profile

A portfolio of live applications you have built or played a major role in building

Links to working live projects we can review

A short explanation of your role in each project

A brief video introduction telling us:

who you are

your experience level

the kinds of applications you’ve built

the technologies you work with

why you’re a good fit for this role

Important Note



Applications without live project examples and a video introduction will not be prioritized. We want to review real work, understand your communication style, and get a sense of how you think about building products.



Location

Remote

Open to candidates who can work effectively across time zones and communicate consistently

Seniority

Senior Level

How to Apply



Please send your application with:



Resume or LinkedIn

Portfolio and links to live applications

Short summary of your contribution to those applications

Video introduction

title: Shopify Full Stack Developer (AI-Focused)
description:
Full-Time Shopify Full Stack Developer (AI-Focused) – Immediate Start



We’re hiring a full-time Shopify Full Stack Developer to join our team at Icy Studios.



This role is ideal for someone who is not just a developer, but someone who understands how to leverage AI tools to work faster and smarter.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Build and maintain Shopify stores and custom features

- Develop and manage Shopify apps and integrations

- Review, debug, and improve AI-generated code (using tools like Claude)

- Ensure clean, scalable, and high-performing code

- Work closely with our team to ship features quickly and efficiently



What We’re Looking For:



- Strong experience with Shopify development (themes + apps)

- Solid full stack development skills

- Experience using AI tools (e.g. Claude) for coding, debugging, or optimization

- Ability to review and refine AI-generated code (not just write from scratch)

- Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving skills

- Available to start immediately

- Fully available (not working other jobs) – this is a full-time role requiring focus

- Must be available 9 AM – 5 PM CST



Important Requirements (READ CAREFULLY)



To be considered, you must include ALL of the following in your application:



1. Your expected monthly salary (based on your experience)

2. A link to your updated resume

3. A short intro video (1–2 minutes)

4. Links to your portfolio / past work (Shopify projects preferred)



APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT FOLLOW THESE INSTRUCTIONS WILL NOT BE REVIEWED!



Additional Notes



*Salary: Dependent on experience

*Must be willing to use a minimum of 5 APPLY POINTS

*We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with the company



If you’re someone who understands where development is going with AI and can execute at a high level, we’d love to hear from you!

title: 2D Landscape Drafter — AutoCAD
description:
ORO Design is a US-based landscape design studio producing high-end 3D renderings, 2D site plans, and video walkthroughs for outdoor living contractors nationwide. We operate on a membership model and deliver 40+ projects per month and growing. Our clients are professional contractors who resell our designs under their own brand.

We are hiring a 2D Landscape Drafter to produce scaled AutoCAD site plans that serve as the foundation for our 3D rendering production. You will receive project briefs, build accurate base maps, and design complete 2D landscape plans that our 3D team turns into photorealistic renders.

This is a full-time remote position. You will work directly with our Design Director within a structured daily workflow. The work is consistent, the expectations are high, and the standards are clearly defined.

What You Will Do

— Draft scaled 2D landscape site plans in AutoCAD using our templates and standards

— Build accurate base maps using aerial imagery and property records

— Design complete planting layouts and hardscape plans

— Label all materials, plants, dimensions, and square footages clearly

— Deliver 1–2 completed plans per business day

What We Require

— Landscape Architecture degree or equivalent design education

— Minimum 2 years of professional AutoCAD experience (not academic only)

— Solid knowledge of US hardscape: patios, pavers, retaining walls, pergolas

— Comfortable working in feet and inches — all projects use imperial measurements

— Ability to apply proportion, balance, layering, contrast, and unity in design

— Clear written English communication

What We Offer

— $900–$1,500/month based on experience, with bonus and incentive opportunity

— Consistent full-time work volume — 40+ projects per month and growing

— Structured workflow with clear standards

— A culture that values growth — we want people committed to improving personally and professionally over time

How to Apply

 your resume and 2–3 AutoCAD work samples (PDF) to 
 with the subject line: 2D Drafter Application — [Your Name]. Candidates who do not include AutoCAD samples will not be considered. Qualified applicants will receive a written application to complete as the next step.

title: Senior Local SEO Specialist
description:
Senior Local SEO Specialist

Full-Time | Remote | $1,250 to $2,500+ per month + Performance Bonus



About The Lyon Brand

The Lyon Brand is a boutique local SEO agency focused on one goal:

Help high-ticket landscaping and service businesses dominate Google Maps and generate high-intent leads.

We are lean. We are focused. We care about results.



Our Guiding Principles

We operate on four standards.

Integrity: We act with honesty and transparency with clients and each other.

Resilience: We stay calm under pressure and adapt when things shift.

Continuous growth: We review what works, fix what does not, and improve every month.

Adventure and exploration: We test ideas. We take smart risks. We stay curious.

If these standards do not fit you, this role will not fit either.



The Role

Senior Local SEO Specialist will own 8-12+ campaigns from start to finish (likely will have a task-focused SEO Specialist under you). 



This is not a task role. You own outcomes that matter to the livelihoods of the businesses we work with.



What you will do:

-Audit websites, Google Business Profiles, backlinks, and tracking setups

-Build and execute campaign strategy for Map Pack and supporting organic rankings

-Perform keyword research and guide service and location page direction

-Improve on-page SEO including titles, internal linking, and content structure

-Manage and improve Google Business Profiles including categories, services, reviews, and engagement

-Direct citation cleanup and local directory builds where needed

-Oversee link building strategy and anchor planning

-Configure and manage GA4, GSC, and GTM

-Monitor rankings and diagnose drops quickly

-Send weekly internal updates and build clear monthly client reports

-Use AI tools to improve workflows and internal systems

-If you produce strong results, you will earn more responsibility and more pay.



What You Must Already Know How To Do:

-Manage local SEO campaigns with 4 to 5 years of experience

-Rank physical-location businesses in the Map Pack

-Handle multiple accounts at once

-Diagnose ranking drops with logic, not guesses

-Improve Google Business Profiles strategically

-Execute on-page and technical SEO properly



You must feel comfortable working inside:

-Google Analytics

-Google Search Console

-Google Tag Manager

-SEMrush or Ahrefs

-Screaming Frog

-Local Dominator or similar local rank trackers

-WordPress, Webflow, Duda, and Squarespace. You will not build design sites, but you will manage them & create pages from templates.

-You should already use AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude in your daily workflow for research, analysis, and content direction. We actively build AI into our processes and strategy.



Who You Are:

-You own outcomes, not just tasks

-You do not need reminders

-You raise issues early

-You care about leads, not checklists

-You think clearly under pressure

-You improve systems over time

-You want to grow with a small team



If you want a quiet role where you complete tickets and disappear, this will not work.



How to Apply:


 

Include:

1. Resume

2. Two to three case studies with real metrics. Map Pack results preferred.

3. A three minute video answering:

-Who are you and what motivates you

-Why you enjoy SEO

-The hardest local ranking issue you solved and how you approached it

-Why this role fits you



*Do not read from AI. Copy and paste answers will be rejected.

title: General VA – Admin & Operations Support
description:
We are seeking a dedicated and detail-oriented Admin & Operations Support Specialist to join our team. This part-time role is vital in ensuring smooth administrative operations and effective record-keeping. The successful candidate will provide general administrative support to keep business operations running seamlessly.



About The Company

Rich Relationships Club is a thriving community dedicated to building meaningful connections and providing exceptional experiences for our members. As we grow, we are looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our admin and operations, ensuring smooth workflows and outstanding member experiences.

Led by Selena Soo, a USA Today bestselling author of Rich Relationships: Create a Million-Dollar Network for Your Business. Over her first 10 years, Selena has generated more than $13 million in revenue through dozens of multi-6 figure and 7-figure launches and built over 400 affiliate and referral partnerships.



An expert in publicity, Selena has helped thousands of entrepreneurs land media coverage in O, The Oprah Magazine, Forbes, Business Insider, and The Drew Barrymore Show.

Our mission is to help visionary people build their brand, reach more people, and change the world. We offer the energy and excitement of a start-up, alongside the chance to make a massive impact in the lives of thousands.



Key Responsibilities:



Member Management (Club & Mastery Programs):

— Add new member information to relevant spreadsheets (key stats, fulfillment, directories, phone records)

— Send contracts and agreements, track signatures, and update fulfillment sheets

— Create and manage intake form templates and connection tracker sheets

— Update sheets after members submit intake forms

— Update birthday events and place orders for welcome gifts

— Coordinate with tea
mbers for content creation and approvals

— Schedule calendar invites for events, mixers, and communications



 & Communication Coordination:

— Log approved
s and newsletters in Asana, update statuses, and monitor delivery

— Assist with quality assurance by reviewing and testing
s before sending



General Admin Support:

— Maintain organized folders, documents, and templates for Club and Mastery programs

— Support smooth operations across multiple projects by following SOPs

— Anticipate team needs and proactively track tasks and deadlines

— Assist with miscellaneous tasks as needed to ensure smooth operations



Qualifications:

— Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or similar role

— Strong attention to detail and excellent organizational skills

— Comfortable working with spreadsheets, Google Workspace, Asana, and basic project management tools

— Strong written and verbal communication skills

— Ability to follow SOPs and process-oriented workflows

— Self-starter with the ability to manage multiple tasks



Preferred Skills:

— Familiarity with member-based organizations or clubs

— Experience with
 campaign management or quality assurance

— Ability to quickly learn new tools and adapt to changing processes



Experience with Technology & Tools:

— Proficiency in GSuite (Google Sheets, Docs, Drive) is required

— Familiarity with tools like Keap, GoHighLevel, Asana, Airtable, or Slack is a plus



Work Hours & Expectations:

— This is a part-time position, averaging 4 hours per day

— During event periods, hours may increase to 6–8 per day; flexibility is essential

— Candidates with multiple full-time clients may find it challenging to manage the workload during busy periods



If this position sounds like a great fit for you, please complete the Google Form:

— Messages via OnlineJobs.ph will not be considered

title: Long-Form Video Editor (Remote) — Full-Time | $7–$11/hr USD
description:
We're recruiting a sharp, detail-oriented long-form video editor who understands story structure, retention hooks, and how to keep viewers watching for 10, 20, even 60+ minutes.

We have our own b-roll library, motion graphics, and creative frameworks. But we need you to be resourceful and bring ideas to the table.

The role:



Edit long-form YouTube videos, podcasts, interviews, and documentary-style content

Structure raw footage into compelling narratives with strong pacing

Leverage our b-roll library, motion graphics & creative guidelines

Add chapters, captions, and retention-boosting cuts that reduce drop-off

Turn around polished edits without sacrificing quality



What we're seeking:



1–2+ years editing long-form content (YouTube, docuseries, podcasts, etc.)

Proficient in After Effects, Premiere Pro, and DaVinci Resolve (plus)

Strong grasp of story arc, pacing, and audience retention

Experience with chapter markers, captions, and YouTube optimization (plus)

Clear communication and consistent on-time delivery



Rate & potential:



$7.00–$11.00 USD/hour (based on experience and turnaround time)

Full-time opportunity

Room to grow — transition into lead editor or creative strategist roles



About the Team:

We're a creative team of 3 full-time video editors (2 short-form, 1 long-form) and we're looking to bring a second long-form editor on board. You'd be joining a team that moves fast, communicates clearly, and takes the craft seriously.

To submit:

: 

Subject: "I actually read the instructions"

Resume (PDF): Lastname.Firstname.LongFormEditor.pdf

Looking forward to your submission!

title: Web Designer & Developer (Virtual Assistant)
description:
About the Role



We are a growing agency looking for a talented and reliable Web Designer & Developer to join our remote team. In this role, you will be the creative and technical engine behind our clients' websites — designing beautiful mockups in Figma and bringing them to life on WordPress. You will also support clients on Wix and Squarespace with ongoing updates and maintenance.

This is a full-time position with consistent work, clear communication, and a supportive team. We're looking for someone who takes ownership of their work, communicates proactively, and delivers high-quality output on time.



What You'll Be Doing



• Design professional website mockups in Figma (primarily 2 mockups per project — desktop and mobile views)

• Develop and build websites on WordPress based on approved Figma designs

• Perform ongoing website updates and edits for clients on Wix and Squarespace

• Ensure websites are responsive, fast-loading, and cross-browser compatible

• Implement basic on-page SEO best practices during development

• Communicate project progress and flag any blockers or timeline concerns proactively

• Revise designs and builds based on client and internal feedback

• Maintain organized project files and documentation



Requirements



Design Skills



• Strong proficiency in Figma, you can design clean, modern, and client-ready mockups independently

• Good eye for layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

• Experience designing for both desktop and mobile

• Experience in graphic design, creating ads for social media when needed



Development Skills



• Solid experience building websites on WordPress (themes, Elementor or similar page builders, custom CSS)

• Comfortable making updates and edits on Wix and Squarespace

• Basic knowledge of HTML and CSS

• Ability to translate a Figma design into a pixel-accurate website build



Work Style & Communication



• Fluent in written English, clear, professional communication is a must

• Reliable with deadlines and able to manage your own time effectively

• Comfortable using tools like Slack, Trello, Asana, or similar project management platforms

• Responds to messages within business hours and proactively communicates updates

Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience with WooCommerce or basic e-commerce setups

• Familiarity with Google Analytics, Search Console, or basic SEO tools

• Experience creating amazing graphic designs in Canva or Adobe tools

• Knowledge of website speed optimization (image compression, caching plugins, etc.)



What We Offer



• $700 CAD per month Paid Semi Monthly 15th and last day of the month

• Full-time, fully remote position, work from wherever you are

• Stable, ongoing work with a consistent flow of projects

• Supportive team environment with clear briefs and feedback

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate, we're not looking for short-term help



How to Apply



If you think you are the right person for this role, please create and send us a 1-minute video introducing yourself, sharing your background, and explaining why you would be the best person for this role. Please also forward your resume and your earliest available start date to Contact at umteencompany dot com. Candidates will not be interviewed if you do not send a 1-minute video.

title: Executive Assistant (Clinical Background + Marketing/Design)
description:
Compensation: $1,000/month starting base (90-day probation), increasing to $1,200/month upon successful completion + 13th Month Pay + Performance Bonuses

Working Hours: Primarily US Eastern Time, but highly flexible as long as deadlines are met and the work gets done.



About the Role:

I am looking for a highly self-directed and proactive professional to join my team. You will be acting as my right hand, managing administrative tasks, helping build and edit online medical curriculum, and driving social media marketing for a niche SaaS product.



I do not micromanage. I provide the objective and trust that you will figure out the best way to execute it, making smart decisions on your own and only reaching out when you hit a genuine roadblock.



AI Policy:

I strongly encourage the use of AI tools (Google Gemini, etc.) to improve your efficiency, help with marketing copy, and scale your output. However, you are 100% responsible for the accuracy of the final product. You must rigorously review, fact-check, and edit all AI-generated content—especially regarding medical curriculum. Blindly copying and pasting AI output without verifying it is unacceptable.



Core Responsibilities:



Medical Curriculum Support: Reviewing and revising complex PDFs and PowerPoint presentations. You must have enough of a medical background (pharmacy, medical assisting, EKG) to spot clinical errors, typos, or inconsistencies.



Design/Tech Formatting: Formatting, designing, and editing complex PDFs and PPTs to look highly professional.



Marketing & SaaS Growth: Managing social media accounts, creating content, and executing light cold-outreach campaigns to grow our SaaS.



Executive Admin: Inbox management, calendar scheduling, and general operational support.



Requirements:



A verifiable background in healthcare, nursing, pharmacy, or medical assisting.



Advanced proficiency in Adobe Acrobat, Canva, PowerPoint, or other PDF/presentation editing software.



Experience in social media management and basic digital marketing/outreach.



Excellent written English and extreme attention to detail.



A reliable computer, high-speed internet, and a backup power/internet plan.



How to Apply:

If you are ready to take ownership of this role, please apply with your resume, a brief cover letter, and a link to your portfolio (Google Drive, Canva, website, etc.) showcasing your design work, specifically any formatted PDFs, PowerPoint presentations, or social media graphics.



To ensure you have the clinical attention to detail required to review our curriculum, please make the subject line of your application: Clinical EA - [Your Name]. Additionally, in the very first sentence of your cover letter, please tell me what is clinically wrong with the following medication instruction: "Take 1 tablet of Lisinopril 10mg PRN for low blood pressure." Applications that do not follow these instructions will be discarded.

title: Marketing Data Dashboard Specialist (Looker Studio)
description:
Upward Entertainment Marketing is a digital marketing agency that specializes in helping family entertainment centers and multi-attraction venues grow their business through digital marketing. Our clients include trampoline parks, bowling centers, arcades, and other entertainment destinations across the United States.



We are looking for a detail-oriented contractor who can help us build and maintain marketing performance dashboards using Google Looker Studio.



Role Overview

We need help creating a professional reporting dashboard that combines data from multiple marketing platforms into a clear, easy-to-understand report for our clients.



The first project will involve building a Looker Studio dashboard for one of our clients, and then converting that dashboard into a reusable template that we can use for future clients.



This will begin as a part-time contract position, with the potential for additional work as our agency grows.



Key Responsibilities



• Build a marketing reporting dashboard in Google Looker Studio

• Combine data from multiple marketing platforms into a single report

• Create a reusable dashboard template for future clients

• Connect and manage data sources including:

    – Google Analytics (GA4)

    – Google Ads

    – Google Search Console

    – Google Business Profile

    – Google Sheets (for manual data such as SEO keyword tracking)



• Organize dashboards into clear sections such as:

    – Executive Overview

    – Website Traffic

    – SEO Performance

    – Paid Advertising Performance

    – Google Business Profile / Local Search

    – Reviews & Reputation



• Design dashboards that are visually clean, professional, and easy for clients to understand

• Ensure dashboards can support multi-location businesses and allow filtering by location



Platforms We Use



• Google Analytics (GA4)

• Google Ads

• Google Search Console

• Google Business Profile

• Google Sheets

• Go High Level (CRM and Reputation Management platform)



Experience integrating or visualizing Go High Level data in Looker Studio is a plus, but not required.



Nice to Have (Not Required)



• Experience working with marketing agencies or digital marketing reporting

• Experience building dashboards for multi-location businesses

• Familiarity with tools such as Zapier, Make, or other data connectors



Project Scope



Initial project:



• Build a dashboard for one client

• Create a reusable dashboard template for future clients



Estimated workload:



• Approximately 5–10 hours initially

• Additional work may be available depending on performance



To Apply



Please include:



Examples or links to Looker Studio dashboards you have created



A short description of your experience building marketing dashboards



Your hourly rate



We are looking for someone reliable who can help us create a professional reporting system that we can use across many clients.

title: Go High Level (GHL) Specialist – Agency CRM & Automation Support
description:
About Us



We are a done-for-you digital marketing agency serving Family Entertainment Centers (FECs) and multi-location entertainment brands across the United States.



We use Go High Level (GHL) as:

-Our internal agency CRM

-A fulfillment platform for client services

-A white-labeled dashboard for our clients



We are looking for an experienced GHL Specialist to help us build, organize, troubleshoot, and optimize our Go High Level environment as our agency grows. You will be working directly with the Founder to free him up of these duties. These position can grow into full-time for the right person.



Role Overview:

-This is a hands-on execution role focused on system setup, organization, and optimization — not strategy or sales.

-You will be responsible for configuring and maintaining our GHL system so our leadership team can focus on strategy, client relationships, and growth.

-You will work directly with the agency founder and play a key role in building a clean, scalable backend structure.



Key Responsibilities:



Agency-Level GHL Support

-Organize and optimize our agency CRM

-Build, maintain, and improve workflows, automations, and triggers

-Assist with
 and SMS setup (LeadConnector, phone numbers, compliance)

-Customize dashboards, reporting, and user permissions

-Troubleshoot issues and recommend system improvements

-Help document processes and best practices



Client Sub-Account Setup

-Create new client sub-accounts when clients sign with us

-Apply the appropriate snapshots, roles, and custo
nu settings

-Configure accounts properly for:

-Reputation management

-Limited-access client dashboards (done-for-you model)

-Automation and reporting needs

-Connect and verify integrations (Google Business Profile, Google Analytics, etc.)



User & Access Management

-Create and manage internal tea
mber accounts

-Assign correct roles and permissions

-Ensure clients only see what they are intended to see

-Maintain a clean and secure account structure



Ongoing Optimization

-Monitor workflows and automation performance

-Identify inefficiencies and suggest improvements

-Support scaling efforts as we add more clients and tea
mbers

-Participate in occasional video calls with the agency founder for planning and alignment



Required Experience & Skills

-2–3+ years of hands-on Go High Level experience

-Strong understanding of:

--Agency View vs Sub-Accounts

--Roles, permissions, and custo
nus

--Workflows and automation logic

-
 and SMS setup and compliance

--Dashboards and reporting customization

-Experience working with digital marketing agencies

-Strong attention to detail and organization

-Ability to troubleshoot independently

-Clear written and spoken English communication



Availability Requirement

-Please include your working availability in U.S. Eastern Time (ET) in your application. Some overlap with U.S. business hours is required.



Nice-to-Have (Not Required)

--Experience supporting multi-location clients

--Familiarity with reputation management workflows

--Experience with white-labeled SaaS dashboards

--General understanding of SEO, paid ads, or digital marketing operations



Important Application Instructions (Read Carefully)



To be considered, you must follow these instructions exactly:

-Subject Line:

--Include “GHL Specialist” in the subject line of your application.



-Experience Proof (Required):

Include at least one of the following:

--A short Loom video (2–5 minutes) walking through a GHL account you have worked in

--Screenshots of workflows, automations, dashboards, or sub-accounts you personally set up

--A written explanation of a GHL workflow you built, what it does, and why it was structured that way



-Short Answer Question:

--In 3–5 sentences, answer:

--What is the difference between the Agency View and a Sub-Account in Go High Level, and why does it matter?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



Work Details

-Remote (Philippines-based)

-Part-time to start, with potential to grow

-Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

-Systems-focused role within a growing, process-driven agency

-Direct collaboration with agency leadership

title: Admin Assistant for Scheduling
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Admin Assistant. This role will play a critical role in coordinating and managing schedules, ensuring that the Drills schedule for students runs smoothly and efficiently. This position requires excellent communication skills, strong time management abilities, and a knack for problem-solving.



Responsibilities:

Maintain and adjust schedules for Drills supervisors and students to minimize or eliminate no-shows in set meetings.

Communicate with Drills supervisors and students to confirm availability, schedule drills, and resolve scheduling conflicts, ensuring to minimize or eliminate no-shows in meetings.

Address scheduling challenges and conflicts promptly and effectively, providing alternative schedules when necessary.

Utilize scheduling software and tools to streamline processes and improve efficiency.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Proven experience as a Scheduler, Coordinator, or in a similar role.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Excellent verbal and written communication abilities.

Proficiency in scheduling tools and software, such as Zoom Workspace, Google Calendar, and GoHighLevel (preferred but not required).

Ability to handle multiple tasks and deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

Problem-solving mindset with a focus on efficiency and collaboration.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.

My name is Mike Barron and I am the founder of Limelight Media, a leading online coaching and sales training academy. I'm really active on social media (Check out my IG and

A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!

Limelight Media LLC is an equal opportunity employer. title: Client Support & Operations Coordinator (Full-Time)
description:
Company: Stedi

Job Type: Part-Time (with opportunity to grow into Full-Time)



About Stedi

Stedi is a multi-level e-commerce business specializing in online sales through multiple live-streaming platforms. We work closely with streamers, partners, and customers to deliver a smooth, reliable buying experience while continuing to scale our operations.



Position Overview

mbers to ensure accuracy and consistency

Qualifications:



-Strong communication and customer service skills

-Highly organized with strong attention to detail

-Comfortable handling payment tracking and basic financial organization

-Ability to manage schedules and coordinate with multiple tea
mbers

-Self-motivated and dependable in a remote or flexible work environment

-Willingness to grow with the company and take on additional responsibility over time



Why Join Stedi



-Opportunity to grow from part-time into a full-time role

-A salary that grows with you

-Direct involvement in business operations and growth

-Work closely with a fast-growing online sales and streaming team

-Hands-on experience in customer support, operations, and outreach

title: Video Editor
description:
Full Time Video Editor

Help us turn great ideas into engaging video experiences for learners and customers worldwide.



About the Company

We’re an Australian e-learning and leadership?development business that produces premium online courses and high impact marketing campaigns. Our small, friendly team moves fast, values initiative, and believes in clear storytelling that changes lives.



What You’ll Do

60% Online Lesson Production

• Edit multi?camera course footage into clear, chapter?based lessons

• Add lower?thirds, captions, graphics, and B roll to reinforce key teaching points

• Create simple motion?graphics intros/outros and on?screen callouts

• Optimise exports for our LMS (1080p,?H.264) and organise project files for easy hand?off 



35?% Marketing & Social Content

• Repurpose lesson highlights into 15-60s reels/shorts for LinkedIn,
, Instagram, TikTok

• Craft compelling promo videos, case?study edits, and webinar openers

• Collaborate with our designer on thumbnail concepts, typography, and brand consistency 



5% Creative Development

• Brainstorm hooks, storyboards, and asset lists that maximise viewer retention

• Suggest ways to refine our brand’s visual language and motion style 



Must Have Skills & Experience

2+ years professional video?editing experience (agency, in-house, or freelancing)



Portfolio that demonstrates story?first editing and audience?driven pacing



Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro (or DaVinci Resolve) and solid After Effects/motion graphics ability



Confident with colour correction, audio sweetening, and basic sound design



Ability to organise assets, version files, and work to strict deadlines



Excellent spoken & written English; comfortable collaborating over Slack/Zoom



A reliable workstation, fast internet, and quiet workspace



Nice to Have

Experience editing educational content or explainer videos



Familiarity with Canva, Figma, or Adobe Illustrator for simple graphic tweaks



Knowledge of YouTube/Meta/TikTok best practice specs and analytics



Understanding of SEO, hooks, and retention metrics for social platforms



Work Setup

Full time, 40 hrs/week (Monday–Friday)



Core overlap 12pm – 5?pm AEST (10 am–3pm Philippine time); remaining hours flexible



100? remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines



Competitive salary (paid fortnightly in PHP) + 13th?month pay



Paid Philippine public holidays + 10 days annual leave after 6 months



Ongoing training budget and regular performance bonuses for standout work



How to Apply (via Onlinejobs.ph)

Subject line: Video Editor – 



Attach or link to your reel/portfolio (YouTube/Vimeo/Google Drive).



Include a brief CV and Onlinejobs.ph profile link/ID.



In 150 words or less, tell us one recent online ad or course video that hooked you and why it worked.



Applications without a portfolio reel will not be considered.



We review submissions daily and will contact shortlisted candidates for a paid editing test and interview. Join us and help transform expert knowledge into videos people love to watch!

title: Create Square Product Covers & Thumbnails for Teachers Pay Teachers
description:
Project Overview

I’m looking for a Canva designer to create covers and thumbnails for a series of upper elementary science stations. You’ll be working from existing templates and preview files to produce cohesive, clickable designs for Teachers Pay Teachers resources.

Each set typically includes 9 Canva Files (one per station). Each file will include one cover and three thumbnails.



What You’ll Do

Use the provided Canva templates to create covers and thumbnails

Reference preview files to pull content, wording, and images

Customize each design based on the specific science station

Ensure all designs are clear, readable, and visually strong at small sizes

Must be able to use Canva on a computer, not a tablet.



Deliverables

Canva file share link for each cover and thumbnail set

Each file must be clearly labeled with the product ID in the title using the given structured format



Design Expectations

Covers must include:

Station name

Grade-level badge (ex: NGSS Grade 5)

Two short banners describing the activity (based on templates)

Thumbnails must:

Be clean and easy to read at a small size

Highlight the main activity or concept

Prompt people to “see the preview” on the last thumbnail

Overall Style:

Use large fonts and strong visuals (these will be viewed small in search results)

Keep each set cohesive in color and style

Color schemes can vary from older resources, but designs within a station should match



When applying, use the word stations in the subject so that I know you've read the description



Assets & Tools

Preview files will be your main source for content and images

You may need to create additional images using AI:

Prompts can be created from student direction pages

Images should look realistic (photo-style), not illustrated

Layer images with worksheet pages for a classroom-resource look



Here is a 15-minute video of the task: 



Ideal Candidate

Strong experience using Canva

Comfortable working from templates while making thoughtful adjustments

Able to maintain consistency across a full set of designs

Understands how to design for Teachers Pay Teachers thumbnails (clear, bold, clickable)

Complete one set of four quality images in 15 minutes or less, and be able to complete a set of 9 Canva files in about 1.5 hours, no more than 2 hours.

title: Remote (WFH) Appointment Setter — B2B Cold Calling (SE Asia Market)
description:
About the Company:



Cybernerds is a US-based IT consulting firm specializing in Microsoft Intune, Autopilot, and cloud security. We work with

businesses across Southeast Asia — Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippines, Thailand, and Nepal — to assess and secure their Microsoft cloud environments.



The Role:

 

We are looking for a remote appointment setter to follow up with business contacts across Southeast Asia who have already received
s from our team. Your job is to call these contacts, confirm they received the
, answer basic questions about our services, and book meetings with our consultant.



This is NOT hard-selling. The contacts have already been
ed. You are following up, having a brief professional conversation, and scheduling a 15-minute introduction call.



What You'll Do:

  - Make 150+ outbound calls per day to businesses in Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippines, and surrounding countries

  - Follow up on
s already sent to IT directors, managers, and executives

  - Use a provided call script and FAQ sheet to handle conversations

  - Book meetings via Calendly when prospects are interested

  - Log all call outcomes in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

  - Provide a daily report: total dials, conversations, meetings booked, callbacks



  Requirements:

  - Clear, professional English speaking voice

  - Comfortable calling businesses and speaking with IT executives

  - Bahasa Malay or Bahasa Indonesia a strong plus

  - Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

  - Experience in outbound calling, appointment setting, or telemarketing (B2B preferred)

  - Able to follow a script while sounding natural and conversational

  - Punctual and self-motivated — this is a remote role with minimal supervision

  - Familiar with CRM tools (or willing to learn quickly)

  - Computer in good condition and fast reliable internet connectivity



  Nice to Have (Not Required):



  - Experience calling B2B contacts in SE Asia (IT industry a plus)

  - Familiarity with GoHighLevel, Instantly, or Calendly

  - Previous work in IT services, SaaS, or technology-related appointment setting



To Apply:



Send a short voice recording (30-60 seconds) introducing yourself in English, along with your resume. This helps us evaluate your communication style. Tell us about your experience with outbound calling and why you'd be a good fit.

title: Part Or Full Time SEO Strategist/Specialist (Pays Well!)
description:
Join our dynamic team as a part-time or full-time SEO Strategist, where your passion and expertise in SEO will play a pivotal role in enhancing our clients’ digital presence.



I run a content-focused SEO agency, and my right-hand SEO specialist had to leave due to health problems.



Your primary responsibilities will include crafting comprehensive content strategies, performing in-depth site audits, performing quality checks deliverables, creating content briefs that land our clients on the first page, and meticulously reviewing websites to devise SEO tactics that significantly boost our clients' online visibility.



As a key member of our team, you'll lead the charge in meticulous keyword research, working closely with various departments to meet project timelines. We're looking for someone who is not only challenge-driven but also excels in collaborative environments and is deeply committed to the art and science of SEO.

Qualifications:

* Demonstrated success in SEO strategy development and implementation.

* Skilled in the use of SEO tools and data analysis.

* Exceptional analytical and problem-solving capabilities.

* Outstanding communication skills and a strong team player.

* Meticulous attention to detail with the capacity to juggle multiple projects.

* Technical troubleshooting skills on websites are desirable but not mandatory.

* Native level English

* Must be available for some overlap with US hours for tea
etings.

Key Responsibilities:

title: Senior Video Editor & Graphic Designer (Paid Ads)
description:
Senior Video Editor & Graphic Designer



High Performance Meta Ads Creative Specialist



We are looking for a high end Video Editor and Graphic Designer who understands that creative is the single biggest lever in paid media performance.



This is not a social media content role.

This is not a Canva template role.

This is not a CapCut editing role.



This is a performance driven creative role focused specifically on building high converting ads for Meta.



You will be pivotal in how we go to market for our clients. Your work will directly impact revenue, lead quality and client growth.



If you do not have advanced experience using Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator and the wider Adobe Suite, this is not the role for you.



If you have never created ads that have generated measurable results, this is not the role for you.



About The Role



You will be responsible for producing high converting ad creatives for Meta campaigns across multiple high value service based industries.



This includes:



• Direct response video ads

• Hook driven short form creatives

• Founder led talking head edits

• Performance driven static graphics

• Motion graphics for ads

• Split test creative variations

• UGC style ads with professional polish

• Thumbnail and scroll stopping graphic concepts



You will work closely with our strategists and media buyers to:



• Develop creative concepts aligned with campaign strategy

• Interpret performance data and iterate creatives

• Build multiple variations for testing

• Understand audience psychology and buying behaviour

• Align visuals with positioning and offer angles



Your creative will not just look good. It must convert.



This Role Is For You If



• You have proven experience editing high performance ads

• You understand direct response marketing principles

• You can create thumb stopping hooks within the first 3 seconds

• You think in terms of CTR, CPA and conversion rates

• You know how to structure ads for retention and engagement

• You can take raw footage and turn it into compelling sales driven assets

• You understand pacing, sound design and motion for performance

• You are detail obsessed and proud of your craft



Experience within the Australian market is strongly preferred. Understanding local tone, culture and compliance standards is important.



This Role Is NOT For You If



• You only know Canva or CapCut

• You rely on templates for most of your work

• You have only created organic social posts

• You do not understand paid media performance

• You cannot confidently use the Adobe Suite

• You have never worked on campaigns with real budgets and measurable KPIs



We are looking for someone who takes ownership and treats client creative like their own business.



What You Will Be Measured On



• Creative performance

• Ability to produce high quality assets consistently

• Speed of iteration and testing

• Contribution to campaign growth

• Collaboration with strategy and media buying teams



The Opportunity



You will play a direct role in scaling businesses. Your work will impact real revenue.



You will work with ambitious brands looking to grow, not small one off projects.



If you are someone who wants to build portfolio pieces that actually move numbers and not just look nice, this is for you.



If this sounds like you, send through:



• Your portfolio

• Examples of paid ads you have created

• Performance results where possible

• A short note on why you believe creative drives growth



If you only have Canva or CapCut experience, please do not apply.

title: Events Coordinator
description:
About Your Startup Operations

Your Startup Operations is a boutique agency providing operational services to small businesses. We work primarily with small business owners in the United States and our vision is to give power to the people who own small businesses by delivering white glove service while maintaining flexibility, care and affordability.



Our SCORE Values

Solution-focused: Think critically and propose solutions independently.

Curiosity: Ask questions and actively seek understanding.

Ownership: Take full accountability and responsibility for your role.

Resourcefulness: Use all available resources to solve challenges or answer questions.

Excellence: Deliver high-quality work and exceptional results.



Who You Are

You can walk into an unstructured environment and bring clarity to it independently and without needing everything spelled out.

You're warm, energetic, and client-facing ready, people enjoy working with you and that comes through in every interaction.

You thrive juggling multiple priorities in fast-paced, last-minute-change environments. Context-switching doesn't throw you off.

You're proactive and detail-oriented, you see what needs to happen and you move on it before being asked.

You are detail-oriented. Hint: On your first interview, mention which SCORE value you most align with at the end of the interview for huge bonus points.



Role Requirements:

3+ years of experience in administrative or operations roles.

3+ years of experience in event coordination or event administration (quotes, proposals, logistics, not just on-site execution).

2+ years working with clients based in the US, UK, Canada, or Australia.

Fluent English speaker and writer, this is a client-facing role.

Proficient in CRM and event management tools with the ability to learn new systems quickly; Triple Seat experience is a strong plus.

Bonus points if you have experience in catering, desserts, alcohol, or food service events.





Responsibilities:

Own the full event process end-to-end, from the first inquiry all the way to event day. Quotes, proposals, contracts, invoices, follow-ups.

Keep clients happy and informed at every stage, managing last-minute changes and questions without breaking a sweat.

Coordinate event staffing by reaching out to contractors, confirming availability, and making sure everyone knows where to be and when.

Build and manage detailed event timelines so nothing falls through the cracks..

Track and order supplies and inventory ahead of each event, staying two steps ahead of what's needed.

Take ownership of the CRM (Triple Seat), leads, communications, and timelines all live there and you keep it clean and current.

Build SOPs and internal systems from zero. This business is growing fast and you're the person helping it get organized.

Support the founder directly with day-to-day operational and administrative needs as the business evolves.

During slower seasons, roll up your sleeves on business development; think lead sourcing, social media support, and outreach to attract new clients.





Perks & Benefits

Effective immediately

7 paid company holidays (major U.S. holidays listed in original JD)

Regularly paid company social events & game nights

Bi-monthly team training

After 3 months

1 local holiday choice per year

$100/year professional development allowance

One-time $50 workspace reimbursement

10 days PTO / 3 sick days per year

After 1 year

Healthcare reimbursement up to $50/month (eligible expenses)

An additional one-time $50 workspace reimbursement

Possible year-end bonus (company discretion)



If you think that you are qualified, please fill out the form below. Talk to you soon, and come join our team!



FORM TO APPLY:

title: CSR Manager
description:
Job Description: Customer Service Manager

Position Overview

The Customer Service Manager is responsible for overseeing the customer service department and ensuring that customers receive outstanding support and service. This role involves managing a team of customer service representatives, developing and implementing policies and procedures, and working to improve overall customer satisfaction.

Key Responsibilities

• Team Management: Supervise and mentor customer service staff, including hiring, training, and performance evaluation.

• Customer Support: Ensure the delivery of high-quality customer service across all channels, including phone,
, live chat, and social media.

• Policy Development: Develop and implement customer service policies and procedures to enhance the customer experience.

• Issue Resolution: Address and resolve escalated customer issues and complaints promptly and effectively.

• Performance Monitoring: Monitor and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) to assess the efficiency and effectiveness of the customer service team.

• Continuous Improvement: Identify areas for improvement in customer service processes and implement appropriate solutions.

• Training Programs: Develop and conduct training programs to keep the customer service team updated on best practices and company policies.

• Technology Utilization: Utilize customer service software and tools to manage and track customer interactions and improve service delivery.

• Feedback Collection: Gather and analyze customer feedback to identify trends and areas for improvement.

• Collaboration: Work closely with other departments, such as sales, marketing, and product development, to ensure a seamless customer experience.

• Budget Management: Manage the customer service department budget and ensure cost-effective operations.

Required Skills and Qualifications

• Experience: At least 10 years’ proven experience as a customer service director or in a similar role.

• Leadership: Strong leadership and team management skills.

• Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Problem-Solving: Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.

• Customer Focus: Deep understanding of customer service principles and practices.

• Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze performance metrics and identify areas for improvement.

• Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with customer service software, databases, and tools.

• Organizational Skills: Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities.

• Interpersonal Skills: Ability to build strong relationships with customers and tea
mbers.

• Education: Bachelor’s degree in business administration, marketing, or a related field is preferred. 



Job Type:

Full-time- this is a full-time position that needs to be engaged during the entire shift. You will not have the ability to use this as a 2nd job.



Shift:

Monday- Friday CST 7am to 5pm 10 Hours Per Day- 1 Hour Break*

*Please note this is 9pm to 7am Philippines time half the year and half the year it would be 8pm to 6am.



Salary:

60,000 PHP to 100,000 PHP. Salary is done every week on Friday the following week. 

You will have paid time off for the holidays we are closed in the U.S. (total of 5 per year)



Company Introduction:



Welcome to Tri-State Tree Service, a beacon of excellence in the tree service industry for over 30 years. Based in the picturesque heart of Pensacola, FL, we've been nurturing roots of trust and quality in the communities we serve. As a TCIA (Tree Care Industry Association) accredited company, we're part of an elite group; less than 1% of Tree Service Companies attain this prestigious certification, setting us apart in our commitment to industry-leading standards and practices.



Our legacy is enriched by our unwavering dedication to technological innovation. With significant investments in the latest equipment and cutting-edge techniques, we've positioned ourselves as pioneers, consistently delivering unparalleled services to our valued clientele. At Tri-State Tree Service, you're not just finding a job – you're becoming part of a tradition rooted in excellence, innovation, and community growth. Embark on a journey with us and elevate your career as we continue to reach new heights in the tree care sector.



Application Process:

To apply, please ensure you do the following:

1. Include “Customer Tree” in the
 subject line.

2. Attach your most recent resume.

3. Include a link to a brief video (3 minutes or less) explaining why you are the ideal candidate for this position.



Failure to follow these instructions will result in your application not being considered. Ensure that you have a computer, noise-cancelling headset, and a reliable internet connection for this role.



Join us in delivering excellent results-business processes marketing and driving our team towards achieving remarkable success. We look forward to welcoming you aboard!

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1b
description:

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.
