title: Lead Manager & Pipeline Specialist - Real Estate | Full-Time  | Virtual
description:
THE ROLE: 

This is not a typical admin job. 

You will listen to recorded cold calls, score each lead using our 100-point grading system, update our CRM, and route high-priority leads to agents immediately. You will also manage the overall pipeline — tracking lead status, following up on stale leads, and reporting daily to the team.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY:

Listen to recorded cold calls and score each lead 0–100 using our structured grading guide

Update CRM notes for every lead before 5PM — no exceptions

Route all A+ leads (score 70+) to the assigned agent within 1 hour

Manage the full pipeline — track lead status, flag stale opportunities, keep data clean

Submit a daily lead summary and weekly report to the team lead and manager

Identify patterns in lead quality and share insights to improve agent targeting

Grade a minimum of 35 leads per day, 175 per week



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

We hire on three qualities. If you do not have all three, this is not the right fit.



SMART — You process information quickly and make sound judgment calls. You read between the lines on a call and understand what a lead is really saying.

HUNGRY — You have a reason to win. You are not here to collect a paycheck. You are here to build something and prove what you are capable of.

HUMBLE — You are coachable and team-first. You take pride in making others successful. You do the unsexy work without complaining.



Required skills:



Extremely detail-oriented — you catch things others miss

Organized and consistent — you do not let things fall through the cracks

Strong listening skills — can identify motivation, urgency, and hesitation in a recorded call

Comfortable hitting daily targets without being micromanaged

CRM experience preferred — Follow Up Boss

Real estate knowledge is a plus but not required — we will train the right person



WHAT YOU GET:



Base salary + performance bonuses tied to lead-to-close conversion rate

A front-row seat to how a high-performance real estate team operates

Clear
day growth path — this role can grow into a team operations lead

A culture built on faith, family, and doing things the right way

Monday to Friday 9AM–6PM — no weekends required



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

You need someone standing over you to stay on track

You treat detail work as beneath you

You are looking for a stepping stone and plan to leave in 2 years

You are not willing to be measured and held accountable to daily numbers



HOW TO APPLY:

reply to this job post: Tell me about a time you had to be extremely detail-oriented and consistent under pressure. What was at stake and what did you do?

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
About Your Startup Operations

Your Startup Operations is a boutique agency providing operational services to small businesses. We work primarily with small business owners in the United States, and our vision is to give power to the people who own small businesses by delivering white-glove service while maintaining flexibility, care, and affordability.



A Note on Our Clients: We are proud to serve a diverse roster of clients across many different industries. Because of this, the role described below outlines the core competencies required for a General Virtual Assistant. While this description covers the foundational administrative work, specific details regarding your potential client’s industry, unique workflows, and specialized tools will be discussed in detail during the interview process. We aim to match your specific strengths with the client that suits you best.



Who You Are

We are looking for a versatile, highly organized professional to join our network. You are the type of person who can jump into new environments and create order.

Executive Presence: You have excellent communication skills and conduct yourself with professional maturity.

Detail-Oriented: You possess exceptional organizational skills and a keen attention to detail.

Adaptable: You implement feedback quickly and can support clients across various industries.

Tech-Savvy: You are comfortable learning new software and navigating different digital tools.



Role Requirements

Pristine English proficiency (Written and Verbal).

2+ years working with clients from the United States.

2+ years of virtual assistant experience (or relevant administrative experience).

Must have a reliable backup internet connection.

Experience with a variety of CRM tools and G-Suite.



Responsibilities

As a General Virtual Assistant, you will support client operations to ensure their business runs smoothly. While specific tasks may vary based on the client, core responsibilities include:

Inbox & Calendar Management: Proactively managing
 correspondence, filtering noise, and scheduling meetings across multiple time zones.

Communication: Acting as the primary point of contact for the client, handling calls, liaising with stakeholders, and maintaining executive presence in all interactions.

General Administration: Assisting with various operational tasks, data entry, CRM updates, and digital file management/organization.

Meeting Support: Preparing meeting agendas, taking minutes during calls, and tracking follow-up action items to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

Travel & Logistics: Researching and booking flights, accommodations, and transportation, as well as managing complex itineraries.

Document Creation: Drafting, editing, and formatting documents, spreadsheets, and slide presentations.

Research & Projects: Conducting internet research on competitors or vendors and assisting with special ad-hoc projects.

Execution: Following standard operating procedures (SOPs) and completing daily tasks with high accuracy, while remaining flexible enough to handle "other duties as assigned" as the business evolves.





Perks & Benefits

Effective immediately

7 paid company holidays (major U.S. holidays listed in original JD)

title: AI Visual Content Creator – Learning & Training Content (Hourly / Remote)
description:
The facts

Rate: HKD 50/hr starting (~$6.40 USD, ~ PHP385)

Hours: 20–40 hrs/week, flexible schedule

Location: Remote — anywhere in a compatible time zone (UTC+7 to UTC+9 preferred)

Apply: 



The role

We need a self-directed AI content creator who can take a script, run with it, and deliver polished visual content with minimal hand-holding. At Generis AI, we deliver compliance solutions to financial firms. As part of this stack, we produce character-driven learning modules for financial professionals in Hong Kong featuring realistic workplace scenarios like compliance dilemmas, difficult conversations, and team dynamics. We use AI image and video generation tools to build these scenes, and we need someone who can own the visual production process from prompt to final output. This is ongoing, consistent work- not a one-off project. You'll receive scripts and creative direction, but we expect you to independently produce, evaluate, iterate, and deliver.



You're the right fit if you

Have a sharp creative eye and obsess over character consistency, lighting, framing, and emotional tone across scenes

Are hands-on with AI image/video tools (Midjourney, Leonardo AI, Hedra, Kling, or similar)

Can read and interpret English-language scripts at a professional level

Are self-motivated and comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

Can commit to 20–30 hours per week on a reliable, ongoing basis



How to apply

 a brief cover letter and all three items listed below to 
 applications will not be considered.



1 — Portfolio (8–12 pieces)

Show us your best AI-generated work across a range of characters, professional settings, and emotional moods. Note which tools you used for each.



2 — Prompt Engineering (written only)

Scenario: A senior manager privately addresses a junior colleague's compliance mistake; constructive but serious.

Write 4–5 sequential prompts to generate storyboard frames for a 60-second segment. For each, include a one-line story description and one quality-control check you'd apply.



3 — Image Generation (3–5 stills)

Scenario: A meeting evolves from neutral tension ? visible discomfort ? resolution.

Generate 3–5 images showing this progression with strict character and environmental consistency. Include a short note on your process and what you'd refine with more time.



This is a great opportunity for someone who loves visual storytelling, works well independently, and wants steady, ongoing remote work with a small team.

title: Looking for Highly Technical Ex Tech Entrepreneur for Chief of Staff
description:
Hi, I am founder of a fast growing loyalty/payment/social platform built on blockchain and it's currently applied to hospitality industry (restaurants and foodies via an app).



I need an entrepreneurial EA/Chief of Staff to work directly with primarily myself and other co-founders of this fast growing consumer technology company in Australia. The role will require not only to help with administrative duties (business & personal related, literally all sorts, imagine last minute shopping for mother's day gift?) to scheduling and coordination of meetings, data entry, research, booking flights or organise travels, contacts organised,
 responses pre-drafted, send gifts to friends on birthdays, get custom bios of everyone I meet, organise dinners, help with startup fundraising process, generating sales leads to
 campaigns, building playbooks for any repeated tasks.



Must be experienced as an EA but most important part is to be highly good with technology (for example, use zappier to create automation process of tasks or forms, slack, asana, click up, jira, notion, hubspot, confluence, figma, shopify, integrations, webflow, some coding experience too), and an ex entrepreneur is a major plus.



I need an exceptional person who can think like myself, who are basically a clone of myself or an extension of myself, so I can do more and this person is not going to just manage an inbox, calendar, meeting notes & actions but will do alot of cool and interesting stuff that only founders get to do apart from the personal related matters.



This role should particularly excite up and coming young talented budding entrepreneur because I will be training and will learn and be mentored by one of the best tech company founders in Australia, applying real skills into real world experience.



Core requirement:



- Experience in building business previously not just EA experience.

- Highly good with technology / love blockchain, crypto, food, apps / business in general / want to build her or his own tech startup one day or be part of world's best.

- Willingness to work at any odd hours, there is no set time (you will get to sleep, don't worry!)

- You need to have great written English skill, as well as communication skill.

- Technical in-fluency - super technical (comfortable with Jira, Confluence) 

- Understand Process Flows

- BPMN (Business Process Management Notation

- Project Management

- Highly skilled with excel to build modelling



Plus:

- Blockchain

- Gaming

- Finance

- Engineering



Your character:

- Think 10 steps ahead and manage projects with ownership mindset / founder mindset.

- Creative and strategic problem solver.

- Love doing things unconventionally and not afraid to fuck up (yeah fuck up is ok so long you don't make the same again).

- Special talent in researching and finding things online. Don't tell me you can't find when Google is the answer for anything.

- Never giving up, there is always solution mentality. Tenacious and persistent.

- You are continually seeking ways to improve and understand the power of leverage & compounding.

- Efficient and fast and ask right questions to perform better if stuck, but don't ask questions that answers can easily be found

- You've developed a slight obsession about productivity and results that matter, let's care about actual results.

- You're not precious about constructive criticism and freely absorb feedback.

- You can multi-task with your eyes closed. People often say you must have been a ninja in a past life.

- Your possession of EQ and IQ are both high.

- Your judgement is based upon a method of epistemology, not bias.

- It's not just attention to detail, you've got a special knack for noticing the little things that count.

- Power house content creator, able to write / produce relevant materials.



Please apply with the below: Send me a notion page with a link and attach the following:

- Why are you applying for this role?

- Do you meet the core criteria?

- Don't just tell me that you are smart and intelligent, give me evidences and proof that you are curious minded technology lover who has purpose in this world, want to build a next tech start up that gives humanity financial freedom and value that they can own, that you have values that standing for something greater than yourself.

- Show me example plans of how you will actually help with fundraising process (give me detailed process).

- Attach any personality test that you already took or complete this and attach in the notion the result. 16personalities.

- You will need to prove with past experience that you were start up entrepreneur or will be one.

- Include any design work you did in the past, use of figma.

- Any experience you have with e-commerce and sourcing from beginning to the end.



I am super excited to meet you. You should be too. :)

title: AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

We are seeking an AI Implementation Specialist to help drive our internal APEX initiative, focused on bringing practical AI into the business to improve speed, accuracy, reporting, process consistency, and operational execution.

This is a full-time role for someone who is highly organized, resourceful, detail-oriented, and excited about using AI tools to solve real business problems. This person does not need to be a traditional software engineer, but they do need to be highly capable with modern AI tools and able to use them to build workflows, improve processes, create useful outputs, and move projects forward quickly.

You will start by supporting quality control and execution inside our APEX roadmap, helping validate outputs, improve workflows, organize information, and assist in implementation. Over time, this role will expand into building and improving AI-enabled systems across multiple departments.

This is a role for a builder. We are not looking for someone who only talks about AI. We are looking for someone who can use it to produce real results inside a real business.

What You Will Be Working On

Examples of projects in this role may include:

• AI-assisted SOP creation, refinement, and maintenance

• KPI dashboards, scorecards, and reporting support

• Workflow automations

• Process mapping and documentation

• Data cleanup and structuring for AI use

• Internal knowledge organization

• Quality control of AI-generated outputs

• Building practical tools and workflows that improve team performance

• Supporting implementation of our APEX roadmap across departments

Primary Duties

• Help execute and support our internal APEX initiative for AI adoption and business improvement

• Review, validate, and improve AI-generated work for accuracy, usefulness, and consistency

• Build and refine workflows using AI tools to improve business processes

• Assist in documenting SOPs, workflows, standards, and process maps

• Help create reporting tools, metrics tracking systems, and operational scorecards

• Organize business information so it can be used more effectively by AI systems

• Collaborate with leadership and internal tea
mbers to identify high-value opportunities for AI implementation

• Test ideas quickly, improve them, and turn them into repeatable systems

• Use good judgment to distinguish between useful output and low-quality AI-generated noise

• Support implementation projects across operations, admin, finance, customer service, and other business functions

• Maintain clear documentation of what is being built, why it matters, and how it should be used

• Continuously look for ways to improve efficiency, leverage, and execution

Tools and Systems You May Work With

Experience with all of these is not required, but comfort learning and working with tools like these is important:

• Claude Code

• Google Sheets / Excel

• ClickUp

• n8n

• Metabase

• SQL / Postgres / Supabase

• QuickBooks

• Other internal systems and operational tools

We will provide access to Claude Code for the person hired for this role.

Ideal Candidate Profile

We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Strong in written English

• Naturally proactive and resourceful

• Fast at learning new tools and systems

• Good at following structure while still thinking independently

• Comfortable working with ambiguity and figuring things out

• Process-minded and improvement-oriented

• Able to turn messy ideas into clean outputs

• Interested in business operations, not just technology

• Focused on usefulness, execution, and real-world results

• Curious, persistent, and capable of self-management

Essential Qualifications and Competencies

• Experience using AI tools in a practical business setting

• Ability to use AI to help create workflows, documentation, reports, or automations

• Strong written communication skills in English

• High attention to detail and strong quality-control instincts

• Ability to learn systems quickly and work across different business functions

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks

• Good judgment and problem-solving ability

• Reliable follow-through and professional work habits

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with workflow automation tools such as n8n 

• Experience with spreadsheets, reporting, and KPI tracking

• Experience supporting SOPs, QA, process improvement, or operations

• Basic familiarity with APIs, SQL, databases, or structured business data (nice to have)

• Experience using AI to support implementation rather than just content generation

• Experience working with U.S.-based companies or remote teams (nice to have)

This Role Is Not For You If

• You only have theoretical interest in AI and no real examples of using it to improve work

• You rely on AI outputs without checking them for quality or accuracy

• Your written English is weak

• You struggle to follow structure, naming conventions, or process discipline

• You are not comfortable learning new software and systems quickly

• You need constant direction for every task

• You cannot work the required schedule consistently

• You are looking for a side job rather than a serious full-time role

Employment Details

Position Type: Full-time

This role requires full availability during assigned hours and cannot be combined with other employment.

Schedule: Monday through Friday, U.S. Central Time, 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM with a 1-hour break

Philippines equivalent timing will vary seasonally.

Compensation: PHP 45,000 - 75,000 monthly, paid weekly

Paid leave provided for recognized U.S. holidays when operations are suspended.

About Our Organization

Join Tri-State Tree Service, an industry leader with three decades of exceptional service throughout Pensacola, Florida and surrounding areas. Our TCIA accreditation places us among an exclusive group, with fewer than 1% of tree care companies achieving this distinction.

We believe in operational excellence, continuous improvement, and using technology to create real competitive advantage. We invest heavily in systems, equipment, process improvement, and innovation. This role is part of a larger initiative to build practical AI into the business in a way that creates real leverage and long-term value.

If you want to help build something meaningful, improve the way a real business operates, and grow with a company that is serious about execution, this is an excellent opportunity.

Application Requirements

To be considered, please complete all of the following:

1. Use AI Implementer as the subject line of your application

2. Submit your current resume

3. Provide a link to a video introduction of no more than 3 minutes explaining:

o your experience using AI tools in real work

o the most useful thing you have built or improved using AI

o why you are a strong fit for this position

4. Complete the short screening task below

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

Candidates must have a reliable computer, stable internet connectivity.

Screening Task

Please complete the following short task as part of your application:

Choose one business process that could be improved using AI. Examples:

• SOP creation or maintenance

• Quality control of team outputs

• KPI reporting

• Workflow documentation

• Customer service responses

• Task follow-up or internal accountability

Submit a short response that includes:

1. A brief description of the business problem

2. How you would use AI to improve it

3. What tools you would use

4. A simple example of the workflow

5. One risk or limitation of your approach and how you would handle it

Keep your answer practical and concise. We are not looking for the most technical answer. We are looking for clear thinking, good judgment, and real business usefulness.

title: VA - Customer Support & Logistics Communication Manager
description:
We are SMILE Surf Wear — a growing ecommerce surf apparel and protective headwear brand operating across International markets (mainly Europe, USA and Australia). We're looking for a proactive, highly organised Virtual Assistant to join us part-time in a dual-focus role: managing customer support across all active channels and coordinating daily logistics and fulfillment communication.



This is a role for someone who takes true ownership of their responsibilities, keeps a cool head under pressure, and always leads with solutions rather than problems.



Customer support



You will monitor and respond across all active customer communication channels simultaneously, ensuring timely, brand-consistent replies:

-
 support via Outlook

- Live chat via Shopify / Tidio

- WhatsApp customer messages

- Social media DMs (Instagram, TikTok)

- Responding to social media comments when bandwidth allows



Logistics & fulfillment communication



You will act as the direct communication bridge between SMILE and our logistics and fulfillment partner, coordinating via WeChat:

- Monitor daily order flow and outgoing shipments to ensure everything runs on schedule

- Proactively identify and flag any delays, shipping issues, or anomalies before they escalate

- Keep the fulfillment team updated on changes, special requests, or urgent cases

- Liaise directly with the CEO with weekly updates on order status and fulfillment performance

- Flag when the shipping balance needs to be topped up



Reporting & data



Beyond day-to-day operations, we expect you to contribute to continuous improvement:

- Build and maintain Google Sheets to track, compare, and analyse shipping data and communication patterns

- Identify trends and provide insights that help improve both fulfillment efficiency and customer response quality

- Deliver structured weekly summaries to the CEO



What we're looking for

- Proven experience in ecommerce customer support or logistics coordination

- Extremely organised with an ability to manage multiple channels simultaneously

- Analytical mindset — comfortable building spreadsheets and working with data

- Problem-solving approach: you find solutions first, escalate second

- Calm, reliable, and self-directed — you don't need hand-holding

- Excellent written communication in English (additional European languages are a plus)



Required tools & platforms:

Shopify

Google Sheets / Drive

Outlook

WhatsApp

Instagram

TikTok

WeChat



Nice to have:

Tidio

HyperSKU



Grow with us

SMILE is growing fast — new markets, new products, and new opportunities are constantly on the horizon. This role starts part-time, but for the right person it is just the beginning. As the brand scales, so does the team, and we actively look to grow from within.



We're not looking for someone to fill a seat for a few months. We value long-term relationships built on trust, reliability, and shared ambition. If you're looking for a place to grow alongside a brand — and not just a job — we'd love to hear from you.

title: Full Time Video Editor - Join DisruptorsMediaLLC Team
description:
At Disruptors Media, we are a dynamic and innovative marketing agency specializing in creating high-quality, engaging content that helps our clients stand out in their respective industries. We pride ourselves on our creative approach, attention to detail, and the ability to tailor each project to our client’s unique vision. As we continue to grow, we’re looking to add a talented and dedicated Video Editor to our team who can embody our core values and contribute to the ongoing success of our clients.



Job Overview:



We are seeking a passionate and skilled Video Editor who can produce high-quality content and has a deep understanding of how to tell a compelling story through video. This is a full-time position, requiring 40 hours per week of consistent work. The ideal candidate will be an excellent communicator with strong organizational skills and a keen eye for detail. You should be comfortable working independently and as part of a creative team to produce video content that resonates with audiences and meets client expectations.



Responsibilities:



- Edit and assemble raw footage into polished video content that aligns with client objectives and Disruptors Media’s creative vision.



- Collaborate with our creative team and clients to understand project goals, brand identity, and audience needs.



- Ensure that video content meets high-quality standards, including technical aspects such as color correction, audio mixing, and video resolution.



- Manage multiple projects and deadlines while maintaining attention to detail and creative consistency across all video content.



- Keep up to date with industry trends and apply innovative video editing techniques to enhance client projects.

- Excellent attention to detail and a keen eye for visual consistency.



- Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple projects at once.



- Strong communication skills in English, both written and verbal.



- Experience with motion graphics and visual effects is a plus.



- Familiarity with social media platforms and video specifications for digital content distribution is preferred.



- Reliable internet connection and the ability to work remotely.

Opportunities for professional development and training.



Flexible working hours (must be available for 40 hours per week).



A chance to work with a wide variety of clients across different industries and contribute to exciting, high-impact projects.

Include a brief explanation of your role in the projects and any relevant details that highlight your skills and experience. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



We are looking to fill this position as soon as possible, so don’t wait – apply today!

title: Virtual Assistant - Join DisruptorsMediaLLC Team
description:
We're looking for a Virtual Assistant who can manage multiple moving parts, communicate clearly, and use AI tools to work smarter without needing to be told twice.



About Disruptors Media



We're a marketing agency from Salt Lake, Utah. Everyone on the team owns their work. This role supports our operations, client workflows, and outreach efforts across various projects and clients.



The Role



Full-time, Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 4 PM MST with flexibility for async tasks. You'll be embedded in day-to-day operations, keeping things organized, on time, and moving forward.



What You'll Do



- Manage and organize workflows, tasks, and communications across multiple projects and clients.

- Handle outreach and follow-up coordination, keeping records accurate and up to date in our CRM.

- Prepare weekly summaries, reports, and status updates with clear context and next steps.

- Research, compile, and maintain lists, documents, and other operational materials as needed.

- Set up and monitor automated sequences and tools to reduce manual effort where possible.

- Flag issues early and bring solutions, not just problems.



What We Require



- At least 1 year of experience as a VA, operations, admin, or support role.

- Strong written English with no tolerance for errors. You represent the business in every message.

- Comfort working independently with minimal oversight and a disciplined daily structure.

- Reliable internet and a distraction-free workspace.

- Results focus. You track what actually gets done, not just what you worked on.



AI Experience is a Strong +



If you have hands-on experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, automation platforms, or prompt-based workflows, that moves you to the top of the list. We're building systems that use AI, and someone who already thinks that way fits faster.



Compensation



$800 to $1,500 USD per month based on experience and output.



How to Apply



Send your cover letter and a link to your portfolio or any relevant work samples. Do not apply if you are unavailable during the listed hours.

title: Remote Sales & Client Growth Specialist (Virtual Assistant) — Cleaning Company
description:
Are you a closer? Keep reading.



Molly Maid of Central Westchester  — a growing cleaning referral agency serving Westchester County, New York and surrounding areas. We connect homeowners and businesses with vetted, professional independent cleaners. Business is growing and we need someone who knows how to turn interest into booked jobs and booked jobs into long-term clients.

This is not a general VA role. This is a sales role with VA responsibilities. If you're someone who gets excited when a lead comes in, who follows up without being told, and who genuinely enjoys the process of turning a "maybe" into a "yes" — this was written for you.



What You'll Be Doing:



The core of this role is revenue. Everything you do connects back to bringing clients in and keeping them.

On the inbound side you'll be responding to new inquiries fast, walking potential clients through our services, overcoming objections, quoting jobs, and closing bookings. Speed and tone matter — a warm lead goes cold in hours, not days.

On the outbound side you'll be working a list. Cold leads who requested a quote but never booked, past clients who haven't rescheduled, small businesses in our area who could benefit from recurring commercial cleaning. You'll be making calls, sending follow-up texts and
s, and building relationships that turn into recurring revenue.

Beyond sales, you'll support day-to-day operations — scheduling, coordinating with cleaners, post-clean follow-ups, and keeping our CRM organized. But make no mistake: sales is what drives this role and your earning potential.



What's In It For You



$4.75/hr base — full-time 40 hrs/week

Uncapped commission — the more you close, the more you earn

Bi-weekly pay + monthly commission payout

13th month pay honored

6-month performance review with raise opportunity

Long-term role with a team that treats you like family



You're the Right Fit If You:



Have direct sales experience — you've closed deals, not just taken orders

Are comfortable on the phone with U.S. clients and can build rapport fast

Follow up relentlessly — you don't send one message and wait

Can handle objections without getting rattled

Are organized enough to manage a pipeline while handling daily operations

Are looking for a long-term home, not a stepping stone

Have reliable internet and a quiet workspace during U.S. Eastern Time hours



Bonus Points For:



Experience in home services, real estate, or any service-based U.S. business

Familiarity with CRMs like Booking Koala, Go High Level, or similar

title: Mobile App Developer Needed — Faith-Based Community & Content App
description:
We're building a membership app for our brand, The Living Word. It's a community platform bundled with our Ethiopian Bible product — think Skool meets a Bible app, purpose-built for our audience.

What the app does:

Bible Section — Combined ebook and audiobook for all 88 books of the Ethiopian Bible. Users can read chapters with verse-by-verse formatting and toggle audio playback without leaving the page (similar to how the YouVersion Bible app handles it). Chapter navigation, search, bookmarks, playback speed, background audio, and a persistent mini-player.

Community — Member profiles (photo, name, bio, handle), a discussion feed where users post text/images, like, comment, and interact. Admins can pin posts. Direct messaging between members. Similar to Skool's community feature.

Classroom — Video lesson modules organized into courses. Admin CMS is critical — our team needs to upload new videos, write lesson text, and publish new modules without any developer involvement.

Leaderboard — Points-based system where members earn points from likes on their posts/comments. 7-day, 30-day, and all-time views. Leveling system tied to point thresholds.

Store — Integrated with our Shopify store to upsell physical products (notebooks, devotionals, bookmarks, bracelets, etc.).

Profiles — User profiles with bio, handle, profile picture, level/points, activity history, and progress tracking across Bible reading and courses.

Other technical needs:



User sign-up integrated with Shopify (verifying membership through purchase)

Push notifications (new content, replies, messages, announcements)

Admin dashboard for content management, user management, and moderation

The app should feel premium and polished — we have UI concepts ready to share with the right candidate



Platforms: We need both iOS and Android. Open to cross-platform frameworks (React Native, Flutter) if you can make the case for it.

What we're looking for:



Experience building community/social apps (show us examples)

Experience with audio/video streaming in mobile apps

Experience with Shopify API integration

Strong UI implementation skills — we have detailed mockups and expect pixel-level attention

Ability to build an admin CMS so we can manage content independently after launch

Clear communication and regular progress updates



To apply, please include:



2-3 similar apps you've built (community, content, or membership apps preferred)

Your recommended tech stack and why

Rough timeline and cost estimate broken into MVP and full build

Whether you work solo or with a team

Your availability to start



We're open to an MVP-first approach where we launch with core features and add more over time. Budget is flexible for the right person — we care more about quality and reliability than finding the cheapest option.

title: Demand Writer
description:
Demand Writer



Job Type: Full-Time



Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 1-hour break



Salary: $ 1,000 per month



Job Overview: 



We are seeking a detail-oriented and persuasive Demand Writer to join a fast-paced legal team focused on personal injury cases. In this fully remote position, you will be responsible for producing high-quality demand packages that clearly communicate the extent of a client’s injuries and treatment. This role is ideal for someone with strong writing skills, an understanding of medical documentation, and the ability to translate complex case details into compelling legal narratives. You will collaborate closely with the Head of the Demand Department to ensure each demand letter maximizes case value and is submitted in a timely manner.



Key Responsibilities:



Work directly with the Head of the Demand Department to produce accurate and timely demands.

Review and analyze case files, liability information, police reports, photos/videos, and client statements.

Understand and interpret medical records and medical reports.

Create accurate and persuasive narratives based on a client’s medical records and treatment history.

Draft detailed demand letters tailored to each case and insurance carrier.

Organize all supporting documents into complete, well-structured demand packages.

Communicate with Case Managers when additional information or clarification is needed.

Track deadlines and ensure timely submission of all demands.

Make revisions based on attorney or department feedback.

Maintain the confidentiality of all case materials and comply with firm procedures.

Update the Demand Sheet List when assistance is needed or when demand status changes.

Manage multiple cases at once while meeting quality and productivity expectations.

Qualifications:



Proven experience in legal writing, medical/legal transcription, or personal injury law preferred.

Exceptional writing and editing skills, with a strong command of grammar and clarity.

Ability to read, understand, and summarize medical records and treatment histories.

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Excellent time management skills; able to handle multiple cases and meet strict deadlines.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and PDF editing tools.

Proficient in combining and compressing files using Adobe Acrobat.

Comfortable working independently in a remote setting with minimal supervision.

Strong communication skills and accountability in a virtual team environment.

Experience in the legal or insurance industry is a plus.

, CRM, lead nurturing, and follow-ups

mbers on digital marketing tools, AI platforms, automation systems, and best practices

title: Staff Accountant (Remote - Philippines)
description:
Title: Staff Accountant



Reports To: Controller



Location: Remote Anywhere in the PHILIPPINES ONLY



Hourly Range: $7.00 - $11.00 (Paid bi-weekly via Payoneer/Paypal)



**PERMANENT REMOTE (MUST HAVE OWN EQUIPMENT)**

**40 HOURS PER WEEK (Weekends Off)**

**PACIFIC STANDARD TIME (Night Shift)**

**MONITASK TIME TRACKER**



About Gala Capital Partners (GCP):

GCP is a leading private investment firm based in Southern California, specializing in the restaurant industry. We focus on investing in or acquiring growth-oriented restaurant brands, as well as SaaS software companies that support these operations.



Our portfolio includes several prominent franchisors such as MOOYAH, Dunn Brothers Coffee, Dillas Primo Quesadillas, and Rusty Taco, along with innovative SaaS solutions like Ecotrak, Targetable, Stream, and Lunchbox. As we anticipate significant growth and further expansion, we are building our internal team to strengthen our capabilities.



Position Summary:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, analytical, and proactive Staff Accountant to join our fast-growing finance team. This role plays a key part in the day to-day management of Accounts Payable (AP), Vendor Management, General Ledger (GL) coding, Accounts Receivable (AR), and Franchise/Tenant billing and collections, while also assisting in treasury operations, including intercompany transfers and settlement activities.



This position requires strong ownership, accuracy, urgency, and a continuous improvement mindset. The ideal candidate has a passion for numbers, thrives in a fast paced environment, and is naturally curious with a knack for problem-solving and streamlining operations.



Key Responsibilities:



Accounts Payable & Vendor Management

- Process vendor invoices, ensure accurate GL coding, and manage timely payments via Ramp.

- Maintain and update vendor records; onboard new vendors and validate documentation.

- Perform regular reconciliations and ensure compliance with internal controls.

Accounts Receivable & Billing

- Prepare and issue billings to franchisees and tenants; monitor and -manage collections.

- Work closely with operations to reconcile customer accounts and resolve discrepancies promptly.

- Provide regular updates and AR aging analysis to management.

Treasury & Intercompany

- Assist with daily cash management and positioning; support payment

processing and approvals.

- Monitor and manage intercompany activity, settlements, and bank transfers.

- Support treasury reporting, banking relationships, and reconciliation of balances across entities.

Reporting & General Ledger

- Perform accurate and timely GL coding and journal entries related to

transactional accounting.

- Assist in the preparation of month-end and year-end financial reports.

- Track and analyze spend trends and report exceptions or variances from budget/forecast.

Continuous Improvement & Support

- Identify and implement opportunities for process optimization and automation.

- Serve as a go-to resource for systems such as Microsoft Dynamics GP

Collaborate cross-functionally with finance, operations, and external partners.

Qualifications & Requirements:



CPA/CMA License required.

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

3-5 years of hands-on accounting experience in a transactional or general accounting role.

Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial processes.

Experience with Microsoft Dynamics GP highly preferred.

Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, modeling); experience with financial systems and dashboards a plus.

Demonstrated attention to detail, speed, and accuracy in a high-volume environment.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; ability to ask why and dig deeper.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Proven ability to manage multiple priorities with urgency and efficiency.

Entrepreneurial mindset with a proactive and solutions-oriented approach.

Comfortable working in both collaborative and independent settings.

title: E-Commerce Sales & Operations Manager — Home Improvement (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
E-Commerce Sales & Operations Manager — Home Improvement (Full-Time, Remote)



$4.00/hour + Commission (top performers earn $1,000+/month)



————————————————————————



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are The Trade Table (
), a growing home improvement e-commerce company selling premium brands like Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, and more. We are looking for a driven, sales-focused operations manager to help us scale to $30K–$50K+ in monthly revenue.



This is not a virtual assistant role. This is a sales-first operations role where your #1 job is converting leads into orders. We generate high-quality inbound leads through Google Ads — your job is to follow up, build relationships, and close deals on high-ticket home improvement products ($500–$6,000+ per order, $17K being the highest all time).



We have the leads. We have the brands. We have the ad engine. We need someone who can close.



————————————————————————



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:



- You have real e-commerce experience (Shopify preferred)

- You are confident on the phone and can close sales

- You thrive under pressure and want to earn based on performance

- You want to grow with a company, not just fill a seat



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You prefer quiet backend work over sales calls

- You need hand-holding and constant direction

- You shy away from targets and accountability

- You see this as "just a VA job"



————————————————————————



WHAT YOU'LL DO (In Priority Order)



Your #1 job is SALES. Everything else is secondary.



1. Order Processing (Highest Priority) — When an order comes in, you process it immediately. Submit to distributor, confirm with manufacturer, verify lead time, update customer. Orders are revenue. Nothing delays this.



2. Lead Follow-Up — Every open lead gets worked until they buy, decline, or are disqualified. Phone, text,
. Leads never sit idle. You follow up relentlessly.



3. Cold Outreach — Minimum 20 business-to-business calls per day. The goal is conversations that generate new sales opportunities.



4. Brand Outreach — Minimum 5 brand/dealer calls per day. We are constantly adding new brands to our catalog. Find the brand, call them, secure dealer access.



5. Secondary (only after sales work is done) — Shipping and order tracking, YouTube channel management, supplier research for future product lines, hiring support.



What you will NOT do: Product uploads, catalog management, collection work. We have a separate tea
mber for that.



————————————————————————



COMPENSATION



Base Pay: $4.00/hour USD



Commission (per order — this is where it gets exciting):



We want you to earn well. Our commission structure rewards closers, especially on big orders.



Each order gets a $100 Google Ads cost allocation. Your commission is based on Real Profit (Revenue minus Product Cost minus Shipping minus Fees minus $100). The more profitable the order, the more you earn ($100 minimum profit):



Under $100 Real Profit = $5 flat

$100 – $300 Real Profit = 7% of Real Profit

Over $300 Real Profit = 10% of Real Profit



Important: The company keeps a minimum of $100 profit on every order. If the commission would bring profit below $100, it gets capped. This only affects mid-range orders — on big orders you always get the full percentage.



Real examples from our order history:



$839 Range Hood — Real Profit $77 — Your Commission: $5.00

$1,424 Range Hood — Real Profit $129 — Your Commission: $9.01

$2,199 Range Hood — Real Profit $214 — Your Commission: $14.95

$2,919 Sauna Stove — Real Profit $235 — Your Commission: $16.46

$5,473 Sauna/Heater — Real Profit $742 — Your Commission: $74.22

$6,140 Hot Tub — Real Profit $867 — Your Commission: $86.72



One big order can pay $75–$90+ in commission. We get these opportunities regularly — we need someone who can close them.



Weekly Performance Bonus (weekly revenue target: $7,500):



Hit $7,500+ = +$10

Every $1,000 over $7,500 = +$10 more

$5,000 – $7,500 = No deduction

$2,500 – $5,000 = -$2.50

Under $2,500 = -$5.00



What your total monthly earnings look like:



$15,000 in monthly revenue = ~$835/month total pay

$20,000 in monthly revenue = ~$886/month total pay

$25,000 in monthly revenue = ~$928/month total pay

$30,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,010/month total pay

$35,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,052/month total pay

$50,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,192/month total pay



At $30K+ in monthly revenue, you are earning $5.75+/hour effective rate with room to grow as the business scales. Our goal is $50K–$100K+/month, and your earnings grow with us.



————————————————————————



REQUIREMENTS



Must have:



- E-commerce experience (Shopify strongly preferred)

- Sales experience — you have closed deals before, not just processed orders

- Strong English communication (written and verbal — you will be on the phone with US customers)

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace for phone calls

- Available 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central US Time (CST), Monday – Friday

- Self-motivated — you will be the only person on sales daily



Strongly preferred:



- Experience with home improvement, appliance, or high-ticket product sales

- Familiarity with Google Ads lead funnels

- Experience with CRM or lead tracking systems

- Comfortable making outbound cold calls



————————————————————————



ABOUT US



The Trade Table is a home improvement e-commerce company with dealer relationships with 100+ brands. We have been in business for 4 years, generated $334K+ in lifetime revenue, and are growing fast — revenue was up 65% year-to-date.



We run highly efficient Google Ads campaigns (25x+ ROAS) that generate a strong pipeline of inbound leads. Our biggest gap is converting those leads into closed orders. That is exactly what this role is built to solve.



We are a small, fast-moving team. You will work directly with the owner and have a real impact on the company's growth. This is not a corporate job — this is a ground-floor opportunity with a company that is scaling.



Our brands include: Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, HUUM, Hooga, Sports Attack, and many more.



————————————————————————



HOW TO APPLY



 
 with subject line "$100K/month Ecom Closer"



1. A brief message about your e-commerce and sales experience

2. Resume

3. Your IQ test result from: 
/take-the-test/ (free version is
ed to you)

4. voice recording



Bonus: If you have examples of sales results you've driven (revenue numbers, conversion rates, etc.), include them. We value results over resumes.



————————————————————————



INTERVIEW PROCESS



1. Application review

2. Initial interview (video call)

3. Final interview (video call)

4. Trial period (paid)



We move fast. If you're the right fit, you could be starting within days.

title: Video Editor (Corporate Training / Online Course Content)
description:
We’re looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to help us produce a professional online training course focused on electrical work.



This project consists of dozens of short videos (5–10 minutes each). The editing is straightforward, but we expect clean, high-quality results that feel polished and professional.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Edit 5–10 minute training videos from provided footage

Cut between multiple camera angles to prioritize clarity and close-up detail

Apply color correction and basic grading for a consistent, professional look

Clean up audio (basic leveling, clarity)

Add simple text overlays (labels, key points, step indicators)

Incorporate stock footage or visuals when appropriate to enhance understanding

Ensure pacing keeps content clear and engaging (not boring, not flashy)

Remove or replace any references to specific branding (this course will be white-labeled)



What We’re Looking For:

Experience editing corporate training, educational, or instructional videos

Strong understanding of clean cuts and multi-angle editing

Good eye for color correction and visual consistency

Ability to keep edits simple, professional, and purposeful

Familiar with adding overlays, callouts, and basic motion graphics

Access to stock footage resources is a plus

Reliable turnaround times and good communication



Project Details:

Initial project: a few dozen videos (5–10 minutes each)

Ongoing work possible if it’s a good fit

We provide all raw footage and direction

Turnaround expectations will be discussed before starting



Important Notes:

This is not a flashy YouTube-style edit — it’s clean, professional training content

Attention to detail matters (especially showing the right angle at the right time)

Final videos must be free of any original branding (white-label ready)



To Apply



Please include:



Links to relevant past work (especially training or instructional videos)

A short note explaining your experience with multi-angle editing and color correction

Your rate per video or hourly rate

Your typical turnaround time for a 5–10 minute video



If you’re consistent, detail-oriented, and know how to make simple edits look professional, this will be a great fit.

title: HR & People Ops Assistant
description:
EXPRESS CHIPPING, INC. 



HR & People Ops Assistant 

Remote – Philippines  •  Independent Contractor 



Reports To: Business & Admin Director  

Hours: Must overlap with US business hours (PST to EST) 



 



About the Role 



Express Chipping, Inc. is a leading provider of concrete chipping, silo cleaning, and plant maintenance services in the ready-mix and cement industries. As a high-growth company with 60 employees and approximately $10 million in annual revenue, we need sharp, reliable people keeping things running behind the scenes. 



As our HR & People Ops Assistant, you’ll work directly alongside our Business & Admin Director to keep our HR function organized and on track. You’re the person who makes sure records are accurate, deadlines are met, and nothing falls through the cracks. 



 



What You’ll Do 



Maintain and organize employee and contractor records, ensuring files are complete and up to date 



Build and manage HR meeting agendas, take notes, and track action items to completion 



Send reminders and follow up with tea
mbers on outstanding HR tasks 



Keep ClickUp boards updated with accurate task statuses and owners 



Draft, format, and proofread HR documents, templates, memos, and SOPs 



Assist in coordinating with our external HR agency — sending materials, tracking responses, and organizing communications 



 



What We’re Looking For 



2+ years in an HR admin, people ops, or virtual assistant role 



Exceptionally organized — you track details, follow through, and don’t need reminding

title: Google Ads
description:
Advertising & Digital Marketing Specialist Assistant 

Company: GWIN HVAC

Location: Old Hickory, Tennessee

Job Type: Full-time

Schedule: 9am-5pm 

Compensation: $2-4/hour



About GWIN

GWIN is a heating and cooling brand focused on ductless and ducted HVAC systems, with messaging centered on “Assisted DIY,” strong product performance, price transparency, and unusually strong warranty coverage. On its website, GWIN highlights easier installation, customer support, eco-certified systems, and warranties that include 12-year parts/compressor coverage plus 7-year labor and refrigerant coverage. GWIN lists its headquarters in Old Hickory, Tennessee.



Position Overview

GWIN is looking for a creative, results-driven Advertising & Digital Marketing Specialist to help grow brand awareness, drive qualified traffic, and increase sales across our digital channels. This role will be responsible for planning, launching, and optimizing advertising campaigns that clearly communicate why customers should choose GWIN.

You will help translate our value proposition into compelling campaigns that highlight what makes GWIN different: durable systems, cleaner air features, affordable pricing, financing options, and industry-leading warranty support.



Key Responsibilities

Create and manage paid advertising campaigns across Google, Meta, YouTube, and other relevant platforms

Write ad copy that converts while matching GWIN’s brand voice

Build and test campaign creatives, landing page ideas, promotions, and retargeting strategies

Monitor campaign performance daily and optimize for ROAS, CTR, CPC, conversion rate, and lead quality

Develop seasonal promotions and product-focused campaigns for ductless and ducted HVAC systems

Coordinate messaging across website,
, social media, and paid ads

Research competitors, customer trends, and HVAC market opportunities

Track performance and provide weekly/monthly reports with clear recommendations

Work with leadership to improve brand positioning, promotions, and customer acquisition strategy

Help grow GWIN’s online presence and strengthen customer trust through clear, educational advertising



Ideal Candidate

Experience running paid digital advertising campaigns

Strong copywriting and creative messaging skills

Comfortable analyzing campaign metrics and making data-based decisions

Experience with e-commerce, home services, HVAC, construction, or related industries is preferred

Familiarity with Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Google Analytics, and Shopify is a plus

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple campaigns at once

Able to balance branding, direct response, and performance marketing

Self-starter who can bring ideas, test quickly, and improve results over time

What Success Looks Like

Increased qualified traffic to GWIN’s website

Higher online sales and stronger return on ad spend

Better brand recognition in the HVAC space

Clear, consistent messaging across all advertising channels

Campaigns that effectively communicate GWIN’s performance, affordability, and warranty advantage

Why Join GWIN

Be part of a growing HVAC brand with a distinct market position

Help advertise products built around comfort, durability, and cleaner-air features

Work with a company that emphasizes customer support, transparent pricing, financing access, and strong warranties

Opportunity to make a direct impact on revenue and brand growth



Requirement: 

Must have high speed reliable internet, capable of video calls. 

Must be able to screen share during working hours.

title: Experienced QA & Technical Integration Engineer
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a skilled and experienced QA & Technical Integration Engineer to help ensure the quality, reliability, and successful implementation of our applications, APIs, and third-party integrations. This role combines hands-on quality assurance with technical integration work, supporting both internal product development and external implementation across merchant websites, partner platforms, and third-party systems.



You will work closely with our engineering, product, and external technical teams to test features, validate integrations, identify issues early, and help deliver a high-quality product experience to our users and partners.



This is a fully remote role suited for someone who is hands-on, detail-oriented, and comfortable working across both frontend and backend systems.



Responsibilities

Design, execute, and maintain manual and automated tests for a Next.js frontend and Node.js backend

Test RESTful APIs for correctness, reliability, performance, and edge cases

Integrate and support our APIs and related services across merchant websites, third-party platforms, and partner systems

Work closely with internal teams and external developers to ensure smooth implementation, testing, and launch of integrations

Troubleshoot technical issues across frontend, backend, API, and third-party systems during integration and post-launch support

Collaborate with developers throughout the development lifecycle to prevent defects and improve overall product and integration quality

Create and maintain test plans, test cases, QA documentation, and integration documentation

Identify, document, and track bugs through resolution

Perform regression, smoke, integration, and exploratory testing

Validate releases and integration readiness across multiple environments

Support merchants and partners during implementation by helping diagnose issues and confirm successful deployments

Advocate for quality, usability, reliability, and best practices across both product development and external integrations

Requirements

5+ years of experience in QA, software testing, technical integrations, or a similar hands-on technical role

Strong experience testing JavaScript-based web applications

Hands-on experience with Next.js, Node.js, and backend APIs

Experience integrating APIs into external websites, merchant systems, or third-party platforms

Solid understanding of HTTP, REST, JSON, and API-based architectures

Experience with API testing tools such as Postman or similar

Experience with test automation tools such as Playwright, Cypress, Jest, or Selenium

Ability to troubleshoot issues across multiple systems and environments

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines

Strong analytical, debugging, and communication skills

Ability to work effectively with both internal teams and external technical stakeholders

Nice to Have

Experience working with e-commerce platforms, merchants, or partner integrations

Experience with webhooks, authentication, authorization, or security-sensitive systems

Experience with performance or load testing

Experience working with cloud platforms

Experience working in agile development environments



To apply, please submit your resume along with a short introduction video. If you have development projects to showcase please submit that as well.

title: Cleaning Business Sales and Operations
description:
You know what it's like to be great at sales but stuck in a role where nobody notices. Where you close deals and nothing changes. That's not this job.



We're a residential cleaning company running three markets across the US. We need someone who can sell AND operate. Close the deal, then make sure the job actually happens.



YOU MUST HAVE PRIOR EXPERIENCE IN A CLEANING BUSINESS.



Let me be honest about this role. Half of it is sales. The other half is operations: managing a team of independent cleaners who call out sick, run late, miss areas, and need to be rescheduled. Clients get frustrated. Cleaners have bad days. You're the person in the middle making sure nobody falls through the cracks.



If you only want to sell, this isn't the role. If chaos stresses you out, this isn't the role. But if you're the kind of person who handles problems calmly, keeps ten things moving at once, and still picks up the phone with energy — keep reading.



Your schedule:



Saturday & Sunday: 12-hour shifts (US EDT)

Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday: 9:00am – 2:30pm EDT



This is a weekend-heavy role. If that doesn't work for your life, this isn't the right fit, and that's completely fine.



The sales side:



Inbound leads from Google Ads and local service ads. Speed matters, every minute counts

Follow-up sequences with leads who didn't book the first time. You don't give up after one attempt

Lead tracking in our CRM — every call logged, every outcome recorded, no exceptions



Please note that we are an automation and AI-heavy business. Most of the work comes to you in Slack. We try to make this as easy as possible for everyone involved. 



The operations side:



Daily scheduling: assigning cleaners, handling reschedules, covering callouts

Client communication when things go sideways: a cleaner cancels, a job needs to move, a client is unhappy

Cleaner coordination via Slack and text: confirming schedules, managing no-shows, following up on job quality

Sunday lead data entry and reconciliation



What we're looking for:



It sounds like you might be the kind of person who takes ownership of things. Not because someone told you to, but because that's just how you operate. If something's broken, you fix it. If a lead goes quiet, you follow up again. And again. If a cleaner doesn't show, you don't wait for someone to tell you what to do...you're already calling the client and finding a solution.



Strong spoken and written English. You'll be talking to American homeowners on the phone.

Sales ability. You hear "I need to think about it" and you know what to say next.

Calm under pressure. Three things will go wrong at the same time. That's Tuesday.

Reliability over everything. Show up. Do the work. Log the data. The basics are the job.



Compensation:



$900/month base

$3 bonus per booked client

$100 monthly bonus when your close rate hits 50% or higher

The better you are, the more you earn. A strong performer will clear $1,100/month.

We have 2 pay raises planned in the first 6 months. 



Tools we use: Slack, Seatable, BookingKoala, OpenPhone, Google Workspace



About us: We've been operating since 2023. You'll work directly with the owner and our Cebu-based operations manager. Your results are visible immediately and they matter. If you're looking for a place where what you do actually counts, this is it.



How does this role compare to what you're looking for?

title: Technical, Ex - Entrepreneurial EA for Founder's Office
description:
Hi, I am founder of a fast growing loyalty/payment/social platform built on blockchain and it's currently applied to hospitality industry (restaurants and foodies via an app).



I need an entrepreneurial EA/Chief of Staff to work directly with primarily myself and other co-founders of this fast growing consumer technology company in Australia. The role will require not only to help with administrative duties (business & personal related, literally all sorts, imagine last minute shopping for mother's day gift?) to scheduling and coordination of meetings, data entry, research, booking flights or organise travels, contacts organised,
 responses pre-drafted, send gifts to friends on birthdays, get custom bios of everyone I meet, organise dinners, help with startup fundraising process, generating sales leads to
 campaigns, building playbooks for any repeated tasks.



Must be experienced as an EA but most important part is to be highly good with technology (for example, use zappier to create automation process of tasks or forms, slack, asana, click up, jira, notion, hubspot, confluence, figma, shopify, integrations, webflow, some coding experience too), and an ex entrepreneur is a major plus.



I need an exceptional person who can think like myself, who are basically a clone of myself or an extension of myself, so I can do more and this person is not going to just manage an inbox, calendar, meeting notes & actions but will do alot of cool and interesting stuff that only founders get to do apart from the personal related matters.



This role should particularly excite up and coming young talented budding entrepreneur because I will be training and will learn and be mentored by one of the best tech company founders in Australia, applying real skills into real world experience.



Core requirement:



- Experience in building business previously not just EA experience.

- Highly good with technology / love blockchain, crypto, food, apps / business in general / want to build her or his own tech startup one day or be part of world's best.

- Willingness to work at any odd hours, there is no set time (you will get to sleep, don't worry!)

- You need to have great written English skill, as well as communication skill.

- Technical in-fluency - super technical (comfortable with Jira, Confluence) 

- Understand Process Flows

- BPMN (Business Process Management Notation

- Project Management

- Highly skilled with excel to build modelling



Plus:

- Blockchain

- Gaming

- Finance

- Engineering



Your character:

- Think 10 steps ahead and manage projects with ownership mindset / founder mindset.

- Creative and strategic problem solver.

- Love doing things unconventionally and not afraid to fuck up (yeah fuck up is ok so long you don't make the same again).

- Special talent in researching and finding things online. Don't tell me you can't find when Google is the answer for anything.

- Never giving up, there is always solution mentality. Tenacious and persistent.

- You are continually seeking ways to improve and understand the power of leverage & compounding.

- Efficient and fast and ask right questions to perform better if stuck, but don't ask questions that answers can easily be found

- You've developed a slight obsession about productivity and results that matter, let's care about actual results.

- You're not precious about constructive criticism and freely absorb feedback.

- You can multi-task with your eyes closed. People often say you must have been a ninja in a past life.

- Your possession of EQ and IQ are both high.

- Your judgement is based upon a method of epistemology, not bias.

- It's not just attention to detail, you've got a special knack for noticing the little things that count.

- Power house content creator, able to write / produce relevant materials.



Please apply with the below: Send me a notion page with a link and attach the following:

- Why are you applying for this role?

- Do you meet the core criteria?

- Don't just tell me that you are smart and intelligent, give me evidences and proof that you are curious minded technology lover who has purpose in this world, want to build a next tech start up that gives humanity financial freedom and value that they can own, that you have values that standing for something greater than yourself.

- Show me example plans of how you will actually help with fundraising process (give me detailed process).

- Attach any personality test that you already took or complete this and attach in the notion the result. 16personalities.

- You will need to prove with past experience that you were start up entrepreneur or will be one.

- Include any design work you did in the past, use of figma.

- Any experience you have with e-commerce and sourcing from beginning to the end.



I am super excited to meet you. You should be too. :)

title: CSR Manager
description:
Job Description: Customer Service Manager

Position Overview

The Customer Service Director is responsible for overseeing the customer service department and ensuring that customers receive outstanding support and service. This role involves managing a team of customer service representatives, developing and implementing policies and procedures, and working to improve overall customer satisfaction.

Key Responsibilities

?Team Management: Supervise and mentor customer service staff, including hiring, training, and performance evaluation.

?Customer Support: Ensure the delivery of high-quality customer service across all channels, including phone,
, live chat, and social media.

?Policy Development: Develop and implement customer service policies and procedures to enhance the customer experience.

?Issue Resolution: Address and resolve escalated customer issues and complaints promptly and effectively.

?Performance Monitoring: Monitor and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) to assess the efficiency and effectiveness of the customer service team.

?Continuous Improvement: Identify areas for improvement in customer service processes and implement appropriate solutions.

?Training Programs: Develop and conduct training programs to keep the customer service team updated on best practices and company policies.

?Technology Utilization: Utilize customer service software and tools to manage and track customer interactions and improve service delivery.

?Feedback Collection: Gather and analyze customer feedback to identify trends and areas for improvement.

?Collaboration: Work closely with other departments, such as sales, marketing, and product development, to ensure a seamless customer experience.

?Budget Management: Manage the customer service department budget and ensure cost-effective operations.

Required Skills and Qualifications

?Experience: At least 10 years proven experience as a customer service director or in a similar role.

?Leadership: Strong leadership and team management skills.

?Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

?Problem-Solving: Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.

?Customer Focus: Deep understanding of customer service principles and practices.

?Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze performance metrics and identify areas for improvement.

?Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with customer service software, databases, and tools.

?Organizational Skills: Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities.

?Interpersonal Skills: Ability to build strong relationships with customers and tea
mbers.

?Education: Bachelor’s degree in business administration, marketing, or a related field is preferred.



Job Type:

Full-time- this is a full-time position that needs to be engaged during the entire shift. You will not have the ability to use this as a 2nd job.



Shift:

Monday- Friday CST 7am to 5pm 10 Hours Per Day- 1 Hour Break*

*Please note this is 9pm to 7am Philippines time half the year and half the year it would be 8pm to 6am.



Salary:

50,000 PHP to 100,000 PHP. Salary is done 2x a month on the 21st and the 6th day of the month.



You will have paid time off for the holidays we are closed in the U.S.



Company Introduction:



Welcome to Tri-State Tree Service, a beacon of excellence in the tree service industry for over 30 years. Based in the picturesque heart of Pensacola, FL, we've been nurturing roots of trust and quality in the communities we serve. As a TCIA (Tree Care Industry Association) accredited company, we're part of an elite group; less than 1% of Tree Service Companies attain this prestigious certification, setting us apart in our commitment to industry-leading standards and practices.



Our legacy is enriched by our unwavering dedication to technological innovation. With significant investments in the latest equipment and cutting-edge techniques, we've positioned ourselves as pioneers, consistently delivering unparalleled services to our valued clientele. At Tri-State Tree Service, you're not just finding a job – you're becoming part of a tradition rooted in excellence, innovation, and community growth. Embark on a journey with us and elevate your career as we continue to reach new heights in the tree care sector.



Application Process:

To apply, please ensure you do the following:

1. Include “Customer Tree” in the

title: Paid Media Buyer - Man Cereal
description:
**Paid Media Buyer (Part-Time) — Functional Food Brand**

*Remote | Part-Time | $1,000–$2,000/mo depending on experience*



---



**About Man Cereal**



Man Cereal is a Los Angeles-based startup and the world's first creatine-infused cereal — high protein, zero sugar, and built around real nutritional substance. We're a small, fast-moving team building a brand from the ground up and we need a sharp paid media buyer to help us grow.



---



**The Role**



We're looking for a part-time paid media buyer to own our Meta and Google ad accounts. This is not a set-it-and-forget-it role. We want someone who is proactive, data-driven, and genuinely curious about why ads work — not just someone who can push buttons.



You'll work directly with the founders and have real ownership over performance.



---



**What You'll Do**



- Manage and optimize campaigns across Meta 
/Instagram) and Google

- Monitor daily performance and flag issues before they become problems

- Make budget reallocation decisions based on data

- Write and suggest ad copy and creative briefs in collaboration with the team

- Send a weekly performance report with clear takeaways and recommendations

- Stay current on platform changes, trends, and what's working in the DTC space



---



**What We're Looking For**



- 4+ years managing paid media on Meta and Google (DTC or CPG experience is a big plus)

- Strong grasp of core metrics — ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM — and what they actually mean

- Someone who can think beyond the dashboard and connect creative decisions to performance

- Clear written and spoken English communication

- Reliable, responsive, and able to work with US-based founders (some overlap in hours required)

- Bonus: experience with a early-stage or startup brand



---



**What This Is Not**



- This is not an agency role — you'll be working directly with the brand

- This is not a passive role — we expect initiative, not just execution

- This is not a good fit if you need a lot of hand-holding



---



**How to Apply**



To be considered, please include the following in your application:



1. A brief summary of your paid media experience and the brands you've worked with

2. Your best result — a specific campaign or win you're proud of and the numbers behind it

3. Confirmation that you're comfortable completing a short paid test project (2–3 hours) as part of the interview process



Applications without all three will not be reviewed.
