title: Full Time Executive Assistant & Operations Manager
description:
FULL TIME EXECUTIVE VIRTUAL ASSISTANT & OPERATIONS MANAGER 

Manifesting Serenity | Fully Remote | 32hrs minimum - 40hrs maximum

If you have previously applied to a similar role, please apply again. The scope, qualifications, and expectations have evolved.



ABOUT THE COMPANY: MANIFESTING SERENITY

Manifesting Serenity is a growing travel, sustainability, and wellness media brand offering digital products, immersive events, group travel experiences, and speaking engagements. The company operates at the intersection of conscious travel, personal development, and experiential living.

With hundreds of travel resources, brand collaborations, and expanding media visibility, we are entering a new stage of growth and require experienced executive-level operational support.

Website: 

Social Media Channels: Candidates moving forward in the application process will be asked to review the website, subscribe to the
 newsletter, and follow the primary social media platforms. This role requires representing the brand voice, so genuine familiarity with our content and positioning is essential.

Instagram (Me) 

 (Me) 

Pinterest 

LinkedIn (Me) 

TikTok (Me) 

Manifesting Serenity - FB Group 



THE ROLE

I am hiring a Full-Time Executive Virtual Assistant & General Operations Manager to provide high-level executive, communications, and operational support.

This is not an entry-level position. This role requires experience, independent execution, strong professional communication skills, and the ability to think strategically.

You will operate as an extension of me — representing the brand in written communication, managing inbound and outbound opportunities, coordinating operations, and protecting executive time.

This is a results-oriented position focused on growth, placements, partnerships, and operational excellence.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



EXECUTIVE & COMMUNICATIONS MANAGEMENT

Manage daily inbound communication across
, social media, and messaging platforms

Strategically respond to inquiries while nurturing and qualifying leads

Protect executive time through intelligent calendar management and prioritization

Maintain and refine automated response templates while personalizing responses

Represent the founder professionally and confidently in all written communications

LEAD MANAGEMENT & STRATEGIC PITCHING 

Lead B2B pitching and outreach (podcasts, speaking engagements, partnerships, book signings)

Research aligned opportunities and initiate proactive outreach

Track all outreach and leads within structured Google Sheets or CRM systems

Conduct follow-ups and maintain relationship continuity

Assist in securing placements, contracts, and revenue-supporting opportunities

OPERATIONS & ORGANIZATION 

Oversee project management and task coordination

Maintain organized documentation systems within Google Workspace

Input analytics, track KPIs, and maintain reporting systems

Document recurring FAQs and insights for future content development

Event posting, coordination, and follow-up management

Participate in virtual tea
etings and execute action steps

MARKETING & MEDIA SUPPORT 

Support
 marketing campaigns

Draft and coordinate partner communications

Assist with social media content creation and light design

Support webinar and course engagement (future phase)

Assist with travel coordination when required

Analytics & Performance Reporting



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS 

Minimum 4+ years experience supporting executives, founders, or growth-stage brands

Advanced to Mastery-level English proficiency (written and verbal)

Bachelor’s Degree or higher required

Demonstrated success in pitching, outreach, or partnership development

Strong executive presence in written communication

Exceptional organizational and systems-thinking ability

Ability to work independently with minimal oversight

Experience managing multiple high-responsibility priorities simultaneously

High emotional intelligence and professional digital communication skills

Must be a woman or woman identifying (woman-led company seeking aligned team structure)



CORE EXPERTISE

Executive Calendar &
 Management

Lead Management & Strategic Pitching

Project Management & Task Coordination

Event Management & Marketing Support

Data Entry & Online Research

Systems Organization & Documentation

Partnership Relationship Management



BONUS EXPERTISE (PREFFERED) 

CRM software management and optimization

Basic bookkeeping or accounting familiarity

Travel planning and itinerary management

Media management & content production workflows

Graphic design fundamentals or creative direction support

Candidates with documented results (placements secured, contracts closed, partnerships developed) will be prioritized.



WORK EXPECTATIONS

Monday–Thursday (32 minimum hours) OR Monday - Friday (40 hours maximum) 

Responsiveness & engagement required between 6am–1pm PST (Seattle time) The other tasks are flexible with your time zone if you'd like.

24-hour advance notice required for time off

Consistent communication is mandatory

Failure to communicate for 48 hours during scheduled work time will result in termination

Integrity in time tracking and task execution is non-negotiable

This role is designed for experienced, self-led professionals who do not require micromanagement or frequent motivation.



COMPENSATION & PERFORMANCE STRUCTURE

$4–$5 per hour DOE

Performance bonuses tied to placements, contracts, and measurable growth outcomes

Efficiency bonuses tied to performance metrics

Loyalty-based pay increases

Overtime opportunities (pre-approved)

Holiday bonuses (after 3+ months)

Fully remote position

Payment Details:

Paid twice monthly (2nd and 4th Friday)

OnlineJobs.ph + PayPal

Monitask required (time tracking)



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Please submit:

Resume

Brief cover letter outlining relevant executive-level experience

Portfolio including:

Outreach and pitch examples

Documented results or placements secured

Content creation works

etc.



Podcast Screening: 2–3 customized podcast pitch
s for Manifesting Serenity and 3–5 aligned podcasts currently seeking guests

Founder
 Protection Exercise: Below is a simulated inbox snapshot. Draft responses and explain what you would escalate, delegate, or decline.



Inbox includes:

A podcast invite with no audience data

A speaking request offering “exposure only”

A brand collaboration with unclear compensation

A longtime subscriber asking for 20 minutes of “free advice”

A paid client needing urgent support

A vague partnership inquiry

Submit:

Drafted responses to each

What you would prioritize first and why

What you would bring to the founder vs. handle independently

Subject line must include: “Productivity Powerhouse”

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Please do not reach out outside OnlineJobs.ph unless invited to do so.



Role Evolution

1 Paid Project To Start (This will give us insight into how well we work together - before we continue on!)

2–4 weeks onboarding and systems training

3-month probationary review

6–12 month contract opportunity with structured performance review





I am building long-term infrastructure and visibility for this brand. I am seeking someone who takes ownership, executes strategically, and contributes meaningfully to scaling operations and public presence.

If you are confident in your ability to operate at an executive support level, I look forward to reviewing your application.



Best,

Serenity L.

CEO, Manifesting Serenity

title: Server Infrastructure Expert
description:
AWS & GCP | Cloud Architecture | CI/CD | AWS CDK



We’re looking for a highly experienced Server Infrastructure Expert to design, build, and optimise secure, scalable cloud environments across AWS and Google Cloud Platform (GCP), with strong hands-on experience using AWS CDK for infrastructure as code.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives on solving complex infrastructure challenges, automating deployments, and building robust CI/CD pipelines that support modern, high-availability applications.



What You’ll Do



Design and implement cloud architectures across AWS and GCP



Build and manage infrastructure using AWS CDK, Terraform, and other IaC tools



Design, build, and optimise CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Bitbucket, Jenkins, etc.)



Automate deployments and infrastructure provisioning



Implement security, monitoring, logging, and cost-optimisation best practices



Support containerised and microservices environments (Docker)



Collaborate with development teams to improve deployment speed, reliability, and scalability



Troubleshoot, optimise, and harden production environments



What We’re Looking For



Strong hands-on experience with AWS and GCP architecture



Proven experience using AWS CDK in production environments



Deep understanding of CI/CD principles and tooling



Experience with Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools



Solid Linux, networking, and cloud security knowledge



Experience with container orchestration (Kubernetes preferred)



Strong problem-solving, documentation, and communication skills



Ability to work independently and advise on best-practice architecture



Nice to Have



AWS and/or GCP certifications



Multi-cloud or hybrid-cloud experience



DevSecOps, security, or compliance experience



Experience with serverless architectures (Lambda, Cloud Functions)



What We Offer



Challenging, end-to-end cloud and infrastructure work



Flexible working arrangements



Competitive remuneration based on experience



Opportunity to influence cloud and DevOps strategy

title: Outbound Sales Representative (Work From Home)
description:
About Us



We’re a high-energy team driven by big goals and real results. We’re looking for motivated individuals who are ready to take ownership of their careers, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and turn effort into measurable success. If you’re ambitious, driven, and enjoy seeing your hard work pay off, this could be the right opportunity for you.



About the Role



As an Outbound Sales Representative, you will engage potential customers through outbound cold calls, introducing them to our premium products and services. Your role is to understand each customer’s needs, explain how our solutions can add value, and guide them toward the right fit.



This position is about real conversations, active listening, and building trust—whether you’re connecting with a new prospect or following up with an existing lead.



What You’ll Be Doing



Learning and mastering our premium products and services



Conducting outbound cold calls and follow-ups with confidence and professionalism



Creating positive, lasting impressions with every interaction



Representing the company as a reliable and trustworthy brand ambassador



Building genuine relationships with customers



Consistently meeting and exceeding sales targets with the support of our training and team



What We’re Looking For



Strong Communication Skills: Clear, confident, and persuasive

description:

/Instagram) ad campaigns you have personally managed (if available).

title: Senior Para Broker / Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking
description:
Para Broker / Credit Analyst

Australian Mortgage Broking – Complex & Medical Lending

Applicants must have minimum 3 years experience analysing Australian mortgage lending scenarios.



Full-Time | Permanent | Work From Home

Salary: 70,000 – 100,000 PHP per month depending on experience



This Role Is For a Real Credit Analyst — Not a Broker Admin



We are an established Australian mortgage brokerage specialising in lending for medical professionals and complex borrowers. Our work regularly involves residential, investment, commercial, SMSF, trust structures, and high-net-worth lending.



We are looking for a genuinely experienced Para Broker or Credit Analyst who understands how to structure lending, interpret credit policy, and produce strong lender-ready applications.



This role is not suitable for applicants whose experience is primarily document collection, CRM updates, application submission only, or broker administration.



If your previous role mainly involved preparing files for submission or acting as broker support, this position will not be the right fit.



The Type of Analyst We Are Looking For



You are someone who can think like a lender, not just process paperwork.



You have experience assessing borrowing capacity and servicing, identifying suitable lenders based on credit policy, structuring deals involving trusts, SMSF or commercial borrowers, and preparing clear credit submissions that help lenders approve deals.



You enjoy solving problems and working on lending scenarios where every file is different.



Mandatory Experience Requirements



Please only apply if you meet all of the following requirements.



You must have at least 3 years experience as a Para Broker or Credit Analyst in Australian mortgage broking.



You must have experience analysing and structuring residential and investment lending.



Exposure to commercial lending, trust lending or SMSF lending is highly desirable.



You must have strong knowledge of Australian lender credit policy and excellent written and spoken English.



You must also have experience using the following platforms:



ApplyOnline (AOL)

Mercury CRM

Quickli



If you are unfamiliar with these systems, you are not qualified for this role.



What You Will Be Doing



Analysing client financials and servicing positions



Researching lender credit policy and structuring lending solutions



Recommending lenders and loan strategies to brokers



Preparing high quality credit submissions



Assisting with complex lending scenarios including SMSF and trust structures



Supporting files through to approval and settlement



You will work closely with experienced brokers who handle complex transactions, so your work will directly influence deal outcomes.



Why This Role Is Different



Many offshore roles in mortgage broking are administrative.



This role is not.



You will be working with brokers who specialise in complex and high-value lending, including medical professional lending, SMSF lending, trust lending, commercial lending, and high-net-worth borrowers.



We value intelligence, initiative, strong analytical ability and attention to detail.



If you enjoy working on challenging deals and learning advanced lending strategy, you will thrive in this environment.



What We Offer



Permanent full-time work from home role



Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm AEST



Salary between 70,000 and 100,000 PHP depending on experience



A small experienced team of high-performing brokers and analysts



Exposure to complex lending scenarios most analysts never see



We are building a long-term team and are looking for someone who wants to grow with the business.



Application Instructions (Important)



Please do not send a CV only.



Applications without the following will not be reviewed.



Record a short video introduction (2 to 4 minutes) where you:



Explain your experience as a Credit Analyst or Para Broker



Describe the types of lending scenarios you have worked on



Explain how your role differed from broker administration or loan processing



Demonstrate your spoken English communication



Upload the video to Google Drive or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application.



Failure to follow these instructions will result in automatic rejection as attention to detail is critical in this role.



If you are an experienced credit analyst who enjoys problem-solving, complex lending structures and working with high-performing professionals, we would like to hear from you.

title: Office VA Administrator
description:
FULL-TIME OFFICE ADMIN / RECEPTIONIST



Australian Home Improvement Company – Long-Term Position

lbourne Time (Monday–Friday)

 ABOUT VICCON COATINGS



Viccon Coatings is a growing Australian home improvement company specializing in:

 • Deck restoration and timber maintenance

 • Stone and concrete cleaning & sealing

 • Epoxy garage coatings

 • Exterior painting

ABOUT THE ROLE

 • Protecting incoming leads

CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



 Customer Communication (Top Priority)

lbourne time with no other commitments during these hours?

Applications without these answers will not be considered.



If you want to grow with a structured, professional Australian company.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
This is a long-term, full-time position for the right person (you will have job security).



If you are looking for a gig or part-time work, this will not be a fit. I’m looking for someone to work with for years, not weeks.



The hours for this position are currently, Monday to Friday, from 8am to 5pm PST (California time).



Below you will find details about the position as well as the job duties. At the bottom will be the exact instructions on how to apply. I’m looking for someone highly organized and who pays attention. Please make sure you apply according to the instructions below.



POSITION



I run two businesses, an immigration law practice and a coaching business where I teach solo lawyers about marketing, sales, etc. You will be assisting with both businesses and this is the list of job duties / tasks that I will need your help with on a daily/weekly basis:



1) Create attractive PDFs (i.e guides, checklists, etc.)

2) Video editing (i.e. b-roll, subtitles, etc.)

3) Image editing and creation (i.e. Canva, etc.)

4) Post written and video content on social media (I will provide you the content)

5) Respond to people who comment, react and/or DM

6) Add people as friends/contacts on FB, LI, etc.

7) Research prospects and engage in conversation (online)

8) Return calls to warm prospects (no cold calling)

9) Follow-up with hot prospects and respond to client inquiries

10) Onboard new clients

11)
 outreach to prospects

12) Schedule calls and consultations

13) Create and countersign e-sign documents

14) Review and forward physical mail (pre-scanned as PDFs)

15) Request and follow-up on Google reviews

16) Entire future business / future cases in our calendar

17) Request and follow-up on referrals

18) Organize leads, prospects, clients so we can easily track them





The following are not required but a big plus if you know them . . .



-How to use a Mac (we don’t use PCs)

-Knowledge/Expertise in GHL (Go High Level)

-Experience in information marketing and/or experience working for a business/marketing coach.

-Experience working for an immigration law firm or working with attorneys



HOW TO APPLY (please follow exact instructions)



1) Respond here, on the onlinejobs.ph site, do not send me an

2) Go through the requirements above and, in writing here, let me know about your experience/expertise in each (if you don’t have experience/knowledge in something, that is fine, just let me know)

3) Include a link to a 30-60 second audio that starts with the words, “Good Morning Mr. Kumar” (don’t read a script, just talk to me as if we’re friends and talk to me about whatever you want)

4) Include a link to your OnlineJobs.PH profile

5) Let me know exactly what hourly rate, in USD, you are looking for

6) Tell me what you are looking for in a job and in a boss

7) Tell me a bit about you personally. No business here. What do you enjoy? Where do you life? Do you have a family? What are your hobbies, etc.? This is where I get to know a bit about you before we speak.

8) Include a link to your resume.



AFTER YOU APPLY



Assuming you followed the instructions above, I will acknowledge your application and let you know if you have made it to the next stage. I may also ask you some questions if I need clarification on anything.



Thank you for taking the time to read through this and good luck :)

title: Security monitor
description: We have 2 locations with lots of security cameras. I am looking for someone who can help keep an eye on the cameras and watch for hot spots of employees / customers stealing. We will teach you the important areas to watch and you can help keep an eye on the system for anything suspicious.

title: Urgent: Social Media Manager – Renovation Company
description:
Social Media Manager

Type: Remote (Part-Time or Full-Time, to be finalized)

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM EST

Rate: $5 USD per hour



We are seeking a proactive and creative Social Media Manager to support and grow our company’s online presence. This role focuses on building brand recognition across social media platforms, particularly
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

The ideal candidate has a strong background in content creation, social media management, and short-form video editing.



What You'll Do

- Manage and grow our presence on Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube

- Edit short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts- clean and minimalist

- Create and schedule content consistently

- Maintain a content calendar aligned with our campaigns

- Write scripts for on-site filming

- Track performance and suggest improvements



What We're Looking For

- Experience managing social media for a brand (portfolio required)

- Strong video editing skills (e.g., CapCut or similar)

- Creative, trend-aware, and self-directed

- Familiarity with Metricool or SocialPilot is a plus

- Construction or real estate background is a plus



Note: No need for long paragraphs- please simply state the number of years of experience as a Social Media Manager and in video editing. Applications must include both a resume and a portfolio. Submissions without both will not be considered.

title: Shopify Operations & QC Specialist
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Shopify Operations & Website QC Specialist to join our growing ecommerce team.



This role is ideal for someone who has strong hands-on experience working inside Shopify backend operations and enjoys testing websites, catching issues, and making sure pages are flawless before launch.



Ideal candidates can work PST hours, starting between 9am-11am PST and ending between 5pm and 7pm PST.



You will be a key part of our website and funnel launch process, helping ensure every product page, sales page, promotion, and checkout flow works perfectly before going live.



This is a long-term remote contractor opportunity with a fast-paced beauty and ecommerce brand.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Shopify Backend Support

Manage products, variants, collections, and pricing in Shopify

Set up and test discounts and promo codes

Review theme changes and store settings

Support app integrations and backend configurations

Help manage promotions, bundles, and product launches

Ensure products and offers are set up correctly before launch

Website QC / Quality Assurance



You will own the final quality check before pages go live.



This includes testing:



landing pages

product pages

sale pages

offer pages

funnel pages

cart pages

checkout pages



You will verify:



copy is correct

images and product carousels display properly

buttons and links work

products add to cart correctly

discounts apply correctly

mobile and desktop functionality

checkout flow works smoothly

upsells and post-purchase offers work as intended

Additional Experience That’s a Plus



Experience with any of the following is highly preferred:



Loop subscriptions

Abra

Rocked

pre-purchase and post-purchase upsells

auto add-to-cart promotions

Shopify apps and integrations

ecommerce funnel QA

Important Responsibilities

Run full QC checks before launch

Make test purchases and validate order flow

Flag bugs and critical issues

Communicate issues clearly to the team

Help ensure a smooth customer experience

Support fast-moving launches and promotions

What We’re Looking For

Strong Shopify backend experience

Ecommerce website QA / testing experience

Extremely detail-oriented

Able to catch small issues before they become customer-facing

Strong written English

Reliable and responsive

Comfortable working independently

Experience supporting US-based ecommerce brands is a plus

Why This Role Matters



This role is critical to helping us launch pages, products, and promotions without errors. We’re looking for someone who takes pride in finding issues before customers do.



If you love ecommerce operations, Shopify, and quality control, we’d love to hear from you.

title: GHL Expert
description:
We’re looking for someone who is experienced with Go High Level (GHL) and knows how to execute at a high level.



This role includes:



Building high-converting landing pages

 automations with proper tagging and segmentation

Maintaining clean, organized systems inside GHL

Having extreme attention to detail in everything you build

Being available with quick turn-around time



This is a salary-based position.

Some weeks are lighter, some are busier… but your pay stays consistent.



We value consistency, reliability, and someone who takes pride in their work.



What you can expect from us:



A positive, encouraging work environment

Clear direction and expectations

Opportunity to grow within a fast-moving business

title: Cold Caller Needed – No Accent
description:
We are looking for a cold caller with no detectable regional accent. If you have a visible or heavy accent, please do not apply — we don't want to waste your time or ours.



You must also have:



Great closing skills

Strong objection handling ability

Proven past experience closing deals over the phone



Compensation:

First 4 weeks: $4/hour

After 4 weeks (if we are happy with your performance): $6–$10/hour, full-time

To apply:

Send a short voice recording introducing yourself and briefly explaining your closing experience.



No voice recording = no consideration.

title: Marketing Success Specialist
description:
Hey there!



We're The Real Review (
), Australia and New Zealand's largest digital wine publication. Every day, wine lovers and industry professionals rely on us for expert wine reviews, ratings, and industry insights.



We're looking for a full-time Marketing Success superstar to join our team!



What you'll be doing:

Every day, you'll be the friendly face of The Real Review, helping customers and working on marketing campaigns. You'll manage our customer service platform (Hubspot), process orders, handle subscriptions, and keep our wine database looking sharp!



Your typical day might include:



- Checking how our live marketing campaigns are tracking

- Execute ad campaigns on Google, Instagram,
 and others

- Processing invoices and orders for wine events and award stickers

- Managing our Hubspot AI agents and workflow automations

- Create graphics and creative collateral for campaigns using The Real Review templates

- Scheduling social media posts and event listings

- Updating winery information and uploading beautiful wine labels



This role is perfect for you if:

- 2+ years in digital advertising or social media marketing

- Strong skills with Google Ads, Meta Ads, Hubspot (or similar)

- Experience in setting up AI agents and automations (e.g. in Hubspot or other platforms)

- Openness to learn about new tech platforms

- Proficiency with design & scheduling tools (Sketch, Later, etc).

- Your written and verbal English is on point and you're happy to learn some Aussie and NZ slang (including casual conversation)

- You're organized and can juggle multiple tasks

- You enjoy being part of a dynamic, growing company

- Have a fast, reliable internet connection

- Have a fast computer with a large screen

- Good setup for video calls with customers and our team



Tools you'll be using:

- Video conferencing

- Hubspot for customer service

- Recurly for subscriptions

- Deep edge tools for image editing

- Mailchimp for
 campaigns

- Google Workspace (especially Sheets)

- Google / Meta ads



Experience with these specific tools and AI agents is a big plus, but we're happy to train the right person!



Why join us?

- Great pay

- Flexible hours

- Opportunity to grow with us

- Learn about the fascinating world of wine

- Be part of a supportive, friendly team



This is a full time contractor role.



Ready to apply?



If this sounds like your dream job, we'd love to hear from you! Please apply by completing this short test:







Only applications who fully complete the test and upload a video will be considered.



Applications close 12 April 2026.



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Operations Manager / COO (Startup – Full Time, Remote)
description:
We’re building a startup franchise in the commercial services industry and looking for a true operator and someone who can take ownership, build systems, and help run the business day-to-day.



This is not a basic VA role. If you need constant direction, this is not the right fit.



What You’ll Own:

Manage and optimize our pipeline in HubSpot

Ensure all leads are followed up and nothing gets missed

Coordinate with marketing and track results

Build and improve systems using Airtable and other tools

Handle admin and communication with attention to detail

Support invoicing and financial tracking in QuickBooks



What We Expect:

Proactive and takes initiative without being told

Extremely organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable learning new systems quickly

Strong follow-through and ability to close loops

Clear and professional communication



Nice to Have:

Experience with HubSpot, Airtable, and QuickBooks

Experience in a startup or operations role



To Apply (Read Carefully)

Start your application with the word “Operator”

In 2–3 sentences, explain a system or process you built or improved

Include your experience with HubSpot, Airtable, and QuickBooks



Salary is flexible depending on experience. We want a long term partner and must be willing to work some US hours.

title: B2B Appointment Setter (US Company)
description:
Earn 50K–80K+/Month | B2B Appointment Setter (US Company)



TruGuard Security (U.S.-based) is hiring experienced B2B appointment setters from the Philippines.



This is a real outbound sales role, not a VA/customer support job.







Compensation (What You Can Actually Earn)

 • Base Salary: ?27,000 – ?36,000/month

 • + Bonuses + Uncapped Commission



Most reps stay in the 30K–45K range

Strong performers hit 50K–80K+ consistently



The job is simple:



Book more meetings = earn more money



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Call U.S. businesses (cold calling)

 • Get past gatekeepers

 • Speak with decision-makers

 • Ask 1–2 quick questions

 • Book appointments for our sales team



That’s your only goal: book meetings



This Role Is For You If:

 • You’ve done B2B appointment setting

 • You’ve called U.S. prospects before

 • You know how to:

 • Handle gatekeepers

 • Deal with “send me an
”

 • Push for the meeting confidently

 • You want a role where performance = higher income



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

 • B2B appointment setting experience

 • Cold calling experience (U.S. market)

 • Go High Level (GHL) experience

 • Strong spoken English

 • Quiet work environment + stable internet

 • Can work U.S. hours



Do NOT Apply If:

 • No B2B experience

 • No cold calling background

 • You struggle with English

 • You avoid rejection or pressure



Growth Path



Top performers can move into:

 • Senior setter roles

 • Closer positions

 • Team lead roles



We promote based on results.



We’re Hiring Fast



We are only bringing on a small group of reps this month.



If you’re qualified, you will be contacted quickly.





How to Apply (Read Carefully)



1. Voice Recording (MANDATORY)



Record yourself (1–2 minutes):

 • Introduce yourself

 • Then pretend you’re cold calling a business owner and trying to book a meeting



If your recording is weak, you will not be considered



2. Include This Line in Your Application:



“I have B2B appointment setting experience and GHL experience.”



(No sentence = automatic rejection)



3. Send Your Experience:

 • B2B appointment setting background

 • U.S. cold calling experience

 • GHL usage

 • Metrics (calls/day, meetings booked)



Final Note



This is a performance-based sales role.



If you’re skilled, confident, and want to earn more based on results,

this is a strong opportunity.



If not — this won’t be a fit.
